faqs.question: Is Sister Nivedita University private or government institute?
faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University Kolkata is a private university. The university was recognised by the AICTE and UGC. Sister Nivedita University Kolkata ranked 113 in the engineering category and 105 in the management category in the Outlook Ranking 2025.

faqs.question: Why to choose Sister Nivedita University Kolkata?
faqs.answer:
Sister Nivedita University is a good choice for students interested in either the Engineering or Management streams with the university being ranked 113 and 105 in the Engineering and Management categories, respectively by Outlook Ranking 2025.
The university is also known for its other UG, PG, Diploma and certificate courses  with Sister Nivedita University Kolkata being a good choice overall for many students depending on their interests.

faqs.question: Is there a ragging culture a Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: SNU Kolkata has an Anti-Ragging Cell. Hence, the freshers will never meet with this problem while studying in this college. The college premises has strict laws against the student found guilty of any act such as abusing, assaulting, threatening, teasing and embarrassment to new students, among others.

college_info.intro:
Sister Nivedita University offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and PhD courses in the fields of Science, Humanities, Engineering, Social Sciences, Agricultural Sciences, etc. The flagship courses at SNU Kolkata are MBA, BTech, and BSc. Students can apply for various courses through online application. SNU eligibility criteria varies from course to course.
SNU Kolkata BTech programme is offered in full-time for the duration of four-years. The university offers BTech specilisation in CSE, Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Data Science, and others. SNU BTech admission is based on merit and entrance exams. The university also accepts BTech Lateral entry. Sister Nivedita University BTech fees ranges between INR 6.57 lakh- INR 9.03 lakh.
Sister Nivedita University courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Sister Nivedita University in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Sister Nivedita University placements 2025 has been released for Pharmacy and Law courses. The median package offered to BPharma students during SNU placements 2024 was INR 2.86 LPA. The median salary offered to LLB and BA LLB/ BBA LLB/ BCom LLB students was INR 3.60 LPA and INR 3.60 LPA.

SNU placement record has a 97 percent placement rate at the end of its placement drive of the Class of 2023. According to the recent report, the maximum and median package provided at the time of SNU placement package was INR 51 LPA and INR 6.50 LPA, respectively. Moreover, the placements done by SNU Kolkata 2023 involved more than 270 recruiters and they placed students in different fields. Amazon, Deloitte, EY, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, IBM, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sister Nivedita University courses are offered to students mainly under the streams of Engineering, Management, Science, Law, etc. The university provides a wide range of programmes at UG, PG and PhD levels. At the UG level, SNU Kolkata offers various programmes, including BTech, BA, BBA, BSc, BCom, BPharm, etc. SNU University Kolkata courses are AICTE-approved and are offered to students in full-time mode. At the PG level, SNU West Bengal offers courses such as MBA, MTech, MSc, and many more. These courses are provided to students across several specialisations. The following table showcases a list of along with their eligibility criteria and :

faqs.answer: A:    Sister Nivedita University conducts SNUET for admission to UG and PG programmes. However, aspirants with any of the accepted national or state-level entrance exam scores can also get admission. The university considers WBJEE, GATE, etc. for admission to specific programmes. Once selected based on entrance-exam score, candidates have to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.
faqs.question: Can I join Sister Nivedita University without SNUET?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed a three-year graduation degree with at least 55% aggregate are eligible to apply for Sister Nivedita University MBA programme. Aspirants appearing in the final year exam can also apply. Besides, candidates also need to pass GMAT, CAT, JEMAT or MAT for admission to MBA course.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Sister Nivedita University?

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in English - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A temple for learning and individual growth.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students of my department have been given a chance for internship at a well-established and reputed area. From the creative field to the corporate world, every interest is given a chance to experience and flourish. Top recruiters are Aajkal, Republic, British Council, SVF, Hoichoi, Amazon, Wipro, TCS. Around 80 percent of the department receives placement opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The collection of books in the library is really helpful for having a strong hold on the syllabus. It has a wide range of hardcopy books as well as provides a good source of digital platform libraries. Thousands of books from different languages and genres find their place in the library.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good learning environment with Industry exposure.

review_content.Placements: Placements are decent, about 70 to 75 percent of my seniors got placed in the Big Four. If you have the skillset, you can easily crack the interview and get placed. Other details I can provide after completing my course, but my seniors said it has been an amazing journey for them. I am also looking forward to studying and getting placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are comfortable sitting arrangements for students, Wi-Fi and lab facilities are also available, and unlimited access to informative physical and digital books in the library makes it very student-friendly, especially in this age where everything is online. On campus, food trucks are there with lots of tasty and healthy options to choose from.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Microbiology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent labs, but syllabus not upto the mark .

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide any sort of related placement or internship at B.Sc. Level. The only placement you will get is for sales and marketing with an annual package of 2 to 3 LPA that also only a few students got an opportunity from my batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not too big, but the classrooms are okay, the labs are air conditioned and the library has free Wi-Fi. Labs are highly equipped and you will get to learn each piece of equipment thoroughly. They do provide good hostel facility but outside the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in English - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent faculty, good infrastructure and facilities, satisfactory food.

review_content.Placements: In the M.A. in English course, the faculty regularly keep the students informed and updated with new placement and internship opportunities in various fields, including travel, sales, corporate, and even reputed. Organizations like British Council, and the students are also given the opportunity to apply for internships at the university as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well above satisfactory, with classrooms big enough to accommodate the whole strength of the batch comfortably, an auditorium that can hold all attendees for different events, board rooms equipped with current technologies for smooth meetings and conferences. Food trucks at the university offering a wide variety of options with quality above average.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in English - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Supportive facility, structured curriculum and a well maintained campus

review_content.Placements: 97 percent of students get placements in roles such as a translator, content writer, HR, accountant and many others. The highest package was 51 LPA whereas the lowest package was 15 LPA. The placement cell is very helpful for students in providing internships and jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a modern campus with spacious classrooms. The department also provides the facilities of A. C and Wi-Fi for students. The library is also having large space and well-equipped books, e-resources, and journals that are very helpful for students. Hostel facilities are also very good and well maintained with hygiene. 24/7 security for safety purposes. Food is also good, healthy and made with hygiene.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The journey was good and memorable.

review_content.Placements: Placement for my batch was not up to the mark, but I had a lot of friends in different departments who received their placements from reputable companies. Senior teachers would provide us with emails about the companies that were currently hiring. TCS and BPL were among the companies that were hiring at that time.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus was quite spacious, with plenty of room to sit, walk, and even play some games. It featured a basketball court and a library with numerous subject-related books. There was also a seminar hall where various webinars were held. The classrooms were clean and appropriately sized based on the number of students in each section. However, the number of elevators was relatively low compared to the number of students.

faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University offers seats in most of the programmes based on entrance-exam scores. SNUET is a common entrance exam conducted for all the UG & PG courses by the university. However, the university also accepts scores of national or state-level entrance exams such as WBJEE, GATE, etc. for specific programmes. Candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility requirements and qualify the respective entrance exams to confirm their admission.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get seat in Sister Nivedita University?

faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University admissions are open currently. Candidates can fill out the SNU application form online on the university's website. Aspirants have to register with an application fees of INR 1,000.
faqs.question: Q: Are admissions open at Sister Nivedita University?

faqs.answer: Yes, Sister Nivedita University offers direct admission based on CUET-UG scores. Eligible candidates may be further contacted via email for counselling and admission. Shortlisted aspirants have to take admission by verification and submission of required documents. Candidates selected based on CUET-UG scores have to pay at least 50% of annual fee to confirm their seat in the university.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to Sister Nivedita University?

overview_faqs.question: Is Sister Nivedita University a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Sister Nivedita University is a good university as it has more than 39 years of experience and is recognised by the UGC. The university is recognised by the UGC and is approved by the AICTE, PCI, BCI, and WBNC. In addition to this, Sister Nivedita University has a dedicated placement cell that has decent connections with top-notch companies such as Amazon, Microsoft, Ashok Leyland, Bosch, HP, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: Sister Nivedita University Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Sister Nivedita University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sister Nivedita University or SNU admission 2026 is entrance-based. The university conducts the SNUET exam for admission to most of the UG & PG courses. Apart from this, SNU also accepts scores of national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CLAT, CAT, MAT, etc., for specific courses. Sister Nivedita University offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels across various streams such as Engineering, Law, Science, Arts, etc. Candidates can fill out the form online for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: Sister Nivedita University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The university offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates applying for a course must fulfil the specified eligibility criteria. SNUET is accepted for all the UG and PG courses offered at SNU. Aspirants can also get direct admission based on their CUET-UG scores. Below are the SNU courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with EPCM with at least 55%-60% aggregate
Class 12 from a recognised board with a minimum 50% aggregate as per BCI norms
Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate and 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics
3-year UG degree with at least 50% aggregate
Graduation with at least 50% aggregate
Class 12 with relevant subjects

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BA LLB (Hons) at Sister Nivedita University?

faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University accepts scores from the many exams for  MBA admissions like CAT, WBJEE, JELET, and APICET. The 2023 cutoff for CAT scores in the general category was at 25 percentile. While all other exams are also having the minimum cutoff as 25 percentile for admission in MBA
faqs.question: What is the minimum cutoff for MBA at Sister Nivedita University?

faqs.answer: No, Sister Nivedita University is not hard to get. The university conducts its admission process through online and offline registrations. SNU Kolkata admission is based on university and national-level entrance exams. The university conducts the SNUET exam for admission to most of the UG & PG courses. Apart from this, SNU also accepts scores of national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CLAT, CAT, MAT, etc., for specific courses. To get admitted to Sister Nivedita University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college.

faqs.answer: For MBA admission, Sister Nivedita University accepts the national-level entrance exams, such as CAT, MAT, etc. It also accepts valid SNUET entrance exam score conducted by Sister Nivedita University for MBA admission. paragraphs: SNU admission processincludes registration, selection, admission confirmation and fee payment. Below are the steps of the same:-
Candidates have to fill out theSister Nivedita University application formon the university website or collect it from the campus. Students have to pay an application fees of INR 1,000.

Admission to all the courses is entirely entrance-based. SNUET is a common entrance exam accepted for all the UG & PG courses offered at the university. However, the university also accepts scores of national or state-level entrance exams such as WBJEE, GATE, etc. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria and qualify the entrance exams to confirm their admission. Students may also need to come for a PI round for admission to some courses.

All selected candidates are provided with an Admission offer letter, further guidelines and other details through e-mail. Shortlisted students are then required to deposit the first instalment of theSNU feesto confirm their seat in the university. Check below the common documents required at the time of admission:

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility requirement at Sister Nivedita University for B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed Class 12 in Science stream with at least 60% aggregate are eligible to apply for the Sister Nivedita University BTech course. Besides, aspirants must also pass any of the accepted entrance exams for BTech admission. The university considers WBJEE or SNUET scores for BTech.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BTech at Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University offers admission to BTech (Hons)/ Hons with Research course based on scores of candidates in WBJEE or SNUET. The university conducts SNUET for admission to BTech and other UG and PG courses. Besides, aspirants should also meet the eligibility criteria for admission in the SNU BTech course.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Sister Nivedita University accept for admission to B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University considers WBJEE or SNUET score for admission to BTech programme. SNUET is conducted online by the university. It is a one-hour multiple choice test. Aspirants selected based on entrance exam scores are sent an admission offer letter. Shortlisted aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: Sister Nivedita University MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Sister Nivedita University offers a full-time MBA course for a duration of two years. This course is offered across various specialisations such as General,Sports Management, Healthcare Management and Business Analytics. Admission to this course is entirely entrance-based. Candidates with valid GMAT, CAT, JEMAT, MAT scores for MBA.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA courses are available at Sister Nivedita University and are offered full-time. Additionally, the university provides majorly four specialisations in the course, such as Healthcare Management, Sports Management, Business Analytics and General. For admission to these courses, the university accepts the national-level entrance examinations i.e., MAT, CAT, and JEMAT. Additionally, SNU grants admission based on in-house entrance examination i.e., SNUET scores.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed a three-year graduation degree with at least 55% aggregate are eligible to apply for Sister Nivedita University MBA programme. Aspirants appearing in the final year exam can also apply. Besides, candidates also need to pass GMAT, CAT, JEMAT or MAT for admission to MBA course.

faqs.question: How can I get seat in Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University offers seats in most of the programmes based on entrance-exam scores. SNUET is a common entrance exam conducted for all the UG & PG courses by the university. However, the university also accepts scores of national or state-level entrance exams such as WBJEE, GATE, etc. for specific programmes. Candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility requirements and qualify the respective entrance exams to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Can I join Sister Nivedita University without SNUET?
faqs.answer: Sister Nivedita University conducts SNUET for admission to UG and PG programmes. However, aspirants with any of the accepted national or state-level entrance exam scores can also get admission. The university considers WBJEE, GATE, etc. for admission to specific programmes. Once selected based on entrance-exam score, candidates have to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BArch at Sister Nivedita University?

Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Sister Nivedita University offers a five-year BArch course divided into 10 semesters.

placement_report.college_name: Sister Nivedita University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Sister Nivedita University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The 2025 or 2024 SNU placement record has not been released. The University concluded its placement drive for the Class of 2023 with a 97% placement rate. As per the latest report, the highest and average packages offered during SNU Kolkata placements 2023 stood at INR 51 LPA and INR 6.50 LPA , respectively. Over 270 recruiters participated in placements 2023 and placed students in various sectors . The top recruiters of Sister Nivedita University placements 2023 included Amazon, Deloitte, EY, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, IBM , etc.

The NIRF report 2025 has also been released for Pharmacy and Law courses. The median package offered to BPharma students during SNU placements 2024 was INR 2.86 LPA . The median salary offered to LLB and BA LLB / BBA LLB / BCom LLB students was INR 3.60 LPA and INR 3.60 LPA .

Sister Nivedita University cutoff 2025 was released via WBJEE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 349830 and 1427679 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 349830, B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sister Nivedita University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: SNU provide an interactive, holistic, healthy and academic-oriented environment for students. Sister Nivedita University hostels are gender segregated and independent. The entire hostel facility is maintained by professional housekeeping and maintenance agencies that have vast exposure in the corporate climate. A global agency has been deployed for pest control and they work in defined periodic cycles, which is monitored and reported. This agency uses a combination of biodegradable and eco-friendly chemicals that does not impact our environment and is part of our commitment towards sustainability. A 24x7 security system, using male and female guarding staff, as appropriate, is deployed and very closely monitored by a vigilant and robust security matrix. Students from different cultures and backgrounds are treated with respect and dignity fueled by guidance and encouragement from the teaching team, as well as supported by excellent resources.

library.description: Sister Nivedita University library is housed in a state-of-the-art infrastructure and equipped with latest instruments to meet academic requirements. It offers its users the convenient access to the best of books, journals, magazines, eBooks from globally known publishers, e-journals consisting of scholarly contents both in print and electronic round the clock all across the campus. The major focus of the SNU library is to provide online/ digital learning resources that will allow users to access them anywhere, at any time. Apart from relevant text-books, a number of books of general value and interest are also available.

facilities: Virtual Instrumentation and Signal Processing Lab
labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Communication Systems Lab, Virtual Instrumentation and Signal Processing Lab, Dynamics Lab

reviews.review_heading: A temple for learning and individual growth.
reviews.review_text: The collection of books in the library is really helpful for having a strong hold on the syllabus. It has a wide range of hardcopy books as well as provides a good source of digital platform libraries. Thousands of books from different languages and genres find their place in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with Industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: There are comfortable sitting arrangements for students, Wi-Fi and lab facilities are also available, and unlimited access to informative physical and digital books in the library makes it very student-friendly, especially in this age where everything is online. On campus, food trucks are there with lots of tasty and healthy options to choose from.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent labs, but syllabus not upto the mark .
reviews.review_text: The campus is not too big, but the classrooms are okay, the labs are air conditioned and the library has free Wi-Fi. Labs are highly equipped and you will get to learn each piece of equipment thoroughly. They do provide good hostel facility but outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, good infrastructure and facilities, satisfactory food.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well above satisfactory, with classrooms big enough to accommodate the whole strength of the batch comfortably, an auditorium that can hold all attendees for different events, board rooms equipped with current technologies for smooth meetings and conferences. Food trucks at the university offering a wide variety of options with quality above average.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive facility, structured curriculum and a well maintained campus
reviews.review_text: It has a modern campus with spacious classrooms. The department also provides the facilities of A. C and Wi-Fi for students. The library is also having large space and well-equipped books, e-resources, and journals that are very helpful for students. Hostel facilities are also very good and well maintained with hygiene. 24/7 security for safety purposes. Food is also good, healthy and made with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: The journey was good and memorable.
reviews.review_text: The campus was quite spacious, with plenty of room to sit, walk, and even play some games. It featured a basketball court and a library with numerous subject-related books. There was also a seminar hall where various webinars were held. The classrooms were clean and appropriately sized based on the number of students in each section. However, the number of elevators was relatively low compared to the number of students.

reviews.review_heading: As per this review, come to this college and you will definitely not think of leaving this college.
reviews.review_text: I don’t know about the hostel as I don’t stay in the hostel, but from my friends, I got to know that it is well maintained and food is also served in good quality. For the course infrastructure, the classrooms and library are in good condition with Wi-Fi and projectors. Sports and games communities are there too, which organize many events and guide you for representing the college in AIU.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are very good. They all have separate departments. There are many faculty members to teach us. They are very friendly to us. They help us in every academic situation. They teach us with effort.

reviews.review_heading: SNU gives students opportunities to build careers with minimal cost and great facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the required apparatus, reagents, incubators, freezer, and all other lab necessities are readily available in the air-conditioned labs. We have 5 labs in our department, including animal and plant biotechnology labs, which are sufficiently equipped for undergrad students. Classrooms are comfortable, spacious, and classes are easier to follow with the help of projectors and whiteboards.

reviews.review_heading: SNU builds a strong academic foundation and promises biotechnology opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. The labs of the biotechnology department are well-equipped. It has almost all the instruments that are required for students pursuing biotechnology in UG and PG. The reagents are orderly arranged. The lab assistants of our department work tremendously to keep everything in its proper place. We have a plant issue culture lab and an animal issue culture lab (not every highly equipped, but enough for UG students). Classrooms are quite big enough to accommodate 60-...

reviews.review_heading: Overall good if you are a nerd, else fest are very less.
reviews.review_text: Accommodation is extremely good, and the college has very well-equipped labs with high configuration laptops like i7 processors and 16 GB RAM. It has table tennis, a gym inside, fully air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi in the hostel but not in class, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, modern infrastructure, and overall great campus life.
reviews.review_text: It has advanced infrastructure with modern teaching techniques. My College has a good and safe hostel with several facilities like Wi-Fi, fridge, washing machines, etc. My college has advanced infrastructure with modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, a rich library, and reliable Wi-Fi across the campus. The canteen provides decent food, and medical as well as sports facilities are also available, making student life balanced and secure.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and supportive faculty members, moderate level placements, and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: We have one classroom for 1st year students, and from 2nd year we have specialisation-based classrooms. 24/7 Wi-Fi and a computer are provided. The food in the canteen is average, but we are also provided with different food trucks.

reviews.review_heading: It has great campus life, modern facilities, and good placement support.
reviews.review_text: Sister Nivedita University boasts a modern Wi-Fi-enabled smart classroom, fully equipped labs, and a digital library accessible 24/7. Hostels are gender segregated, hygienic, and secure, with furnished rooms. Mess/canteen serves healthy, affordable meals. Medical care is robust, with doctors and emergency staff on campus. A well-maintained sports complex offers cricket, basketball, a gym, and indoor games, ensuring a well-rounded campus experience.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: I think my college has great infrastructure. We have very nice labs, and there are many computers. We have free internet service, and the classrooms are good with AC. We don't have a hostel, but the canteens are good.

paragraphs: Sister Nivedita University Kolkata offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. The table reflects the scholarships offered by Sister Nivedita University Kolkata:
a) This Scholarship is granted directly by the Hon’ble Chancellor, Sister Nivedita University.
b) Under this scholarship scheme, a remission of 50 % to 100 % of total fees is waived for needy students, and the candidate should maintain a good academic record per semester.
Note: Chancellor Merit cum Means Scholarship requires a family income certificate from any of the following, which would be considered for awarding the scholarship
i. Any Government Gazetted Officer not below the rank of BDO in the case of rural areas.
ii. Executive Officer in case of Municipality.
iii. Any Govt. Gazetted Officer not below the rank of Deputy Secretary in case of Corporation.

Any talent in the field of sports, performing arts (e.g. singing, dancing, drama, etc.), visual arts (e.g. painting, sculpture, etc.), who has represented the State or Nation at a National or International level, may be offered 50% scholarship which is equivalent to 50% of the Tuition Fee payable by the student. Depending upon the applicant's merit the scholarship amount may be increased with due approval of the Scholarship Committee.
If the candidate qualifies for his/her previous examination from any of the Institutes under Techno India Group, he/she will be offered a 15% scholarship of tuition fees.
For detailed information, candidates can check SNU Scholarship details .

The School of Design DY Patil Pune offers specialisations in BDes and BSc with the eligibility criteria of securing 45% in Class 12 and entrance exams such as CBSE 12, ISC, Maharashtra HSC and others. It offers courses for the duration of 4 years with a fee structure of INR 5.8 Lakh - INR 12 Lakh. Below are the details regarding Dr D. Y. Patil School of Design fees, courses, and eligibility:

faqs.answer: A:    Dr DY Patil School of Design offers BSc and BDes with various specialisations. It offers a BSc with tuition fees of INR 5.8 Lakh for 4 years. For BSc, the tuition fee for a 4-year programme is INR 12 Lakh. Apart from the tuition fees, the fee structure involves various other components such as hostel fees and one-time fees. Therefore after including the hostel fees, the total amount of BDes is INR 19.06 Lakh- INR 20 Lakh. Whereas, for BSc, the total tuition fee is INR 13.8 Lakh.
faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for various courses at Dr. D. Y. Patil School of Design?

Students have to pay the first semester fee or admission fee (As per the school) to confirm their seats after final selection. The total fee may include one-time components, such as security deposit. Further, it must be taken into account that the fee mentioned here is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely fully satisfied with the faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The lowest package is 4.5 LPA and the highest package is 12 LPA. Companies that visit our colleges for placements are Deluxe, MIT Media Lab, etc. The percentage of students who get placements in our course is 70-80%. Every student gets internship offers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are the best. We have got the best infrastructure that I haven't seen before. We have the best PCs in our labs and the best Wi-Fi. I don't live in a hostel but I can say that there is good hygiene and better food too. There are different clubs for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (OCT 2025) B.Des. in Visual Communication Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Students can culminate their vision here.

review_content.Placements: 100% of placement assistance is offered and the college provides internships as well. We get placements from companies like Myntra, Lenskart, and Wipro. Many roles like graphic designer, cinematographer, UI/UX designer, etc., are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of food can be better. The canteen is very lively and there are limited sports facilities. The library is very lively and has a lovely atmosphere. The infrastructure is very comforting overall.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable and qualified. They teach elaborately and have great communication skills. Semester exams are relatively easygoing and culminate in a good design process for students. Staff members are very amiable and helpful.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Product Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design.

content.Placements: There are 30 students in my batch. The average package offered in my course ranges between 6-12 LPA. Top roles offered in interior designing are interior designer, set designer, interior decorator, theatre designer, interior stylist, and light and ambience designer.
content.Infrastructure: Various labs like the CAD lab, drawing studio, illustration and graphic design studio, photography studio, model making studio, furniture working studio, lighting studio, and many other labs and studios are there to help students learn better and earn real industry experience.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (OCT 2025) B.Des. in Visual Communication Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is shaping the future of students for creative excellence.

content.Placements: 100% of placement assistance is offered. The college provides internships as well as placements in companies like Myntra, Lenskart, and Wipro. There are many fields like graphic design, product design, and fashion design studios for different departments like fashion design.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is modern and enhances the learning experience for students. The hostel provides food, laundry, a TV room, a study room, cleaning staff members, and thoughtful design to support academic, creative, and extracurricular needs for students who are doing the design course.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Animation and VFX Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely fully satisfied with the faculty members.

content.Placements: The lowest package is 4.5 LPA and the highest package is 12 LPA. Companies that visit our colleges for placements are Deluxe, MIT Media Lab, etc. The percentage of students who get placements in our course is 70-80%. Every student gets internship offers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are the best. We have got the best infrastructure that I haven't seen before. We have the best PCs in our labs and the best Wi-Fi. I don't live in a hostel but I can say that there is good hygiene and better food too. There are different clubs for sports.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (OCT 2025) B.Des. in Visual Communication Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Students can culminate their vision here.

content.Placements: 100% of placement assistance is offered and the college provides internships as well. We get placements from companies like Myntra, Lenskart, and Wipro. Many roles like graphic designer, cinematographer, UI/UX designer, etc., are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of food can be better. The canteen is very lively and there are limited sports facilities. The library is very lively and has a lovely atmosphere. The infrastructure is very comforting overall.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable and qualified. They teach elaborately and have great communication skills. Semester exams are relatively easygoing and culminate in a good design process for students. Staff members are very amiable and helpful.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Product Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It provides empowering minds and an inspiring future.

content.Placements: This college provides valuable real-world experience and leadership skills ultimately enhancing career preparedness and solidifying career goals. There are 30 students in the interior design course, which is a perfect ratio for learning. Top recruiting companies for our course are Myntra, Deluxe,  Lenskart, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is decent with a hygienic environment. There are maids who clean our rooms every day. There are guards on every floor for safety or to provide help whenever needed. The hostel has games to pass our time but sometimes there are water issues.

admission_process.title: Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Aspirants need to fill out the form and appear for the entrance exam. Candidates also need to participate in other selection rounds conducted by the university. Check below the steps to get a seat in Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design:
1: Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design Application Process 2026
Candidates need to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee at Dr. D.Y. Patil SOD is INR 1,500.

The school selects candidates based on their performance in DPU All India Design Aptitude Test followed by Studio Test. Selected aspirants are also called for a personal interview round. The school also considers academic performance of the candidates for final selection.
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Selected candidates need to pay theDr. D.Y. Patil School of Design feesto confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What is the MDesign course fees at DY Patil School of Design?
faqs.answer: The total course fees for MDesign is INR 3.5 LPA. In addition to this, students must also pay other fees like eligibility fees, exam fees and study tour fees. Fees can be paid in various modes. Students can contact DY Patil School of Design for more details.

faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for various courses at Dr. D. Y. Patil School of Design?
faqs.answer: Dr DY Patil School of Design offers BSc and BDes with various specialisations. It offers a BSc with tuition fees of INR 5.8 Lakh for 4 years. For BSc, the tuition fee for a 4-year programme is INR 12 Lakh . Apart from the tuition fees, the fee structure involves various other components such as hostel fees and one-time fees. Therefore after including the hostel fees, the total amount of BDes is INR 19.06 Lakh- INR 20 Lakh . Whereas, for BSc, the total tuition fee is INR 13.8 Lakh.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Hostel and Dining for boys and girls
Library with national and international editions
Labs, shop floor for honing skills

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design.
reviews.review_text: Various labs like the CAD lab, drawing studio, illustration and graphic design studio, photography studio, model making studio, furniture working studio, lighting studio, and many other labs and studios are there to help students learn better and earn real industry experience.

reviews.review_heading: It is shaping the future of students for creative excellence.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is modern and enhances the learning experience for students. The hostel provides food, laundry, a TV room, a study room, cleaning staff members, and thoughtful design to support academic, creative, and extracurricular needs for students who are doing the design course.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely fully satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are the best. We have got the best infrastructure that I haven't seen before. We have the best PCs in our labs and the best Wi-Fi. I don't live in a hostel but I can say that there is good hygiene and better food too. There are different clubs for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Students can culminate their vision here.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food can be better. The canteen is very lively and there are limited sports facilities. The library is very lively and has a lovely atmosphere. The infrastructure is very comforting overall.

reviews.review_heading: It provides empowering minds and an inspiring future.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is decent with a hygienic environment. There are maids who clean our rooms every day. There are guards on every floor for safety or to provide help whenever needed. The hostel has games to pass our time but sometimes there are water issues.

reviews.review_heading: It provides the best experience. It has the best faculty members, friends, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is best in the college. Every floor has a good interior and comfortable nature. It provides the hostel facilities with good faculty members. The hostel has full infrastructure in it. I stay in the hostel. I had the best experience.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with the best staff and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are two girls' hostels on the college campus with great security. The infrastructure of both hostels is good. The atmosphere around is also good. The meal is provided on time. Good quality water is provided. The electricity is good too. It is very neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with the best staff members and the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in college. Every floor has a new interior and is comfortable. It also provides a hostel facility and it gives us all the infrastructure in them. I personally stay in the hostel, and it is the best one. Water supply, food supply, and electricity are the best.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very cozy lobby area for the students to sit and take a breath, along with clean and hygienic washrooms on every single floor that are cleaned regularly. We also have water coolers with pure water on every floor. The canteen also has clean, healthy, and tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for designing in the country.
reviews.review_text: The college is really great and top of the line. It really offers a great studying environment for us which helps us concentrate on our art to improve it more. It has new generation monitors and PCs for us to use the software to learn more about new-gen AI.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good modern infrastructure and is equipped with modern machines and classrooms with lockers to store stuff security. The whole campus is guarded with security cameras and guards for students' safety. The college has a good clean canteen.

reviews.review_heading: There are good placements in 2025 and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I am a student of Bachelor of Science in Animation, VFX, and Multimedia, and this course offers 4 years of learning. The college has modern infrastructure, which includes labs, smart classrooms, auditoriums, etc. The hostel includes mess food and rooms with a table, a wardrobe, and a balcony.

reviews.review_heading: Think analytical and think creatively.
reviews.review_text: The college has a vibrant, attractive infrastructure that makes us feel like our college has the best infrastructure in Pune. We're provided with all the necessities and we're free to use the high-tech CAD labs. Plus, the classroom has a cosy atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: Perfect blend of skill enhancement and campus life.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to quality, DPU never compromises, and its hostel facilities are no exception. The hostel provides a homely environment with many facilities, such as a study room, gym, TV room, and free Wi-Fi for academic purposes. The hostel is also very clean, hygienic, and, most importantly, safe for girls. The hostel's facilities are a big reason why the majority of girls choose to stay in the on-campus hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides all the facilities with very good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college provides great infrastructure and facilities. They have a ceramic lab, a smart classroom, and a fashion lab. The hostel facilities are excellent too, including a gym, study room, and TV room. The hostel even provides Wi-Fi and indoor games such as foosball and table tennis.

data.description: Dr. DY Patil School of Design offers a vibrant and culturally intuned campus laid on the fabric of learning through experiences. The faculty and student body engage in establishing events and activities that promote practical knowledge. DPUSOD has various clubs and committees that organise fests, recreational activities and events that are cultural-centric. These events also become a breather for the students offering a break from mundane curriculum and lectures.

paragraphs: The total course fees for MDesign is INR 3.5 LPA. In addition to this, students must also pay other fees like eligibility fees, exam fees and study tour fees. Fees can be paid in various modes. Students can contact DY Patil School of Design for more details.

Yes, Dr. D.Y. Patil SOD offers scholarship to deserving and meritorious students. The college offers 30% schoalarship. The college offers BDes and BSc courses at the UG level. To be admitted to the Dr. D.Y. Patil SOD, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Students can also check detailed Dr. D. Y. Patil School of Design scholarship stats here.

Dr DY Patil School of Design offers BSc and BDes with various specialisations. It offers a BSc with tuition fees of INR 5.8 Lakh for 4 years. For BSc, the tuition fee for a 4-year programme is INR 12 Lakh. Apart from the tuition fees, the fee structure involves various other components such as hostel fees and one-time fees. Therefore after including the hostel fees, the total amount of BDes is INR 19.06 Lakh- INR 20 Lakh. Whereas, for BSc, the total tuition fee is INR 13.8 Lakh.

Dr. DY Patil School of Design BDes tuition fee for all the specialisations is INR 12 lakh. Additionally, the hostel fee is INR 8 lakh. Students have to pay the first semester fee or admission fee (As per the school) to confirm their seats after final selection. The total fee may include one-time components, such as security deposit. Further, it must be taken into account that the fee mentioned here is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

The Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Meerut flagship courses are MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., B.E. / B.Tech. Subharti University offers numerous courses at UG, PG, and Doctorate Level, Diploma, UG Diploma, and Certificate courses through 20+ departments. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Subharti University Meerut offers wide range of courses to choose from for the students. University offers courses in both regular & distance mode so that no students stay deprived of education. University ensures to offers quality of education to students. Students can choose from courses being offered in wide variety of streams. Students who complete their courses successfully also get skills & training to perform well directly in industry.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, SVSU conducts its own entrance examination - SNET, for admission into PhD programmes. Admission process for UG and PG programmes is entrance and merit based, with the university accepting NEET, CUET UG, CUET PG etc. scores for entrance based admissions.
faqs.question: Does Subharti University conduct its own entrance examination?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for each SVSU course is INR 1,500. Aspirants can pay the application fee in any of the online payment modes. Candidates applying offline for admission can pay the application in the form of DD. Aspirants need to pay DD  in favour of "Swami Vivekanand Subharti".
faqs.question: What is the application fee for SVSU?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for Subharti University MBBS is INR 53.3 lakh. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat in the university. The total fee of MBBS includes caution deposit, one-time fee and tuition fee. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to register for a course.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBBS at Subharti University?

faqs.answer: A:    There are a total of 180 seats for MBBS at Subharti University. Candidates can get a seat in MBBS course based on NEET score. The final selection will be based on entrance exam score and availability of seats. The exam is conducted once a year in offline or paper-pencil-based test (PBT) mode for three hours and 20 minutes or 200 minutes. As far as the NEET exam pattern is concerned, there are 200 questions from Physics, Chemistry and Biology, out of which 180 questions have to be attempted.

reviews_list.review_title: Subharti University is value for money.

review_content.Placements: Subharti University provides a broad range of graduate, post-graduate, and diploma courses. Here in Subharti the fee for all the courses is comparatively lower other private universities. There are 20 colleges on the 250 acres large campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college is best for medicine studies. Subharti University is recognised by UGC. I started my course BBA 2023, and this is the best for 1,10,000 fee. Subharti University provides broad range of graduate, post-graduate, and diploma courses. It has more than 250 acres of campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Practical and interactive learning. All the faculty are supportive of students. Good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: All the faculty are supportive of students. Good infrastructure. 55 to 60 percent students from my batch got placed. The highest package is close to 20 LPA while the average package remained between 3 to 3.5 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiters included Amazon, Infosys, HCL, Axis Bank, Bajaj Motors, Paytm and Flipkart. About 40 to 50 percent students received internships in IT companies, manufacturing firms and finance organizations with some converting into pre placement offers. The major roles offered are software developer, system engineer, data analyst, HR associate and business development executive.

faqs.answer: Subharti University admissions are currently open. The university has not specified a deadline for admission to SVSU. Candidates can get admission to SVSU based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exam score. The university offers admissions on the basis of the scores obtained in national-level entrance exams such as NEET and CUET-UG for admission to specific courses. Subharti University Entrance Test (SNET) is also conducted by the university for admission to several UG and PG courses.
faqs.question: Q: When do admissions close at Subharti University?

faqs.answer: Yes, SVSU conducts its own entrance examination - SNET, for admission into PhD programmes. Admission process for UG and PG programmes is entrance and merit based, with the university accepting NEET, CUET UG, CUET PG etc. scores for entrance based admissions.
faqs.question: Q: Does Subharti University conduct its own entrance examination?

faqs.answer: Yes, SVSU does grant direct admissions to candidates under the Management Quota. However, for all other categories, the university has an entrance and merit based admission process. The university has limited seats for direct admission under management quota and candidates are advised to apply as soon as admissions open.
faqs.question: Q: Is there any provision of direct admission to SVSU?

faqs.answer: Yes SVSU does offer distance learning courses to its students. These courses are approved by the Directorate of Distance Education. Applications for the same are also accepted strictly in the online mode. Admission to distance learing courses are both merit and entrance based.

course_faqs.question: Is Subharti University good for MBBS?
course_faqs.answer: MBBS is one of the popular courses offered by Subharti University. The university offers a 4.5-year MBBS programme including one-year internship. Looking at the placement data, MBBS students have got excellent opportunities. According to Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Meerut NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Subharti University MBBS placements 2022 stood at INR 7 LPA. There was a rise of over 16% in the MBBS median package offered in 2022 as compared with 2021.

course_faqs.question: Is MBBS available at Subharti University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Swami Vivekanand Subharti University offers 4.5 year MBBS course including one-year internship. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for the SVSU MBBS course. Admission to MBBS course is based on NEET score.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBBS at Subharti University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Subharti University MBBS is INR 53.3 lakh. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to register for a course.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for SVSU?

Candidates applying offline for admission can pay the application in the form of DD. Aspirants need to pay DD in favour of "Swami Vivekanand Subharti".

review_summary.college_name: SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Totally satisfied with best faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Top recruiters are Apollo Hospital, Lok Priya Hospital, and Subharti Hospital. Sports physiotherapist is the top role offered in our course. My batch is 2022 and it completes in 2026. Around 60 percent of students get placement. All students of my batch get internships in Subharti Hospital and Lok Priya Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms in my college are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and a library. The hostel infrastructure and environment are friendly. The food in the mess is good and hygienic, though not like home. Good medical facilities are available for students, along with some discounts on medical treatment.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Swami Vivekanand Subharti University.

content.Placements: Placement in our course was extremely decent, it was about 70%. The highest package offered in our course was 24 LPA. The average package was around 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Axis Bank, ICICI Prudential, Tata AIA Insurance, etc. Around 70% of students got internship offers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi was available on the campus. Library and study center were very good. Quality of hostel was also good. Mess and canteen food were tasty. There was limited medical facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Subharti University is value for money.

content.Placements: Subharti University provides a broad range of graduate, post-graduate, and diploma courses. Here in Subharti the fee for all the courses is comparatively lower other private universities. There are 20 colleges on the 250 acres large campus.
content.Infrastructure: This college is best for medicine studies. Subharti University is recognised by UGC. I started my course BBA 2023, and this is the best for 1,10,000 fee. Subharti University provides broad range of graduate, post-graduate, and diploma courses. It has more than 250 acres of campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Practical and interactive learning. All the faculty are supportive of students. Good infrastructure.

content.Placements: All the faculty are supportive of students. Good infrastructure. 55 to 60 percent students from my batch got placed. The highest package is close to 20 LPA while the average package remained between 3 to 3.5 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiters included Amazon, Infosys, HCL, Axis Bank, Bajaj Motors, Paytm and Flipkart. About 40 to 50 percent students received internships in IT companies, manufacturing firms and finance organizations with some converting into pre placement offers. The major roles offered are software developer, system engineer, data analyst, HR associate and business development executive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Well-qualified faculty members, lush green campus. Placement is a little dissatisfied.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is 20%. The highest package is 5 LPA, the average package is 3 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Most companies are small startups from Noida, Ghaziabad, Meerut, and Gurugram that come for placements. Roles include support engineer, sales, customer support, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good. More than 300 computers in the engineering college. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library, but in the hostel, you have to pay. The library is big and has a good selection of books. Regarding the hostel, there are many hostels. VHR hostel campus offers good food, and all hostels have a good environment for studying. All facilities in the hostels are really good.

admission_overview.college_name: SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Admission 2026: Application Process, Eligibility & Fees

admission_overview.title: Subharti University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Subharti University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as NEET and CUET-UG for admission to specific courses. SVSU conducts Subharti University Entrance Test (SNET) for admission to various UG and PG courses. SUET is an entrance exam conducted by the university for PhD course. Subharti University offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG, doctoral, diploma and certificate levels at campus and through affiliated colleges. The university also offers courses in distance education mode through the Directorate of Distance Education. Applications are accepted strictly in the online mode. SVSU offers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Arts, etc. through a number of faculties. Some popular programmes include MBBS, MBA, BPEd etc. Read on to know more about Subharti University admission process, eligibility,fees, cutoff etc.

eligibility_selection.title: Subharti University Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: SVSU admissions are either based on national or university-level entrance exams or merit in the last qualifying exam. The university offers direct admission to candidates under the Management Quota. The fee for Management Quota candidates will be different from the regular one. Check below top Subharti University courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)
Class 12 with at least 45%-60% aggregate

faqs.answer: The selection criteria for MBA at SVSU is entrance based with the university accepting SNET and CUET PG scores for the same. The minimum eligibility is passing Class 12 in any stream with atleast 45% aggregate. The minimum eligibility requirement must be met for the course before applying for admission to the same.
faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for MBA at SVSU?

faqs.answer: The minimum eligibility requirement for SVSU is passing Class 12 in PCB stream with at-least 50% aggregate. The selection criteria is entrance based with the university accepting NEET UG scores for the same. Make sure that candidate holds valid NEET UG scores during or before applying for admission to the same.
faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility for MBBS at SVSU?

faqs.answer: Yes, SVSU does grant direct admissions to candidates under the Management Quota. However, for all other categories, the university has an entrance and merit based admission process. The university has limited seats for direct admission under management quota and candidates are advised to apply as soon as admissions open.
faqs.question: Is there any provision of direct admission to SVSU?

faqs.answer: SVSU accepts NEET score for admission to MBBS course. Below is NEET cutoff of past two years for Subharti University MBBS:Course20212022Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS)129417518379
faqs.question: What is the MBBS cutoff at SVSU?

paragraphs: Subharti University admissions begin with registration for a course. Candidates are then further selected based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Check below steps to get admission to SVSU:

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online or download the application form and submit it in campus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to apply for a course. Aspirants applying online can pay fee via any of the online payment modes. For offline submission, aspirants must send a demand draft for fee payment.

Once the registration process is over, the university shortlists candidates based onSNET examor merit in the last qualifying exam. For MBBS, SVSU acceptsNEETscore for admission. Besides, SVSU also selects candidates for some of the UG courses based onCUET-UGor CUET-PG for PG programmes. The university might also conduct personal interview round for some of the programmes.

Afte the selection process is complete, shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Once the documents are verified, candidates are allotted seat in the university. Selected aspirants are then required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission.

Subharti University feesinclude multiple components such as one-time fees, caution deposit, tuition fees, etc. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university. The fee for admission through Management Quota is slightly higher than the regular one. Below are top Subharti University courses along with their fee and average package:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat intake for Subharti University varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in any of the SVSU courses by fulfilling both eligibility and selection criteria. In all admissions, whether through any entrance test or based on merit, the reservation policy for students of SC/ ST/ OBC categories (as per law) of that time and other eligibility criteria fixed by the university will apply. Check below Subharti University seat intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BPEd at SVSU?

faqs.question: What is the last date to submit the NEET 2025 application form?
faqs.answer: NEET 2025 application form was released on February 7, and the last date was March, 11.50 PM. NTA may reopen the NEET application window based on student requests or external factors. Along with the release of the NEET 2025 application form, NTA has announced the NEET 2025 exam date,  which was May 4.

faqs.question: When do admissions close at Subharti University?
faqs.answer: Subharti University admissions are currently open. The university has not specified a deadline for admission to SVSU. Candidates can get admission to SVSU based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exam score. The university offers admissions on the basis of the scores obtained in national-level entrance exams such as NEET and CUET-UG for admission to specific courses. Subharti University Entrance Test (SNET) is also conducted by the university for admission to several UG and PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Swami Vivekanand Subharti University?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekanand Subharti University admission process begins with registration. Aspirants can apply online or download the application form and pay the application fee ofINR 1,500to register for a course. For admission to most of the courses, aspirants need to qualify SNET or fulfil the merit requirements. Once selection process is over, aspirants are called for document verification and seat allotment. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I join Swami Vivekanad Subharti University directly?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekanad Subharti University offers direct admission underManagement Quota. Candidates who do not appear inSNETor do not qualify the same but are eligible for the selected programme can take direct admission through Management Quota. For regular admission, aspirants are required to either qualify SNET or fulfil the eligibiltiy criteria for the applied course.

faqs.question: How many seats are there for MBBS at SVSU?
faqs.answer: There are a total of180 seatsfor MBBS at Subharti University. Candidates can get a seat in MBBS course based on NEET score. The final selection will be based on entrance exam score and availability of seats. The exam is conducted once a year in offline or paper-pencil-based test (PBT) mode for three hours and 20 minutes or 200 minutes. As far as the NEET exam pattern is concerned, there are 200 questions from Physics, Chemistry and Biology, out of which 180 questions have to be attempted.

The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. outlook.description:
SVSU Meerut has been ranked well by the Outlook under the 'State Private University' category. Through the years, the Outlook rankings for SVSU Meerut indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, SVSU Meerut fell 3 ranks to #27 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are 14 hostels including 2 NRI hostels within the university campus. The hostels maintain strict timings of entry. All hostels have a resident warden and also a chief warden (girls/boys separate) for the proper management and care of the students. The hostels have facilities like air cooler/ air conditioner facility as per demand, 24x7 hot and cooled water supply, 24x7 power supply, free internet connectivity through Wi-Fi system, indoor games - TT, carom and chess, badminton and volleyball courts, television room and study room.

library.description: Swami Vivekanand Subharti University's library has a collection of more than 25000 books, 150 international, 250 national and 400 e-journals. It also has other aids, internet facilities and subscription to various e-journals. There is a huge projector room, a separate reading room and a seminar room for the learners. Learning CDs/DVDs and other audio-visual aids are also available for students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Hockey Field, Handball Field, Baseball Court, Volleyball Courts, Kabaddi Courts, Kho-kho Court, Table Tennis Room, Well-equipped Boxing Arena

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with best faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in my college are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and a library. The hostel infrastructure and environment are friendly. The food in the mess is good and hygienic, though not like home. Good medical facilities are available for students, along with some discounts on medical treatment.

reviews.review_heading: Swami Vivekanand Subharti University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi was available on the campus. Library and study center were very good. Quality of hostel was also good. Mess and canteen food were tasty. There was limited medical facility.

reviews.review_heading: Subharti University is value for money.
reviews.review_text: This college is best for medicine studies. Subharti University is recognised by UGC. I started my course BBA 2023, and this is the best for 1,10,000 fee. Subharti University provides broad range of graduate, post-graduate, and diploma courses. It has more than 250 acres of campus.

reviews.review_heading: Practical and interactive learning. All the faculty are supportive of students. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: With projectors, well equipped labs for all branches, rich library with thousands of books and journals and Wi-Fi facilities throughout the campus. The hostels are comfortable with AC and non AC options though the mess food can be improved. The canteen is good for snacks and meals, and the highlight is the on-campus hospital that ensures 24/7 medical support. Sports facilities are also impressive, with playgrounds, courts, indoor games, and a gym, making campus life

reviews.review_heading: Well-qualified faculty members, lush green campus. Placement is a little dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. More than 300 computers in the engineering college. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library, but in the hostel, you have to pay. The library is big and has a good selection of books. Regarding the hostel, there are many hostels. VHR hostel campus offers good food, and all hostels have a good environment for studying. All facilities in the hostels are really good.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is good but there are many rules that we have to follow others pay a fine.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay with smart board. There are many canteens on campus but mess food is not so good. Hostal rooms are small with 2 students in a room. Girls and boys hostels are different. Medical facilities are good but expensive. There are park and ground for sports, and gym is also available for hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is very supportive.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, like Wi-Fi facilities, classrooms are well organised, and even libraries are available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Food quality in mess is awesome as compared to various other private universities, but here you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure for both courses. The hostels include well-equipped classrooms, libraries, labs, recreational areas, and a comfortable, safe living environment with essential amenities. This includes hygienic washrooms, clean rooms, good food, recreational spaces, and 24/7 security in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: The environment and college location are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, with Wi-Fi access, well-organized classrooms, and libraries available with strong Wi-Fi connections. The food quality in the mess is excellent compared to various other private universities, but here, you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent and I like the management of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good like Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms are well-organised. Libraries are also available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Food quality in the mess is awesome as compared to various other private universities but here we will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Subharti University is very good and the hostel infrastructure is also very nice. Rooms are two-seater where we will get a bed, a study table, a chair and cupboard. There is also a study room, TV room, etc. Currently, there is no canteen. Mess food is also good, and it serves us sweet also.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and good teachers with knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. There are so many buildings for so many courses. Classrooms are good too, and so many books in library. There are so many games being conducted lately, and medical buildings also have good infrastructure. There are hostel facilities too, with good Wi-Fi and food.

reviews.review_heading: Some teachers are lovely, some are bad, best auditorium, average placement, overall good college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is good, but it has a limit on the number of connections, to the internet and sometimes it doesn’t load some sites that are helpful to us. Although, labs and classrooms are good. The food in the mess doesn't taste great, but the canteen food is good, but a little costly. Other things are good.

reviews.review_heading: Some teachers are lovely, some are bad, with good infrastructure, nice Labs, and a nice library.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is good, but it has a limit on the number of connections, to the internet and sometimes it doesn’t load certain sites that are helpful to us. Although, labs and classrooms are good. The food in the mess doesn't taste great, but the canteen food is good, but a little costly. Other things are good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is both an average and good college.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is good, but it has a limited internet network. Sometimes, it doesn't run on some sites that are helpful for us. Labs and classrooms are good. Food doesn't taste good in the mess. The canteen food is good but a little costly. Other things are good.
