college_info.college_name: SVSU - Swami Vivekanand Subharti University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Candidates pursuing any course at Subharti university can apply to the various scholarships offered at the university. Candidates can avail benefit of maximum 10% additional benefits even if from two categories. However, scholarships to Buddhist students is offered over and above the existing scholarships, students who are availing any other scholarship will still get its perks as additional 5% scholarship.

The application fee for each SVSU course is INR 1,500. Aspirants can pay the application fee in any of the online payment modes. Candidates applying offline for admission can pay the application in the form of DD. Aspirants need to pay DD  in favour of "Swami Vivekanand Subharti".
Yes, Subharti University does offer scholarships to the students of the university. Some of the scholarships offered are:
1.       Meritorious Scholarship: The scholars who does not have scholarships from any other government or private institution can apply for this scholarship.
2.     Scholarship to the child of a Martyr of Indian Defence Services including Indian Coast Guard
3.     Additional Scholarship: 5% additional scholarship to the following category students:
·       First relative of Indian Defence Services including Indian Coast Guard.
4. 10% scholarship to student belonging to Buddhism
5. Scholarship to the student belonging to family of Faculty of staff
Candidates can avail many other scholarships, as per the official website.

The total tuition fee for Subharti University MBBS is INR 53.3 lakh. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat in the university. The total fee of MBBS includes caution deposit, one-time fee and tuition fee. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to register for a course.

college_info.college_name: Wisdom School of Management for Distance Education: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Wisdom School of Management is a known Institute in field of higher education, located in Ghaziabad city of Uttar Pradesh. It was conceptualized as private institute in 2006. Wisdom School of Management offers 60 diverse courses for Degree. Wisdom School of Management is a well-known institution for UG and PG courses, These programs delivered by a highly experienced faculty. For those looking for premium education, St. Peter's College is the answer. They offer courses like Certificate, MCA, M.Com, UG Diploma, PG Diploma, MSW, Executive MBA/PGDM, BBA, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., M.E./M.Tech, B.Com, D.Pharma, BCA, B.E. / B.Tech with stream of Teaching & Education, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Business & Management Studies, Humanities & Social Sciences, Mass Communication & Media, Animation, Medicine & Health Sciences, Design, Science, Engineering. Wisdom School of Management gave you offer to gained expertize through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of Nursery Teacher Training (NTT). Courses offered by the Institute are in the fee range of INR 12,700-50,000. Institute has a well supported campus with facilities like Cafeteria, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Labs, Library, Sports Complex.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. The Wisdom School of Management for Distance Education course fee ranges between INR 12,700 to 50,000.

overview_faqs.question: What are salaries after BSc Animation?
overview_faqs.answer: Freshers in this industry can earn upto INR 2-4 LPA whereas experienced profesionals are offered INR 7-10 LPA. Individuals' earnings after completing a BSc in Animation curriculum are determined by a range of criteria. Animation students with less than a year of experience earn roughly INR 20,000 per month on average. Candidates with some experience can earn up to Rs. 50,000 per month. A five-year-experienced animator can expect to earn roughly INR 80,000 per month.

overview_faqs.question: What is the market value of BSc animation degree?
overview_faqs.answer: A BSc in Animation offers a strong foundation for a career in the following areas:Animation: 2D & 3D animation, character design, storyboardingGaming: Game design, concept art, 3D modeling, game animationVFX (Visual Effects): VFX artist, compositor, motion graphics designerOther Creative Fields: Graphic design, concept art for film/TV, web design (depending on program)The job market is competitive, but with strong skills and a good portfolio, you'll find opportunities in studios, production houses, advertising agencies, and more.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary of a fashion designer in India?
overview_faqs.answer: For an entry-level, the salary starts from INR 3.92 LPA. After having more than 10 years of experience depending upon your skill you can earn INR 30-35 LPA in India. Fashion Designers have lots of opportunities to work in big companies, foriegn countries, etc. However, it all depends upon the skill you have, how good you are in designing, and how is your creativity. I hope it will help. You can reach out to us for further queries.Thank You.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary of a BSc IT graduate?
overview_faqs.answer: BSc IT graduates can get an initial annual salary package between INR 3 LPA to Rs 6 LPA. Candidates with and BSc IT degree can get profiles such as Programmer, System Engineer, Software Engineer, Network Administrator, Hardware Engineer, Tester, and System Analyst.However, the salary you get also depends on your skills and expertise in a particular area or the company or location you choose to work for.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Media and Communication - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good-quality facilities and offers the best-quality teaching to the students.

review_content.Placements: At the college, placement opportunities were given to the students. Around 30–35% of the students gets placed at our college. The average package offered at the college was between 3 and 4 LPA. Many media and communication field companies visits the college for placements. The top roles offered were talent manager, agent, marketing, content creator, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Whistling Woods International has a good infrastructure. All the types of facilities, such as labs, libraries, canteens, Wi-Fi and other necessary facilities, were given to the students. The college has partnered with many hostels. Mess and canteen food were good to eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Screenwriting - Batch of 2021

review_summary.college_name: Whistling Woods International Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Media and Communication - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Learning beyond the classroom. The infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: I can state with confidence that the BBA in media and communication program is genuinely having a transformation for me. With packages ranging between 3.5 LPA and 9 LPA, the average is 5.5 LPA for my batch. 80-90 percent of our batch was placed. While many of my peers were selected in reputed companies like Viacom, Disney, and NDTV. A Media Planner, social media, and public relations job was offered. I really thank you for giving such industry exposure and for giving such practical knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Whistling Wood International offers top-notch faculty members. The labs and media labs have all that is needed for a learning experience, and classrooms are clean and equipped with wi-fi, a projector, and audiovisual aids. The library is an ideal place for me. Medical services are also available in college. The hostel and canteen are also good. The campus provides a balanced and enjoyable experience by promoting cultural fests and sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Design  - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Amazing infrastructure, experienced faculty members, and more than enough opportunities.

content.Placements: There's a full guarantee of placements as students generally get recruited at the same places where they do internships. Internships are offered in big fashion brands and designers like Manish Malhotra, Anita Dongre, etc. Students get to work closely with these designers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are amazing with every hi-tech upto date software and equipment. We have a big library with almost every book and every movie/series you need on cassette tapes. There are Wi-Fi facilities and big equipped classrooms for each department. There's more than one eatery on campus, which gives a lot of food options.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Media and Communication - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has good-quality facilities and offers the best-quality teaching to the students.

content.Placements: At the college, placement opportunities were given to the students. Around 30–35% of the students gets placed at our college. The average package offered at the college was between 3 and 4 LPA. Many media and communication field companies visits the college for placements. The top roles offered were talent manager, agent, marketing, content creator, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Whistling Woods International has a good infrastructure. All the types of facilities, such as labs, libraries, canteens, Wi-Fi and other necessary facilities, were given to the students. The college has partnered with many hostels. Mess and canteen food were good to eat.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Screenwriting - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in terms of course and academic content. You get to learn a lot.

content.Placements: The percentage of the students that get placed every year from our campus is around 90 to 95%. Almost all the companies come here for recruitment. The college takes responsibility of providing internship opportunities as well to the students of the college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. It is located in the prime location of Mumbai making it the most famous and powerful college in the region, and it is famous since it is backed by TISS. The facilities provided in the hostel are satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Media and Entertainment - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Best college for MBA in media.

content.Placements: The college is great in terms of providing internship and placement opportunities. Since its curriculum is designed by TISS, most of the subjects and course content comes from there. Overall 90% of the students from the college get placed on yearly basis.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and the infrastructure of the college are good. The college has good amenities in its premises as well as the hostel facility where the students and few staff reside. The food quality in the mess is good and there is also an option of canteen.

admission_overview.description: Whistling Woods International admission 2026 to all the courses is entrance-based. Whistling Woods International offers UG, PG, and diploma courses. The courses are offered in the fields of Acting, Animation, Cinematography, etc. To enrol for admission at WWI, candidates must appear for the entrance exam called WWI (MECAT + CAT + SOP and PI). The institute offers courses in affiliation with TISS. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, and admission process of Whistling Woods International.

eligibility_selection.title: Whistling Woods International Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Whistling Woods International admission criteria is a mix of both merit and entrance. The college considers merit secured in the qualification exam as well as the performance of the candidates in the entrance test conducted by the institute (WWI Entrance Exam). However, the candidates are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to appear for the entrance exam. Students must secure at least 50% in the WWI exam to be eligible for admission into any of the offered courses. The entrance exam consists of multiple stages i.e., MECAT (Media & Communication Aptitude Test), Creative Aptitude Test (CAT), and Personal Interview (PI). faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Whistling Woods International?
faqs.answer: Whistling Woods International (WWI) in Mumbai has a placement rate of 83% for MBA students. The median package offered for MBA placements in 2022 was INR 7 LPA. The highest package offered was INR 8 LPA. WWI has a good reputation for quality education and many recruiters approach the institute for good candidates. More than 2,500 alumni are working in the Media & Entertainment industry.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered to MBA students during the recent placement drive?
faqs.answer: Many top companies participated in the WWI Mumbai MBA placements . The highest and average package offered to MBA candidates was INR 5 LPA and INR 4.24 LPA , respectively. WWI MBA Events the highest package was INR 4.8 LPA . Some of the companies that made offers were Zee5, JioHotstar, and Nadiadwala Grandsons.

The article below covers all the information around Whistling Woods rankings:

Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

hostel_campus.college_name: Whistling Woods International Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel- WWI has partnered with 'YourSpace', for providing accommodation to students. The accommodation is close to the campus and facilities like bus shuttle, food, laundry, wifi, security etc. are provided.

library.description: Library- The WWI library is equipped with the enough content to satisfy the students' learning needs.
Library- The WWI library is equipped with the enough content to satisfy the students' learning needs.

cafeteria.description: 40 Classrooms- acoustically paneled with projection & audio system

hostel.description: Hostel- WWI has partnered with 'YourSpace', for providing accommodation to students. The accommodation is close to the campus and facilities like bus shuttle, food, laundry, wifi, security etc. are provided.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Sound Lab, Video Lab, WWI Foxconn Media Lab, WWI Jio Virtual Reality Lab

reviews.review_heading: Learning beyond the classroom. The infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Whistling Wood International offers top-notch faculty members. The labs and media labs have all that is needed for a learning experience, and classrooms are clean and equipped with wi-fi, a projector, and audiovisual aids. The library is an ideal place for me. Medical services are also available in college. The hostel and canteen are also good. The campus provides a balanced and enjoyable experience by promoting cultural fests and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing infrastructure, experienced faculty members, and more than enough opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are amazing with every hi-tech upto date software and equipment. We have a big library with almost every book and every movie/series you need on cassette tapes. There are Wi-Fi facilities and big equipped classrooms for each department. There's more than one eatery on campus, which gives a lot of food options.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good-quality facilities and offers the best-quality teaching to the students.
reviews.review_text: Whistling Woods International has a good infrastructure. All the types of facilities, such as labs, libraries, canteens, Wi-Fi and other necessary facilities, were given to the students. The college has partnered with many hostels. Mess and canteen food were good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in terms of course and academic content. You get to learn a lot.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. It is located in the prime location of Mumbai making it the most famous and powerful college in the region, and it is famous since it is backed by TISS. The facilities provided in the hostel are satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for MBA in media.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure of the college are good. The college has good amenities in its premises as well as the hostel facility where the students and few staff reside. The food quality in the mess is good and there is also an option of canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college students get very good experience.
reviews.review_text: Great actors like Shahrukh Khan, Siddharth Malhotra, and many more visited our college to guide students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best film institute.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides great infrastructure, good equipment and an excellent hands-on practical course. There is no hostel in our college and also outside.

reviews.review_heading: The holistic approach of the course makes the students ready for their future in this industry.
reviews.review_text: The campus is amazing. Many ad and films are shot in the campus itself due to its beauty. You can enjoy your lunch with hills in front of you. Although the college doesn't have a hostel as it is located in the middle of the film city but there are PGs nearby which are very affordable and great.

reviews.review_heading: It is a perfect film school environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is superb. It is the best place to study, enjoy and even shoot. You cannot find a college like this in Mumbai. It is a good place in terms of infrastructure. Lots of shoots also happen in college with a good graphite and film posters all around the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A full simulation of all the aspects of film making.
reviews.review_text: It is a sprawling campus with friendly faculty members. There is a state of the art equipment for filmmaking aspirants to practice. They provide plenty of opportunities for hands-on training. This is a vocational institute, so all the equipment, labs, etc., are fully functional. Apart from that, there are many opportunities for recreation such as music labs, prayer rooms for meditation, three clean and lively cafeterias and many food stalls. Frequently, events are also organised for the students...

reviews.review_heading: Film making is a habit then this is the place.
reviews.review_text: The college provides almost all the necessary things and also the high tech things which are required by the student for their proper education. All the classes are smart, the campus is fully air conditioned and is fully accessible to Wi-Fi. The canteen is one the best.

reviews.review_heading: Do what you love. This is the college's motto.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. The college has India's youtube space, foxconn lab, sony sound studio and many other facilities. Wi-Fi, canteen, CCD. There are no hostels. There is also 5th veda that happens every Thursday, which brings you the celebrities from the film industry.

reviews.review_heading: Top class facilities and courses are available.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is top class. We have Wi-Fi in every spot on our campus. Classrooms are huge, and AC is provided in every classroom. Medical and emergency facilities are also top class. Classrooms are well cleaned and arranged. Food available in the canteen is average. We don't have hostel facilities. The only problem I faced was to find a place to live. The college doesn't provide hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Whistling Woods International is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is really good. There are Wi-Fi zones for the students. Emergency medical facilities are available here. Labs and other things are well maintained. The canteen here is good. There are two canteens in this campus. Hostel rooms are not available here.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges which offers this kind of course in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: There is no problem with the internet facility here. There is a high-speed internet facility in every classroom. Classrooms are air-conditioned with the control present in close proximity, and tables and chairs are of high quality and cleaned every day. The library is pretty good with a plethora of books, novels, comics and movies to choose from. The canteen is spacious and clean. Food served to the students is very good and a bit expensive, but that is fine as there are a variety of food items.

data.description: Yes, Whistling Woods International operates on a semester system for its BBA programme. An academic year is structured into two semesters of six months each. Students generally take a defined set of courses during a semester. This full-time programme is divided over eight semesters. Furthermore, this full-time, four-year programme is available at the undergraduate level.

college_info.intro:
Among the different courses at SRM University a few stand out as the flagship programmes of the institute being its BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) and MBA programmes.
SRMIST University Kattankulathur Tamil Nadu is also known for its MBA programme, with state-of-the-art facilities and experienced faculty. The SRMIST MBA programme is extended for a duration of two years across a range of specialisations, some of which are shown here:
Another particular popular course choice are the Health Science programmes which are extended in the UG, PG, and Post-PG levels under a number of specialisations such as Pharmacy, Physiotherapy, Public Health, etc. Interested students can learn more about SRMIST Kattankulathur and its MSc programme below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SRM University extends a range of UG, PG and PhD level courses across the streams of Engineering, Management, Medicine & Health Sciences, Science, Humanities, Law, etc. with BTech, BArch, BCA, BCom, etc. at the UG level. The SRM University Kattankulathur BTech programme is extended across a range of specialisations including:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, SRM University offers direct admission to certain programs to candidates who meet required eligibility criteria. The admission to these programs may include past academic performance, work experience, and other relevant factors.
faqs.question: Can a student join SRM IST without an entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    The deemed-to-be university accepts GATE score for M.Tech admission. However, aspirants who have not qualified GATE can also get admission to M.Tech course by qualifying SRMJEEE (PG) conducted by the university. SRM will conduct SRMJEEE in two phases. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to attend the counselling and document verification round. Only after the payment of course fee, admission is confirmed in the university.
faqs.question: Is GATE required for M.Tech admission at SRM Institute of Technology Kattankulathur?

faqs.answer: A:    The university fee structure is cumulative of several components, such as caution deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. A few of these components are one-time payable, while some have are charged annually/semesterly. SRM IST Chennai MBA tuition fee ranges between INR 1.9 Lacs and INR 11.5 lakh. Moreover, the one-time fee range between INR 1,200 and INR 11,000 and the hostel charges range between INR 1.45 Lacs and INR 3.3 lakh.The fee mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee for SRM University MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    SRM Institute of Science and Technology admission is entrance-based for most of the courses. The Institute accepts national-level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, TANCET, NATA, SRMJEEE, SRMJEEM etc. for admission to MBA, BArch, BTech, M.Tech and other courses. Offering more than 80 courses and providing an annual intake of 52 K+, SRM IST offers admission based on the counselling through SRMJEEE e-counselling. To conclude, it is not very difficult to seek admission at SRM IST.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for SRM University MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The university fee structure is cumulative of several components, such as caution deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. A few of these components are one-time payable, while some have are charged annually/semesterly. SRM IST Chennai MBA tuition fee ranges between INR 1.9 Lacs and INR 11.5 lakh. Moreover, the one-time fee range between INR 1,200 and INR 11,000 and the hostel charges range between INR 1.45 Lacs and INR 3.3 lakh.The fee mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee in SRM University, Chennai?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM University Chennai offers various UG & PG courses in the streams of Management, Engineering, Law, Education, Commerce, etc. The fee for all the courses may vary as per the course type, duration and specialisation a student may choose. Further, SRM University course fees may include various components such as tuition fees, registration fees, security deposit and more. Check out the following table for course-wise tuition fees offered at SRM University:CourseTuition Fee*MBAINR 60,000 - INR 8 lakhBTechINR 4 lakh - INR 18 lakhMTechINR 3.2 lakh - INR 17.5 lakhMCAINR 1.5 lakh - INR 2.2 lakhBCAINR 1.3 lakh - INR 2.9 lakhPhDINR 6 lakh*The above-mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. Hence, is indicative. Also, the given fee range is inclusive of the course fees at the affiliated colleges.

overview_faqs.question: Is the SRM fee refundable?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM IST fee refund policy is based on UGC guidelines. Candidates get full refund at any time between the academic year of admission. Candidates are required to submit an application form signed by them t and their parent in person or online for refund. Candidates get refund to their bank provided in the refund request form. The refund will be processed by RTGS or NEFT.

overview_faqs.answer: SRM Institute of Science and Technology BTech fees has multiple components, like tuition fee, security deposit, & more. The UG level programme are available with the tuition fees of INR 11 lakh to INR 23.8 lakh. The mentioned fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Lovely days at my college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very vague, as a lot of students opt out of placements because of their CGPA, and they are not considered for placement. If you are an average student, you can get around 6 to 7 LPA if you maintain your CGPA. Companies like Wipro and L&T are the top recruiters. For internships, you have to secure them yourself, as the college gives almost zero support.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE, as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. The library is also pretty good, with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best and excellent college.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students got internship. 85 percent of students got placed. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Google, and Microsoft. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The top roles are project manager and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in our college. The classrooms are neat and clean with comfortable benches. The washrooms are neat and clean. The labs are good. The books are available in the library. We have good Wi-Fi connection. The hostel facilities are good, and canteen is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Occupational Therapy (BOT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college is asia number one of tamilnadu.

content.Placements: 90 above and average package and recruitment process and global and IT value to improve ourselves and prepare for the course. The package level is based on experience and knowledge, companies only give higher level monthly salaries to those who are capable of working in the company. Many companies are offered in my college.
content.Infrastructure: Food is available in the hostel and is strictly maintained. Students have fixed discipline and are given time for breaks in the main canteen. There are many canteens in the college for food, and temples are also present on the campus, as it is a big college in Tamil Nadu SRM campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About good and enjoyable college.

content.Placements: From 7th semester, students become eligible for campus placements. Top companies are Amazon, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HUL, HCL, and so on. I got an offer in 2 companies, Infosys and Base Automation Technologies. The highest package is 51 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA to 5 LPA. 90% of people are easily getting placed, and have plans after getting the placements to work.
content.Infrastructure: The main thing I would like to mention here is library, over 4 lakhs books are placed in the library including IAS, IFS, IPS, central and state government aspirants can also use it. The gym is overall good. Campus timing is 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM, depending on the day of the order and departments. Security is very strict here so students can't do any unnecessary activities inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great campus life, Bad ROI.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very vague as a lot of students just opt out of placement because of their CGPA and they are not considered for placement. If you are an average student you can get around 6 to 7 LPA if you maintain your CGPA. Companies like Wipro and L&T are the top recruiters. Internship you have to secure at your college gives you almost zero support there.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and Classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. Library is also pretty good with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o clock so beware of that.

faqs.question: Does SRM Institute of Science and Technology accept CUET?

For UG courses, candidates must complete Class 12 and for PG courses, students must complete graduation. Candidates must also fill or attach their scorecard at the time of applying for the respective courses. The university provides direct admission to courses such as BA, BCom, MSc, etc., based on merit of Class 12. However, for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, BSc, etc., candidates have to also qualify for the entrance exam accepted for the particular courses.

paragraphs: SRM Institute of Technology admissionis a multi-step process. It starts with the release of the application form and concludes with seat allotment. SRM IST admission process can differ from course to course. Aspirants are advised to carefully check the course-specific selection procedure.
Check below the step-wise SRM University admission process:

The applications can be submitted online by visiting the official website atsrmist.edu.in. Students are required to submit a separate application for separate courses. The application fee for each course isINR 1,200.

SRM University accepts various national-level entrance test scores for admissions. It also conducts its own entrance tests, such as SRMJEEL, SRMJEEE and SRMJEEM. Further, the personal interview round is conducted for a few courses. Once all the rounds are completed, it releases an official merit list.

Once selection is done, students are called for the counselling process. In this process, students are allocated a seat in order of their rank and the availability of seats. Those who get a seat are required to participate in document verification process.

faqs.question: Does SRM University campus offers the BCA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Kattanlkulathur campus of SRMIST offers BCA programme. It is a three-year UG course. For admission to the programme, aspirants should have passed Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate. In addition, aspirant should have studied either of the mandatory subjects -Mathematics/Business Mathematics/Statistics/Allied Mathematics.The seat allotment is carried out based on merit in the last qualifying examination.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for BCA at SRM University Chennai?

Course commencement and orientation details are provided to the students by the institute.

faqs.question: Is it compulsory to have Maths to pursue BCA from SRM University Chennai?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying based on their Class 12 scores must have Maths or Business Mathematics/Statistics/Allied Mathematics. faqs.question: Is SRM Kattankulathur costly to study BTech?
faqs.answer: Being a private institute, SRM Kattankulathur offers several hostel facilities and basic amenities at a cost ranging from INR 1 Lakh to INR 2.5 Lakh. faqs.question: Can I join SRM without JEE?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get admission to BTech without JEE Main score. Admission to BTech course is only based on SRMJEEE score. Candidates are required to pass Class 12 with minimum 60% aggregate as per the minimum eligibility criteria. Further, aspirants must qualify for SRM JEE exam with a valid score. This exam is conducted in two phases. The application window for 2024 has started for both the phases. Find here theregistration details for SRM JEE exam.

faqs.question: How is BTech CSE in SRM University Kattankulathur?
faqs.answer: SRM University Kattankulathur offers BTech CSE course in a full-time mode. This course is offered across 56 sub-specialisations. The university offers MTech in Aerospace, Power Electronics & Drives, Computer Science and Engineering w/s Full stack, etc. The university also offers part-time BTech programme for three-years in Cloud Computing and Block Chain (empowered by Great Learning) , Cyber Security (empowered by Great Learning) and Structural Engineering. faqs.question: How can I join SRM University MTech course?
faqs.answer: The deemed-to-be university accepts GATE score for admission to M.Tech course. However, aspirants who have not qualified GATE can also get admission to M.Tech course by qualifying SRMJEEE (PG) conducted by the university. SRM Institute of Technology Kattankulathur will conduct SRMJEEE in two phases. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to attend the counselling and document verification round. Only after the payment of course fee, admission is confirmed in the university.

faqs.question: What is the M.Tech fee at SRM Kattankulathur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for SRM IST M.Tech is INR 3.20 Lacs - INR 17.50 lakh. The fee also includes the integrated MBA fees. Candidates need to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds.However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Final-year students of UG degrees are also eligible to apply.

faqs.question: How is SRM University Chennai for an MBA?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the top courses of SRM Institute of Technology Kattankulathur. SRM was ranked #102 in Business Today in 2023 and 8 in Outlook-ICARE 2022 as India's top private MBA institutions in South Zone. The universities is ranked at no. 5 under top Business Schools of Eminence by Competition Success. MBA course at SRM is available in multiple specialisations like Business Analytics, Health Care & Hospital Management, etc. for students to get deep knowledge in the area of their interest. After

faqs.question: How can I get admission to SRM IST Chennai MBA course?
faqs.answer: Admission to MBA course is based on CAT/SAT/MAT/CMAT/NMAT/TANCET/GMAT score. Candidates who have not qualified any of the accepted entrance exam can appear for SRMJEEM. Further, shortlisted aspirants need to pass personal interview round conducted by the university. Further, shortlisted candidates are called for counselling and document verification. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Can the SRMJEEE counselling fees be paid in cash?
faqs.answer: No, candidates must pay all fees online or by DD. No cash payment is allowed for the counselling process. The candidates who qualify for SRMJEEE must appear for the counselling rounds with their documents for verification. SRMIST is conducting the counselling online. For online counselling, candidates are informed the details through email or text messages. To participate in SRMJEEE counselling in online mode (SRM counselling), candidates have to register and pay the required fee.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to SRM IST Chennai MBA course?
faqs.answer: Admission to MBA course is based on CAT/SAT/MAT/CMAT/NMAT/TANCET/GMAT score. Candidates who have not qualified any of the accepted entrance exam can appear for SRMJEEM. Further, shortlisted aspirants need to pass personal interview round conducted by the university. Further, shortlisted candidates are called for counselling and document verification. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Can the SRMJEEE counselling fees be paid in cash?
faqs.answer: No, candidates must pay all fees online or by DD. No cash payment is allowed for the counselling process. The candidates who qualify for SRMJEEE must appear for the counselling rounds with their documents for verification. SRMIST is conducting the counselling online. For online counselling, candidates are informed the details through email or text messages. To participate in SRMJEEE counselling in online mode (SRM counselling), candidates have to register and pay the required fee.

faqs.question: Does SRM Institute of Technology Kattankulathur offer online MBA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, SRM IST Chennai offers an online MBA course. It is a two-year programme divided into four semesters. SRM online MBA admission is done based on CAT/MAT/GMAT/GRE score. The selected candidates are called for personal interview round. To be eligible for the online course, aspirants must hold a valid bachelor's degree with a minimum aggregate. Moreover, the course aspirants with work experience and having qualified in either of the accepted exams are exempted from the university entrance test.

faqs.question: What is the expected NEET cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission must have a valid NEET score to be eligible for the admissions. As per theSRM University NEET cutoff 2024, the last-round MBBS and BDS courses stood at195886and338076for admission to SRM University for the General category students in the All India quota. So, the assumed expected cutoff for the upcoming admission session 2025 can be stood between200000and400000for the General AI category candidates. Although, it is an estimated guess and the NEET cutoff is subject to many factors such as competition, difficulty level of the exam, and previous year trend.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.A admissions at SRM Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination from a recognised board can apply. However, the qualifying examination should have been passed with a minimum of 50% aggregate. The eligible candidates can visit the official website to apply. Aspirants must hold the pass certificate and mark sheet as well. These documents have to be submitted at the time form filling. SRM IST uses these documents to verify the details mentioned in the application form.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to SRM Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: SRM Institute of Science and Technology admission is a multi-step process. Check out the pointers below for more details:Application:Aspirants can apply at the official website. The application fee cost is INR 1,200.Selection:SRM ISTconducts its own entrance exam, such as SRMJEEE, SRMJEEM and SRMJEEL, for admission to courses, like MBA, BTech, BA LLB (Hons), etc. SRM also accepts national-level entrance exams. Further, a PI round is conducted for a few courses.Counselling & Admission Confirmation:Shortlisted candidates are further called for document verification. In the final round, students can pay the admission fee.

nirf.description:
SRM Institute of Science and Technology has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SRM Institute of Science and Technology indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. SRM Institute of Science and Technology's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 11 ranks to #21 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 6 ranks to #12 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 15 ranks to #13 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 4 ranks to #11 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

hostel_campus.college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: SRM University has 14 blocks for boys and 7 blocks for girls. All the hostels have hi speed Wi-Fi connectivity and are provided with solar water have heating systems, mineral water supply, water cooler in each floor, generator power supply.Students are offered with healthy and sumptuous food options at highly subsidized rates and can choose to have North Indian or South Indian menu in the dining halls that are co-located. the hostels also offer a multi-cuisine dining facility providing Thai, Chinese and continental food for the benefit of our international students,.Rooms with single cot ,study table & chair, cupboard & common mirror are available. Most hostels have common washrooms, a few blocks are available with attached bath and AC rooms too. Facilities such as gym, prayer halls, games, sports and cultural activities has been facilitated. 3 International hostels with modernized kitchen,library,drinking water, water heater, telephone,power supply, medical care, recreation,stationery shop, laundry point, gym, playground, indoor games, banking facility, a/c dining hall, a/c study hall and one off campus international hostel is also available.
facilities: College Infrastructure: SRM has a well-defined layout in terms of infrastructure. The campus is spread over a large area, with all the basic facilities provided. There are huge grounds and indoor courts for sports; the gymnasium is made for the students of the college. The library is technically advanced and has a good collection of books. The classrooms are well maintained with smart boards installed, and the washrooms are clean. The canteen has diverse varieties of food that are hygienic and affordable.

Academics: CSE has proven to be a good course for me as it aligns with my interests and liking for computers and programming. The course is well updated, and even the curricula followed in college fall in line with the skills required in the job sector. The course has a lot of research and practicality, which definitely makes one job-ready. The teachers are cooperative and experienced, and they mentor each student at every point.

Placements: Approximately 70% of the students get hired in the recruitment drive held by the college. The placement drive is held in the most efficient manner. The average package is around 5 LPA, which is a good kickstart for any student in their respective fields. The college has a placement cell that is responsible for inviting firms to the college and guiding fellow students in getting placed, hence making the college supportive. The placements must be inclusive of all the courses, which is a demerit.

Value-for-money: The annual tuition fee structure was a bit on the expensive side, as my yearly fee was around 3 lacs p/a, which might not be affordable for many students. But the quality of services and education, with all the basic amenities, make SRM worth the investment. Personally, SRM is making each penny count.

Campus Life: Though the college is isolated from the main part of the city, it is glorious from the inside. There are sports activities in the college and many cultural societies, like dance and music societies. Moreover, there are various clubs that keep on participating in educational competitions. Various seminars are held and several festivals are conducted throughout the year, making college life happen. There's a medical room to handle any emergency as and when it arises!

library.description: The university library is fully air conditioned 15 storey building comprises a rich collection of books covering various branches of Engineering and Technology, Medical and Health Sciences and Science and Humanities. The library has stocked 140518 volumes of books consisting of 61289 titles. The collection also includes 1550 handbooks & 200 encyclopedias. Back volume is about 4105.  8235 above project thesis. 781 standards which include BIS, ISA & IEEE. Around 5938 books CDs, 2710 journal CDs, 25 encyclopedia on CDs, 20 self learning tutorials, 850 video programs are available in the library.Cumulative database of nearly 2.52 lakh records covering the period from 1990 - 1999 are available. The library building is fully air-conditioned and automated. Photocopy facility is available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Lovely days at my college.

Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Manipal University are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at UG and PG levels. These courses are offered to students in full-time mode and in several specialisations. Some of the popular specialisations offered under BTech and MBA are Mechatronics, Aeronautical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Marketing, Finance, Human Resources Management, etc.
Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. MAHE courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at MAHE Manipal in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
MAHE Manipal offers a wide range of programmes at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. The university offers these programmes across several specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, International Business, Biotechnology, Marketing, Nursing, Physics, Banking, Business Analytics, Insurance, Mechatronics, and many more.

At the UG level, the Manipal Academy of Higher Studies offers BTech, BSc, BBA, BCA, BDS, BPT, BDes, BArch, and other courses to students. overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Manipal University?
overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee for a four-year UG course of BTech at Manipal University ranges from INR 8.1 lakh- INR 14 lakh. It includes the fee for all BTech specialisations. Those who get direct admission to second year of BTech through Later Entry programme are required to pay between INR 9.42 Lacs - INR 13.48 lakh. However, this fee is taken from the official sources and is subjective. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Manipal University BTech fee.

overview_faqs.question: What is the entrance examination fee for admission to B.A course at Manipal Academy of Higher Education?
overview_faqs.answer: For admission to BA in Culinary Arts at Manipal Academy of Higher Education, students require a Manipal Entrance Test (MET) score. The institute conducts this entrance examination for admission to various undergraduate courses offered at Manipal Academy of Higher Education. To appear in MET, candidates are required to pay INR 1400. Entrance examination fees are different from application fees. However, both the application fees and examination fees are non-refundable.

overview_faqs.question: Is there any fee portal at Manipal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Manipal University has an online fee payment portal. The university offers one platform for candidates to check any course fees. Candidates need to visit the official website of Manipal University and click on the fee tab to access the portal. Atudents can choose the courses they want to enroll. It will redirect candidates to course fee structure page.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Manipal University (MAHE)?
overview_faqs.answer: Though fee refund policy of MAHE is based on UGC Refund Policy, however, if students withdraw their application before 15 days of class commencement, full paid hostel fees will be refunded. If student withdraws after class commencement then INR 15000 will be deducted from hostel fee and remaining amount will be returned to student.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. It has good faculty members and facilities.

content.Placements: MSAP placements are existent but limited. It is offered to only the best students of the batch for the Bachelor of Architecture. It has a very active aluminium community that recruits students on behalf of their firms. Out of the selective group of students, a fair number of students do get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch with smartboards for education, highly equipped printing labs, 3d printing labs, VR labs, a library with all the books we need, auditoriums, work studios, a building materials lab, survey labs, good Wi-Fi, and classrooms with plenty of light, air, and charging points. Hostels are well-maintained and standard. There are both AC and non-AC rooms with attached and non-attached bathrooms, from single to triple sharing for female and male, with Wi-Fi. There are staff members for cleaning and laundry services. There are 4-5 types of mess facilities, and we can sign up for them with good, tasty, and hygienic food. Medical facilities are also available here.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued Feb(2026) B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Modern infrastructure and growing campus life but placement and facility experience is stabilizing.

content.Placements: Good placements, 80 percent people placed in 2025 placement cycle. The highest package is 69 LPA and average is 12 LPA, the lowest being 3-4 LPA. Top recruiters being Amazon, Microsoft, Bosch, Samsung, Shell. Roles offered included software engineer, data analyst, and consulting analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Amazing infrastructure and facilities. Classrooms are modern and Wi-Fi enabled with digital teaching aids such as smart-boards, projectors. Clean and well-maintained hostels. There are indoor as well as outdoor sports facilities. There is an on-campus clinic and 2 mess services with decent food.

admission_overview.title: Manipal University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: MAHE (Manipal Academy of Higher Education) admission is open for all courses. The university offers admission to various UG, PG, diploma and doctoral-level programmes in the fields of Medicine, Technology, Science, Humanities, Social Science, Management, etc. Admission to a few of the courses is merit-based. For others, the entrance exam score is considered. The mode of application at Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) is online. MAHE Manipal admission 2025 is done based on MET (Manipal entrance exam), National level entrance exams and merit, depending upon the nature of the programme. Read more about Manipal admission in detail in the following article. Manipal 2025 Applications Open | Apply Now Check out the following video for information about MAHE courses, admissions, and more:

faqs.answer: MAHE (Manipal Academy of Higher Education) offers admission to various UG, PG, Diploma and doctoral-level programmes in the fields of Medicine, Technology, Science, Humanities, Social Science, Management, etc. Admission to a few of the courses is merit-based. For others, the entrance exam such as MET, CAT, XAT, NEET UG, etc., score is considered. The university accepts several national-level entrance exams to shortlist the candidates. Further, the mode of application at Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) is online.
faqs.question: How can I get admission in MAHE Manipal?

faqs.answer: Candidate must qualify in the NEET UG for admission to MBBS at MAHE. There is no criteria for 10th and 12th marks if the NEET UG requirement is satisfied. Candidates must take the NEET UG exam and have the eligibility criteria to appear for the exam.
faqs.question: Can I get into Manipal Academy of Higher Education if I have scored just 60% in 10th and 75% in 12th?

faqs.answer: Yes, you can surely get admission at 12th percentile of 75, as your 10+2 scores doesn't matter in the case of NEET PG admission. The needed criteria which a candidates must follow is to have MBBS degree from an institute recognised by the Medical Council of India (MCI). Such candidates must possess MBBS degree or a Provisional MBBS Pass Certificate at the time of admissions.
faqs.question: Can I get into with 75% in class 12 with NEET PG?

paragraphs: The admission process for MAHE, Manipal is a multi-stage process which consists of application, appearance in the selection rounds and counselling process. Students seeking to enrol in any of the courses offered at the university need to meet the course requirements for Manipal admission before applying. A detailed guide to theManipal University admission processis given below:

The admission process begins with filling out an online application form on the official website of Manipal University. Candidates can apply for the course of their choice along with paying an application fee ofINR 600. Apart from that, to appear for the MET exam, candidates also have to apply for the respective entrance exam and pay an application fee ofINR 1,400.

Admission to Manipal University courses is both merit and entrance-based. For entrance-based admission, candidates must qualify for either MAHE Manipal entrance exam, i.e., MET or any other national-level entrance exams for the respective courses. Also, there are other selection rounds such as GDPI conducted as part of the selection process. For some courses, the concerned departments also conduct tests at their level. Also, direct admissions are offered to a few courses based on the candidates' merit obtained in the previous qualification. These candidates are shortlisted during the counselling process.
3: Manipal University Counselling Process/ Merit Release

Based on the scores in the respective entrance exams, past academic records and performance of candidates in other selection rounds, the university releases a merit list. Also, for direct admissions, the university conducts a counselling process based on candidates' scores obtained in the last examination.

After the release of the merit list, a admission notice will be sent to the selected candidates. Later on, candidates can proceed with the other admission formalities such as fee payment and document verification (if required). For more details about the final admission process, candidates check the Manipal University page.

faqs.answer: Though fee refund policy of MAHE is based on UGC Refund Policy, however, if students withdraw their application before 15 days of class commencement, full paid hostel fees will be refunded. faqs.question: Can I get admission to Manipal Unversity with a rank of 7000?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to Manipal University can easily get admission to MD and MS courses. faqs.answer: For admission to the BA course at Manipal Academy of Higher Education, candidates are required to either qualify on the merit list released by the institute based on candidates Class 12 scores or have valid scores in (Manipal Entrance Test) i.e., in-house entrance examination. There is a chance that Manipal Academy of Higher Education will accept direct admission to BA courses if the seats are vacant after the release of the merit list. faqs.question: When can I apply for B.A course at Manipal Academy of Higher Education?
faqs.answer: The university has not released the admission dates for 2025 batch. However, For the Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) BA programme, admission is normally available from October/November to July/August. Prior to the announcement of the final-year exam results, applications can be submitted. In addition, if the results have yet to be released, admission will be granted provisionally

faqs.question: How did you get admission in Manipal University for a BA (Hons)?
faqs.answer: Manipal University offers BA (Hons) via Mahipal Centre of Humanities.Admission to MCH BA (Hons)is based on merit secured in the qualifying exam and personal essay submitted by the candidate during the application process. The shortlisted candidates are then invited for the personal interview round.

faqs.question: Is MBA available in Manipal University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Manipal University provides PG-level course of MBA (General) for a duration of two-years. The university also offers MBA in four other specialisations. These MBA courses are taught at the Department of T A Pai Institute of Management (TAPMI), Manipal. Find below the list of Manipal University MBA specialisations:Banking and Financial ServicesHuman Resource ManagementMarketingInterested candidates can apply forMBAat Manipal University via qualifying any national-level entrance such as CAT, XAT, GMAT, NMAT. Admissions to MBA are also offered to international students.Find here, the detailed Manipal University admission process for MBA course.

faqs.question: What are the key academic programmes offered by Manipal University (MAHE)?
faqs.answer: Manipal University offers courses across several fields, such as medical, engineering, science, law, arts, management, commerce, etc. Admission to most of the courses are done on the basis of entrance exam scores, followed by the other selection rounds, such as personal interview. Students can check out the following list to know about the key academic programmes offered at Manipal University:BTechB.ArchBScBHMMBBSBDSBScBComBALLBMTechMSc

faqs.question: Does Manipal University offer direct admission for MBA (without any entrance exam)?
faqs.answer: No, Manipal University does not provide direct admission for MBA. Admission to MBA at Manipal University is completely entrance-based. Aspirants need to qualify for any one of the All India Management entrance exams for admission to MBA course. Candidates can either qualify for CAT/ XAT/ NMAT/ GMAT in order to get admission. Before sitting for the exam, interested candidates have to fill an online application form for the respective entrance exams. Check out the following links for the step-wise application process for CAT & XAT entrance exams:CAT Registration Process 2023XAT Registration Process 2023

faqs.question: What is the Manipal University MET Cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: TheManipal University MET Cutoff 2025is out for all rounds and categories for the students belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff is released in the form of ranks and is valid for admission to various engineering and medical courses at both UG and PG level. For the General AI category, the cutoff for BTech CSE ( AI and ML) course was12751for Manipal Institute of Technology, Bengaluru. For the BTech ECE course, the cutoff in 2025 was15046for the same category and college.Please note that the cutoff for each category, round, specialisation will vary.

placement_report.college_name: Manipal University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Manipal University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to Manipal University ongoing placement drive 2025, The highest international and highest domestic package offered during MIT Manipal placements in 2025 stood at INR 2.19 Crore and INR 57 LPA, respectively. While, the average package stood at INR 12.31 LPA. Up till now the placement rate achieved during the 2025 placements was 77.4%. More than 287 industry giants from various sectors such as, Analytics, Consulting, FMCG, IT, Healthcare, Sales and Marketing, etc, offered a variety of jobs to its students. Manipal University also provides internship opportunities to its students. The highest internship stipend stood at INR 60,000 per month . The top recruiters included Ericsson, EY, Oracle, Flipkart, Adobe, Philips, Adani Group, Amazon, IBM, Samsung, SAP Labs, BOSCH India, Boeing, L&T, Cisco, Cipla, Microsoft , etc.

faqs.question: How much does MBBS at Manipal cost?
faqs.answer: Manipal University offers MBBS course for a duration of total five years and six months, out of which, the course is divided into the duration of four years and six months with a one-year compulsory rotatory internship. The tuition fee for MBBS at Manipal University is INR 44 lakh - INR 72.9 lakh, which depends upon the school one chooses to pursue the course from. The given fee is taken from official sources and hence, is subjective. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Manipal University MBBS fee.

description: Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Manipal cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBBS and MDS courses. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Manipal Academy of Higher Education NEET UG cutoff 2025, along with other exams across various courses, rounds, and categories.

Manipal University is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. nirf.description:
Manipal University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University's rank is #14, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University climbed 1 rank to #3 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Research Institutions' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Manipal University climbed 4 ranks to #19 rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Manipal University's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel.description:
Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) has a separate hostel section under the management of Hostel Management Committee. This committee is headed by its Chairperson. All the hostels of the University are divided into three campuses. The hostels of medical, dental and paramedical colleges at Manipal are grouped under Chief Warden, MU, Manipal Campus; the hostels of engineering, management and other colleges located at Manipal Institute of Technology complex are grouped under Chief Warden, MIT Campus; and the hostels at Mangalore Campus are grouped under Chief Warden, Mangalore Campus.

It is desirable that all students stay in the University Hostels. It is mandatory for all first year students to reside in the Hostels. However, first year students desirous of staying outside under own arrangements must submit a consent letter from their Parents duly recommended by their HOI and forward it to Director, Student Affairs for necessary permission. These students must also give their local address, contact/mobile number and subsequent changes if any to their College Office and Director, student Affairs without fail.
facilities: Labs for UG and PG training

library.description: Manipal University has 6 major central libraries: Health Sciences Library Manipal, Health Sciences Library Mangalore, MIT Library, SOC Library, WGSHA Library, and SOM Library. There are also small department level libraries in all of the institutes. MAHE strives to provide the latest and best collection of books, journals, online sources, dissertations to students for course work and research.

data.description: Manipal University faculty has expertise in their respective fields. Most of the faculty members are PhD holders and all of them are highly qualified. The faculty are a blend of academic experience and industry exposure. They meet qualification norms of regulatory bodies and stay updated by gaining relevant degrees from time to time. A large number of faculty at Manipal University have terminal qualifications.

paragraphs: Manipal Academy of Higher Education offers scholarships to both undergraduate and postgraduate students. The institute also offers financial aid to Indian / Domestic (General Category) students.
Below are the major highlights of Manipal Academy of Higher Education:
Kalam - Pai, Freeship and Scholar Scholarships for MBBS & BDS, Merit Scholarship for Post Graduate (PG) Medical / Dental and Super Specialty Programs, etc
Manipal Academy of Higher Education awards 17 types of scholarships to the eligible students. Below are the detailed information regarding MAHE scholarships:
1. Kalam - Pai, Freeship and Scholar Scholarships for MBBS & BDS:
This scholarship involves 100 % waiver of course fee and hostel fee.

These scholarships are offered to students peruising MBBS from Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) at Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Manipal, Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Mangalore and Manipal TATA Medical College (MTMC) Jamshedpur, Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) at Manipal College of Dental Sciences (MCODS) Manipal & Manipal College of Dental Sciences (MCODS) Mangalore.
Below are the KALAM – PAI scholarship guidelines:
This scholarship is limited to 5 % of the General category intake, and below mentioned tables shows the total scholarship seats program-wise & campus-wise:
Kalam - Pai Scholarship for NEET 2022 All India Rank
Free Ship Scholarship for NEET 2022 All India Rank
Scholar Scholarship for NEET 2022 All India Rank
Scholarships Criteria: Students should have scored 80% aggregate of Physics + Chemistry + Biology (as per eligibility criteria) in Class 12 from a recognised board.
2. Merit Scholarship for Post Graduate (PG) Medical / Dental and Super Specialty Programs
MAHE Manipal offers merit scholarship for the following Post Graduate (PG) and Super Speciality (SS) programmes:
Below mentioned are the scholarship criteria:
Pass in MD / DNB from required specialisation * from an Institution / University recognized by National Medical Council (NMC) / erstwhile Medical Council of India (MCI)
Pass in MBBS degree from an Institution / University recognized by National Medical Council (NMC) / erstwhile Medical Council of India (MCI)
Pass in BDS degree from an Institution / University recognized by Dental Council of India (DCI)
Pass in MD / DNB from required specialization * from an Institution / University recognized by National Medical Council (NMC) / erstwhile Medical Council of India (MCI)
3. FREESHIP, SCHOLAR and ACHIEVER Scholarships for BTech
MAHE Manipal offers Freeship, Scholar and Achiever scholarship to meritorious BTech students at:

Student should have passed with 80% aggregate of Mathematics + Physics + Optional subject (as per selection criteria) in Class 12 from the recognised Board. Also, minimum 8 CGPA & above is needed, with no backlogs in Semester 1 of BTech programme.

Freeship & Scholar Category Scholarships: This Scholarship constitutes 5 % of the GENERAL category intake for each branch and is applicable for the entire program duration, starting from 1st year of the programme.

Achiever Category Scholarship: This constitutes 5 % of the general category intake for each branch and is applicable at the beginning of 2nd year, 3rd year and 4th year based on the annual academic performance of the immediate previous year i.e. 1st year, 2nd year and 3rd year. No scholarship is offered based on the performance in the final year.
4. Freeship, Scholars and Achiever Scholarship for BPharm

MAHE Manipal offers Freeship, Scholar and Achiever scholarship to meritorious students admitted to the Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm) program at Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS) Manipal
Students should have passed with 80 % in Chemistry + Physics + Biology / Mathematics in Class 12  from a recognised board.
Freeship & Scholar category Scholarships constitute 5 % of the general category intake and is applicable for the entire programme duration, starting from 1st year of the programme.

Achiever category Scholarship constitute 5 % of the general category intake (excluding Freeship & Scholar scholarship students) and is applicable from the beginning of 2nd year, 3rd year and 4th year which is based on the annual academic performance in the immediate previous year which include 1st year, 2nd year and 3rd year. No scholarship is offered based on the performance in the final year.

college_info.intro:
The Doon University popular programmes are BSc, BA, and MBA courses. Doon University BSc is provided in specialisations such as Geology, Computer Science, Economics, and others. While the Doon University BA is provided in specialisations such as English, Psychology, Media & Communication Studies, and others. BSc students can become Geologists, Oceanographers, Meteorologists, Seismologists, Geophysicists, and others. BSc students are placed in top companies such as Mercer, HCL Technologies, Cognizant, Amazon, EY, Accenture, and others.
Doon University BA course students can go for higher studies from the same university. Overall, it is one of the best universities offering UG, PG, and PhD courses to students across the BTech and various other streams. Interested students can check some of the other popular Dehradun University courses and their respective eligibility and Doon University fee structure:

reviews_list.review_title: Doon University - A decent college for B.Tech students with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There weren't many students this year who applied for admission. The seats available in the second round were 30, and the number of students that applied was 25. The average package of the university is around 4-5 LPA, as I know from the university placements. The top recruiting companies are TCS and Infosys at my university. There were several internship programs during the winter vacation, but not many students applied for them. The top roles are coding and web development provided by the university.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is still in progress for the School of Technology and other courses. Most of the buildings are already built, and they are quite nice. The campus is filled with greenery and clean roads, with a very nice aesthetic attached to it. The hostels look nice from the outside but are quite dirty inside the boys' hostel. The mess food is very good and tasty at times. The labs are still in development. There aren't any good labs in the college. The Wi-Fi in the college is very poor in the hostel.

faqs.answer: Doon University has no specific dress code; students are encouraged to dress decently. The university management and heads of departments have emphasised the importance of maintaining a respectful and appropriate appearance.For more information on this, candidates can visit the official website of Doon University.
faqs.question: Q: Is there any dress code for BA course at Doon University?

faqs.answer: No, there is no such provision for getting direct admission in any courses at Doon University. Aspiring candidates must take the Doon University Entrance test to get eligible for the admission process for programmes offered at Doon University. Selected candidates can register further for the counselling process after submitting the counselling fees; during this round, candidates will be required to report to the admission cell at Doon University for document verification and other admission formalities along with fee payment.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission in Doon University?

faqs.answer: Doon University is established as a university by an Act of the Uttrakhand Government, and it is also recognised under section 12 (B) of the University Grant Commission (UGC) Act 1956. Hence, all the courses and specialisations offered at Doon University are valid all over India.Candidates who want to opt for higher studies after their BA or if they want to do a job after the completion of their BA course can do both as the degree awarded to them by Doon University is valid.
faqs.question: Q: Is BA from Doon University valid?

faqs.answer: No, there is no such provision to get direct admission to the MBA programme at Doon University. Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme at Doon University should fulfil the following requirements:Candidate must possess a bachelor’s degree in any domain with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories from Uttrakhand).Candidates must have a valid CAT or MAT score card as admission.Candidates who will get shortlisted based on their CAT or MAT score will have to qualify for the group discussion (GD) round and personal interview round (PI).Candidates who will qualify for the GD and PI rounds will have to report to the university’s admission cell for document verification and fee payment.
