review_summary.college_name: Doon University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com.(Hons) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Honest and balanced, the college is affordable, warm, and worth it.

content.Placements: Placements in our course are decent, though not extraordinary. Around 60–70 percent of students secure jobs through campus drives.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course is functional but could use upgrades. Classrooms are spacious with basic amenities such as whiteboards, projectors, and fans.
content.Faculty: Faculty in our department is a mixture of seasoned professionals and passionate educators. Most professors are approachable, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in student growth. Faculty members are good and easy to work with.

individual_reviews.course: B. A. (Hons) in English - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Value for money and a great college.

content.Placements: Particularly in B.A., a very small percentage of students with English honours are hired for an internship or placement. 6 LPA is the highest package that has ever been offered in this course. Only PhD scholars from this course get an opportunity for campus internship.
content.Infrastructure: The department has a huge building which includes Wi-Fi labs and well-maintained and clean classrooms, and a central library for everyone. The washrooms are clean, the hostel food sometimes disappoints you, and the quality of food is average, but the infrastructure is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Doon University - A decent college for B.Tech students with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: There weren't many students this year who applied for admission. The seats available in the second round were 30, and the number of students that applied was 25. The average package of the university is around 4-5 LPA, as I know from the university placements. The top recruiting companies are TCS and Infosys at my university. There were several internship programs during the winter vacation, but not many students applied for them. The top roles are coding and web development provided by the university.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is still in progress for the School of Technology and other courses. Most of the buildings are already built, and they are quite nice. The campus is filled with greenery and clean roads, with a very nice aesthetic attached to it. The hostels look nice from the outside but are quite dirty inside the boys' hostel. The mess food is very good and tasty at times. The labs are still in development. There aren't any good labs in the college. The Wi-Fi in the college is very poor in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com.(Hons) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: True review of Doon University located in Dehradun, a state university.

content.Placements: A minimum of 10% of students got placed. The highest package is around 9 LPA and the average is 5.5 LPA. There are recruiting companies like Reliance, Decathlon, etc. Internships are offered in different companies mentioned above. Roles are offered to students as per their qualifications.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are very good. Library is for all not just for hustlers. The quality of hostel is fine. Overall, the quality of food available in mess and canteen and medical facilities is very poor. Sports and games are fine overall as well.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Value for money University with best in class faculty and ample of growth opportunities .

content.Placements: Out of 57 students, 5 have been placed by the time of writing this review. Mostly HR and marketing centric roles were offered such as marketing executive, HR executive, recruitment consultant. Multiple companies came to the campus such as Posterity inc, Triveni Almirahs, S&P Global, Decathlon etc.
content.Infrastructure: The Building for the Management department has been constructed just two years back at the beginning of our course. It is truly state of the art with sufficient advanced teaching aids and technological tools such as SMART boards, audio video tools etc. The building is equipped with CCTV cameras to ensure security of students. The campus is the largest in Dehradun and as soon as you enter you would be greeted with chirping birds and a variety of flowers and plants.

admission_overview.college_name: Doon University Courses & Fees 2025: Admission, Eligibility, Selection Process & Entrance Exam

admission_overview.title: Doon University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Doon University admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers an extensive range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses. Students can also pursue various certificate courses at the university. Doon University accepts admission for most of its courses based on its own entrance examination. Besides its entrance examination, the university accepts other national-level entrance examinations such as JEE-Main, CAT, MAT, etc. The admission and application process for the university is conducted in both online and offline modes. Read the article below to learn more about the courses, eligibility, fees, seats, and admission procedure of Doon University.

eligibility_selection.title: Doon University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Doon University programmes are offered in the fields of Management, Arts, Commerce, Science, Design, and more. Students can pursue these courses in multiple specialisations and in full-time mode. The Doon University course admission is entrance-based for most of its courses. The university accepts various national-level entrance exams in addition to conducting its own entrance test. Students seeking to apply for the course are required to meet the admission criteria specified in the university's guidelines. Interested students can check the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popular Doon University courses: Courses

courses_table.eligibility: UG degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories from Uttarakhand)
BSc in relevant discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories from Uttarakhand)
Class 12 in the Science stream with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Graduation with a minimum of 50% in a relevant field from a recognised university
Graduation with a minimum of 50% from a recognised university

faqs.answer: The application to Doon University is online. The candidate needs to apply for the course by paying an application fee. Students can check the steps below to know the step-wise application process:Step one: Visit the official website of Doon University.Step two: Go to the admission tab.Step three: Click on “Apply for Admission”.Step four: Register with basic details to get application credentials.Step five: Login to fill out and complete the application form.Step six: Pay the application fee and complete the form.
faqs.question: How to apply for BDes at Doon University?

faqs.answer: The university has released the seats reserved for BDes at Doon University. A total of 120 seats are available for BDes at the university. For more clarity, students can check the table presented below:InstitutesSeatsDoon University BDes Seats120
faqs.question: How many seats are reserved for BDes at Doon University?

paragraphs: Doon University admission is decided on entrance basis. The university selects students for most of its courses throughDoon University Entrance Exam. Alternatively, those with a valid score in any of the other accepted exams can also apply for the university. Interested students can follow the step-wiseDoon University admission processmentioned below:

The first step is to fill out the application form for the desired course. Interested students can apply by visiting the official website of Doon University and submitting the application form after paying the application fee.
2 - Doon University Selection Criteria via Entrance Test
Admission is based on the Doon University Entrance test, which is held online on the official website of the university.

Candidates whose names appeared in the list of selected candidates in any particular programme will be required to report to the admission cell of Doon University for verification of documents and fee payment for locking their seat for that specific course.

Doon University course feeis inclusive of multiple components, including, tuition fees, lab fees, library fees, caution deposit, and more. Some of the components need to be paid only once at the time of admission, while the remaining can be paid semester-wise or as prescribed by the university. The fee needs to be paid online. Students can download the payment acknowledgement once the payment is made. Find the course-wiseDoon University feein the table below:

Doon University seat intakevaries as per the course and specialisation selected by the students. Students are offered seats based on their performance in the selection rounds. To secure their candidature, students need to pay the admission fee for the desired course. Find below the seat intake for some of the Doon University courses:

Doon University follows the policy of the Uttarakhand State Government forseat reservation.The university shortlists students on an entrance basis. 50% of the seats are filled based on admission criteria, while the remaining 50% of seats are for the students from the Uttarakhand state. Find below both vertical and horizontal category-wise seat reservations provided at Doon University:

courses_data.name: Doon University BA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Doon University BA is a full-time course of three years. Admission to theBA(Hons) and four-year BA (with research) courses is entrance-based. Students must have passed Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board. Students are also required to appear for the university's entrance exam. Students can pursue the course across multiple specialisations, such asPsychology, English,French, Japanese,German, and more. Interested candidates can refer to the following section to know more about theDoon University BA course:

faqs.question: What is the percentage required for admission in BA at Doon University?
faqs.answer: The candidate should have passed Class 12 in any stream with a minimum of 50% (45% for reserved categories from Uttarakhand). Those candidates who have the aforesaid aggregate in their Class 12 marksheet can appear for the entrance test conducted by Doon University for admission in any of the BA domains. Candidates whose names will appear in the selected candidate's list published on the official website of the university can register for the counselling process, where they can fill in their bra

faqs.question: Are there any seats for home state students in Doon University for B.A course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Doon University indeed reserves a certain amount of seats for students who are residents of Uttarakhand. However, this reservation can only be availed by those who belong to the reserved categories. The university reserves 50% of the total seats for the reserved categories. Find below category-wise seat break-up below:Vertical ReservationPercentageHorizontal ReservationPercentageOBC14%Children of Martyred or disabled defence personnel05%SC19%Children of freedom fighters02%ST04%PWD having a

faqs.question: What B.A specialisations does Doon University offer?
faqs.answer: At Doon University, students are offered various specialisations for the BA programme. The university offers BA (Hons) and BA research course. The eligibility and selection criteria is same across all of the BA courses. The university provides the course through its School of Languages. Eligible students can pursue the following BA specialisations at Doon University:BA (Hons) in PsychologyBA (Hons) in FrenchBA (Hons) in EnglishBA (Hons) in JapaneseBA (Hons) in GermanBA (Hons) in SpanishBA (Hons)

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission in BA at Doon University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Doon University conducts its own entrance exam based on which it selects candidates in various disciplines of the BA programme. Candidates seeking admission to BA courses offered at Doon University must take the aforesaid exam.Based on their Doon University entrance exam performance, candidates will get selected and become eligible for the counselling round followed by document verification and fee payment, which will finalise their BA admission process at Doon University.

courses_data.name: Doon University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Doon University provides anMBAprogramme through its School of Management. The university offers the course at the postgraduate level, along with a five-year BBA + MBA integrated course. Students with a valid score in entrance exams, such as CAT/ MAT, etc can apply for the course. The university conducts a round of group discussions and personal interviews to shortlist the students. Additionally, students can also enrol in theExecutive MBAcourse. Interested students can apply for the course by visiting the official website of the university. Refer below to learn aboutDoon University MBA admission:

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Doon University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Doon University offers a two-year full-time MBA programme comprising four semesters. Besides MBA (General), Doon University also offers an Executive MBA, which is a two-year full-time course.Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme at Doon University must have a valid CAT or MAT scorecard. Candidates whose CAT/ MAT rank is above the closing rank mentioned in the cut-off list released by Doon University will be shortlisted for the group discussion (GD) and personal interview (PI) ro

faqs.answer: To prepare for the MBA programme offered at the Doon University, students need to clear the selection rounds. To prepare for theDoon University MBA entrance exam, students must keep in mind several things. The first is to fulfil the eligibility criteria as per the guidelines issued by the university. Students with a valid score in any of the accepted management exams, i.e., CAT/ MAT, etc., or Doon University Entrance Exam can apply. To preapre for the exams, students must go through theCAT sylla

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for admission in MBA at Doon University?
faqs.answer: Doon University accepts admission in the MBA programme on the basis of the CAT or MAT score. The application process for CAT is generally concluded between August and September. Candidates seeking admission in MBA at Doon University must take the CAT exam. courses_data.name: Doon University BBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The university offers twoBBAcourses, i.e., Integrated BBA+ MBA and BBA with Research. The duration of an Integrated BBA + MBA is five years and BBA with Research is four years. To get admission to the BBA course, the candidate needs to meet the last educational qualification, as per course requirements.

faqs.question: How to get admission in BBA at Doon University?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission in the BBA programme at Doon University can check below to know more:Candidate must have passed class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories from Uttarakhand).Candidate should appear in the Doon University Entrance test.Selected candidates will have to register for the counselling process, followed by document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in BBA at Doon University?
faqs.answer: There is no such provision to get direct admission to the BBA course at Doon University. Candidates willing to take admission in BBA programme at Doon University must follow these guidelines:Candidate must have passed class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved categories from Uttarakhand).Candidate should appear in the Doon University Entrance test.Selected candidates will have to register for the counselling process, followed by document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Is BBA available at Doon University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Doon University offers a full-time BBA course. Doon University BBA admission is based on the entrance test conducted. Candidates willing to be admitted to the BBA programme at Doon University must take the said entrance test.Selected candidates must further register for the counselling process after paying the required counselling fees. Consecutively, they have to report to the admission cell at Doon University for document verification and course fee payment.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to pursue BBA at Doon University?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the Doon University BBA programme must check the eligibility requirements. Failure to fulfill can lead to rejection during the application stage. courses_data.name: Doon University MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Doon University offers a two-year full-timeMScprogramme. Doon University offers MSc courses under six specialisations, including,Physics, Geology, andMathematics. Additionally, the university also providesBSc + MSc integrated coursesin the above-mentioned specialisations.MSc courseadmissionis based on an entrance test conducted by Doon University. Candidates who qualify for the entrance test can register for the counselling process for final seat allotment. The basic eligibility required to apply for the MSc course is to pass graduation in the relevant field from a recognised university. For the integrated BSc + MSc course, students need to have passed Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised board.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for MSc admission at Doon University?
faqs.answer: Doon University accepts admission in its MSc programme based on the candidate’s performance in the Doon University entrance exam. The application process for the entrance exam conducted by the univeristy is usually concluded between July and August. Candidates seeking admission to MSc courses offered at Doon University must take the Doon University entrance exam and qualify for the said exam to become eligible for the counselling round. The last step of the counselling and admission process for

faqs.question: Does Doon University reserve seats for SC/ST/OBC and other special candidates?
faqs.answer: Yes, Doon University BSc seats are subject to the reservation policy followed by the University. The policy says,  50% of the total seats in a programme shall be filled on an India basis. The rest 50% of seats are reserved for students from Uttarakhand as per the policy of the State Government. Refer to the following table to know category-wise seat reservations:CategoryPercentage of ReservationOBC14%Schedule Caste19%Scheduled Tribes4%EWS10%Children of martyred or disabled Defense personnel5%Chi

faqs.question: Does Doon University accepts CUET-PG score for admission in MSc?
faqs.answer: No, Doon University only accepts admission in the MSc programme through its own entrance exam and no other entrance exams, including CUET-PG. Candidates willing to enrol in MSc courses offered at Doon University must take the Doon University entrance exam.Candidates whose names will appear in the selected candidate list must register for the counselling round through the university’s official website, which involves document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Doon University?
faqs.answer: No, there is no such provision for getting direct admission in any courses at Doon University. Aspiring candidates must take the Doon University Entrance test to get eligible for the admission process for programmes offered at Doon University. Selected candidates can register further for the counselling process after submitting the counselling fees; during this round, candidates will be required to report to the admission cell at Doon University for document verification and other admission formalities along with fee payment.

faqs.question: What is the last date for admission to Doon University?
faqs.answer: Doon University usually conducts the application process for various programmes and specialisations between May and June. Aspiring candidates are advised to apply for the Doon University Entrance test as it is the first step in getting admission at courses offered at Doon University. Candidates, based on their performance in that entrance test, will be selected for that particular programme. The name of selected candidates will be made available on the official website of Doon University, which the applicant can check by logging into their registered accounts. Selected candidates must report to the university’s admission cell for document verification and submission of tuition fees to finalise the admission process.

faqs.question: How to apply for Doon University?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission in courses offered at Doon University will first have to appear in the entrance exam conducted by Doon University, as the university inducts students in the majority of its courses through its own entrance test. Candidates, based on their performance in Doon University Entrance Test, will be selected for that particular programme opted by the candidate. Selected candidates will have to report to the admission cell at Doon University to complete the remaining admission formalities, including document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Doon University without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Candidates planning to be admitted to courses offered at Doon University will first have to appear in the entrance exam conducted by Doon University, as Doon University inducts students in the majority of its courses through its own entrance test. Candidates, based on their performance in Doon University Entrance Test, will be selected for that particular programme opted by the candidate. Selected candidates will have to register for the counselling process, followed by document verification and fee payment.

placement_report.college_name: Doon University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Doon University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the Doon University NIRF report 2024 , 75 UG and 80 PG students were placed in 2023. A concise placements report may not be available for each course. The median package offered to three year and four year UG students was INR 6 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. The median package given to two-year PG candidates was INR 6.5 LPA .

faqs.question: Is Doon University good for placement?
faqs.answer: The 2023 placement session concluded with 71 UG (3-year), 4 UG (4-year) and 80 PG (2-year) students placed. The median package offered to PG (2-year) students was the highest, which stood at INR 6.50 PA. Check the complete insights of Doon University placements 2023 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (UG-3 year) 425 Students placed (UG-3 year) 71 Median package (UG-3 year) INR 6 LPA Total students (UG-4 year) 11 Students placed (UG-4 year) 4 Median package (UG-4 year) INR 5 LPA Total students (PG-2 year) 308 Students placed (PG-2 year) 80 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 6.50 LPA NOTE: The aforementioned details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Doon University?
faqs.answer: The Doon University highest package details are yet to be released. However, the median package has been released. The highest median package offered during 2023 placements was INR 6.50 LPA and was made to PG (2-year) students. Tabulated below are the course-wise Doon University packages for 2023: Course Median Package (2023) UG (3-year) INR 6 LPA UG (4-year) INR 5 LPA PG (2-year) INR 6.50 LPA NOTE: The above salary data is collated from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How many students were placed during Doon University placements?
faqs.answer: Out of 425 UG (3-year) graduates 71 were placed in the 2023 drive. Additionally, 4 out of 11 UG (4-year) and 80 out of 308 PG (2-year) students were placed during 2023 placements. Take a look at the table below depicting the Doon University placement trends for UG and PG courses: Course Placement Statistics (2021) Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) UG (3-year) - Total students: 402 - Students placed: 52 - Total students: 374 - Students placed: 69 - Total students: 425 - Students placed: 71 UG (4-year) - Total students: 8 - Students placed: 1 - Total students: 16 - Students placed: 8 - Total students: 11 - Students placed: 4 PG (2-year) - Total students: 220 - Students placed: 24 - Total students: 296 - Students placed: 51 - Total students: 308 - Students placed: 80 NOTE: The above statistics are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the placement rate for B.Tech at Doon University?
faqs.answer: As per the latest Doon University placement information, the placement rate for UG-4 year students stood at 36% during 2023 placements. Tabulated below is the placement rate trends for the past three years: Course Placement Rate (2021) Placement Rate (2022) Placement Rate (2023) UG (4-year) 13% 50% 36% Note: The above percentage is calculated from the details given in the NIRF report 2024.

hostel.description: Doon University's hostel facilities are available for girls (Alaknanda Hostel) and boys (Shivalik Hostel) in the campus. The hostels are equipped with modern facilities such as mess-dining hall, solar heater water supply, Wi-Fi facility, gym, badminton, Carom, newspaper stands, guest waiting room.

library.description: Doon University's library has a moderate collection of books, which includes textbook, reference books, dictionaries, encyclopedias, etc. The library subscribes to a total of 69 scholarly journals and magazines along with the subscription of some electronic journals. The library gives access to 21 e-journals of SAGE publication, 07 e-journals of NISCAIR and 02 e-journals of Indian Academy of Science. It uses Library Management Software LibSys7. OPAC of LMS is also available on the university intranet for searching books of the library.

reviews.review_heading: Honest and balanced, the college is affordable, warm, and worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is functional but could use upgrades. Classrooms are spacious with basic amenities such as whiteboards, projectors, and fans.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money and a great college.
reviews.review_text: The department has a huge building which includes Wi-Fi labs and well-maintained and clean classrooms, and a central library for everyone. The washrooms are clean, the hostel food sometimes disappoints you, and the quality of food is average, but the infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Doon University - A decent college for B.Tech students with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is still in progress for the School of Technology and other courses. Most of the buildings are already built, and they are quite nice. The campus is filled with greenery and clean roads, with a very nice aesthetic attached to it. The hostels look nice from the outside but are quite dirty inside the boys' hostel. The mess food is very good and tasty at times. The labs are still in development. There aren't any good labs in the college. The Wi-Fi in the college is very poor in t...

reviews.review_heading: True review of Doon University located in Dehradun, a state university.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are very good. Library is for all not just for hustlers. The quality of hostel is fine. Overall, the quality of food available in mess and canteen and medical facilities is very poor. Sports and games are fine overall as well.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money University with best in class faculty and ample of growth opportunities .
reviews.review_text: The Building for the Management department has been constructed just two years back at the beginning of our course. It is truly state of the art with sufficient advanced teaching aids and technological tools such as SMART boards, audio video tools etc. The building is equipped with CCTV cameras to ensure security of students. The campus is the largest in Dehradun and as soon as you enter you would be greeted with chirping birds and a variety of flowers and plants.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Doon University.
reviews.review_text: Labs in our department are well maintained and have a good infrastructure. All systems are working properly so yes it's in good condition and the Wi-Fi is also very stable sometimes it is unstable but overall good. As for the hostel, the hostel infrastructure is very well, especially in Mandakini Girls hostel. I prefer you should apply for this one only. The rooms are bigger and the washrooms are also cleaned and maintained There tv room for entertainment and, a reading room for studying. The me...

reviews.review_heading: The best MBA college for placements.
reviews.review_text: In the management department, good Wi-Fi connection, fully furnished classrooms, clean and tidy washrooms, conference room, and smart classes are provided. Hostels are easily affordable with quality food, proper Wi-Fi connection, maintenance and sanitation regularly, and well-equipped. There are gym, badminton, and volleyball court available.

reviews.review_heading: It is value for money. The best university in the region.
reviews.review_text:
Departmental Facilities include Wi-Fi and labs with modern tools. Classrooms are well-ventilated, with smartboards and are neat.
Additional facilities like nice auditorium for events, seminars, and conferences are available. Uber, rapido, etc., are available in that location.

reviews.review_heading: This university is the best.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of Doon University are good. Wi-Fi has good connectivity and classrooms are neat and clean. Doon University has central library that has various types of book. Facilities of hostel are good and the mess food is healthy and nutritional. Canteen has good food and there are free medical facilities in college. Sports played are cricket, football, basketball, badminton, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Doon University is one of the best colleges in Dehradun due to its infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. If we talk about Wi-Fi, it has best internet speed without suffering. Library is very big and it almost covers every department's course books and also different magazines plus all types of competitive exam book.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good university with great campus, supportive teachers, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are clean and have digital boards. Library is excellent with a wide variety of books. Facilities are value for money in hostel and the quality of food is okay. Medical facilities are available. There is huge scope in sports and games where inter-house competitions are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Doon University: Satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is beautiful and large. Different games are played and students are sent to different states for tournaments. Plenty of co-curricular activities are offered different clubs are available according to the interests of students. Classrooms are huge and clean with smartboards installed. Wi-fi facilities are provided to students in building. Library is amazing have different rooms for reading and all kinds of books are available.

reviews.review_heading: The best university in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: Doon University have the best infrastructure which gives tough competition to all the other private universities in Dehradun. College have all facilities of Wi-Fi and different labs as required for different courses. We have the best central library with smart classrooms for updated learning. Hostel has Wi-Fi connection, reading room, gym, and all the other facilities which are required in hostel. Apart from that decent food is provided and all hygiene is maintained in hostel and college premise...

reviews.review_heading: Doon University is a good place where you can enhance your knowledge and personality.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is available, Library is excellent with wide variety of books and rich source of knowledge, Classrooms are near and tidy with all facilities available, there is a separate building for labs specially 
Facilities are value for money in hostel, quality of food is average but variety is available with different courses in a week, medical facility is there, there is huge scope in sports and games .

reviews.review_heading: Doon University is overall a great educational institution.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice, beautiful, and full of peace. Library is huge and has separate reading rooms and it has all kinds of books like academic, story books, fictional, etc. Hostels are good and accommodation is good. There are separate buildings for girls and boys.

highlights.summary:
Indus University admissions 2026 are open for all courses. Below are the latest updates:

The CLAT PG 2026 third merit list is out for Indus University admission to the PG-level LLM programme. The fourth merit list will be out on May 2, 2026 (10 PM).

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Indus University Ahmedabad has various undergraduate, postgraduate & doctorate programs in Engineering, Pharmacy, Life and Basic Sciences, Agriculture, Business Management, Education, Law and Sciences & other fields. Some of prominent programs of university are BSc, BCom, BCom (Hons), BA LLB, BTech, MTech, MBA & several other programs in various specialisations including Aviation, Biomedical, Civil, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Cyber Security, Designing, and many more.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at Indus University. Indus University BTech programme here offers ten specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Computer Engineering, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), Metallurgical Engineering, Information Technology, and Mechanical Engineering. Also, the Indus University MBA programme here comes in many specialisations such as Integrated MBA, Dual Degree MBA (BBA + MBA), BBA, BCom (Honors) with ACCA UK, MBA, BBA in Aviation, and many more. Below are some of courses offered by Indus University & respective eligibility and Indus University fees:

Loved in first year but not in later years

Some flagship programs offered by the university are BSc, BTech, MBA, and many more in various specialisations such as Aviation, Biomedical, Civil, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Cyber Security, Designing, and many more. Additionally Indus University also provides BSc in various specialisations like Clinical Research & Healthcare Management, Mathematics, Chemistry, Physics & many more. faqs.answer: A:    Indus University MBA admissions are entrance-based. Candidates are offered admission based on several national-level/ university level entrance exams. Candidates willing to get admission to MBA course at the Indus University can either qualify for CAT/ MAT/ CMAT or they can appear for Indus-MAT entrance exam.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Indus University accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility critreia for BPharma course is class 12 with Physics, Chemistry & Biology/Mathematics as one of the subject. The Indus University BPharma is a four-year undergraduate course offered in full-time mode. The Bachelor of Pharmacy the curriculum is spread across eight semesters which includes all parts of healthcare related to creating medications and their use in accurate diagnosis. Pharmaceutical Technology, Industrial Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Phytopharmaceutical, Pharmacology, etc., are a few of the core subjects taught in the BPharma course.

review_content.Placements: The university has established itself as one of the premier institutions, not only in terms of academic excellence but also in securing the future of its students through 100% placement assistance. The commitment towards career development is evident from the first year itself, as the training and placement cell actively guides students with skill development, personality enhancement, and industry readiness programs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recreation centers, and green open space further add to the overall campus appeal.

review_content.Placements: It's a nice college, and placements are really not good, but you have to know the humanity and what people need for placement, and you have to visit this college.

faqs.answer: Indus University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The college accepts scores of various national-level entrance exams such as GATE, MAT, CMAT, etc. To get admission at the Indus University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Further, candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme must be Class 12 passed with a minimum of 45% aggregate.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Indus University?

faqs.answer: The university offers courses in the stream of Engineering, Management, Science, Design, etc. The popular programmes at the university are BTech, MBA, BSc, BDes, BCA, etc. Students can check the table below to know detailed course-wise eligibility:Course NameEligibilityBTechPass Class 12 with minimum 45% aggregateMBAUG degree with minimumn 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)BScPass Class 12 in Science with Mathematics from a recognised boardBDesUG degree with minimum 45% aggregateBCA+MCAClass 12 with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)MTechPass UG degree in BTech or relevant stream

faqs.answer: Yes, You can get direct admission on before the JEE-Mains and GUJCET result declaration on the basis of 12th marks which should be 45 percent above with equivalent to your respective subject. Admission to all the courses is both merit and entrance based. The university conducts its own entrance exams such as Indus-MAT and Indus-DAT for Management and Designing courses, respectively. There are other national-level entrance exams which are also accepted by the university.

overview_faqs.question: How long is the course duration of MBA at Indus University?
overview_faqs.answer: The MBA curriculum is a two year long educational format inclusive of the hands on experience and in detailed knowledge about the subject. The MBA course at Indus University stresses on overall growth of the students so that they are able to prepare for the professional outlook following the 2 year academic course.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indus University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: With an emphasis on academics and excellent study resources, Indus University provides MBA students with a positive educational experience. The university's facilities and faculty are first-rate. But unlike some other universities, Indus University has a smaller campus community, and job placement rates are mediocre, with a median salary of $3–4 Lacs annually. The institution offers admission based on graduation results and, in the event that there are open seats, through management quota. To choose the specialisation that best fits their objectives, prospective students should think about their hobbies and career goals.

review_summary.college_name: Indus University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The campus life is good, but if you want to study, you can opt for a better college.

content.Placements: Around 30 percent of students are placed. I don't know about the highest or lowest package offered. Bank of America is one of the many. Around 60–70 percent of students get internships who register themselves. Top roles I don't know, but there might be, mostly fresher-related roles.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are good, well-maintained, and air-conditioned, but there is no Wi-Fi which was promised at the time of joining. Canteen and mess are good. We also have sports facilities, but instruments are missing. I haven't used medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I will recommend taking admission in Indus University.

content.Placements: Indus University placement is very good. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the lowest package is 7 LPA. They have the best placement in their segment. It is value for money.
content.Infrastructure: They have the best facilities. They have the best hostel in their segment. The hostel provides gym facilities, hygienic food, and playgrounds.
content.Faculty: Indus University has the best faculty. All faculty are good, intelligent, and skilled. The exam is very good. They include theory and practice. The exam level is medium. They have the best course. They have a specialization course like AIML.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Ahmedabad with the best placement.

content.Placements: The university has established itself as one of the premier institutions, not only in terms of academic excellence but also in securing the future of its students through 100% placement assistance. The commitment towards career development is evident from the first year itself, as the training and placement cell actively guides students with skill development, personality enhancement, and industry readiness programs.
content.Infrastructure: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recreation centers, and green open space further add to the overall campus appeal.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: For education purposes, this is basically our Indus College.

content.Placements: It's a nice college, and placements are really not good, but you have to know the humanity and what people need for placement, and you have to visit this college.
content.Infrastructure: We have a college in the Racharda area, and all people come from home, hostel, and also PG students here. They come to study from outside the city and country. They really love the college, and the hostel is too good. There are two or three sharing rooms in the hostel.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful to us, and exams are given based on attendance. If attendance is low, then we will not be allowed to attend the exam. We also have events like playing games and mind games at the national level. People are very friendly, and the campus is so good for me.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) + Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and very friendly faculty.

content.Placements: There are so many courses in college, and all of them are taught with dedication and hard work by the teachers, along with the support of mentors. The placement records are very good. Big companies like Microsoft, Google, Apple, and many others are offering placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure, the canteen, etc. The security is also awesome, and most importantly, there is no ragging at all. All students are very nice and humble. The atmosphere for freshers is very good and trustworthy.
content.Faculty: Faculty of Indus tries to teach you in a very friendly nature. The teaching style is too friendly that even an average student can understand it in simple words. Most of the teachers have Ph.D. in their respective roles. The semester exams seem easy because of the teaching by the faculty.

The university offers courses in the stream of Engineering, Management, Science, Design, etc. The popular programmes at the university are BTech, MBA, BSc, BDes, BCA, etc. Indus University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. paragraphs: Indus University admissions start with online registrations. Further, candidates must qualify for the respective entrance exam and fulfil the basic eligibility requirements as per the courses. Check below the detailed steps for the Indus University admission process:

Indus University's application process is conducted in an online mode. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the university for their desired programme. While filling the application form, they must submit the supporting documents of previous qualifications and pay an application fee for the respective UG & PG courses.

Admission to Indus University is both merit and entrance-based. For admission to courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, BDes, etc., candidates must qualify for national/ university-level entrance exams. However, the university offers direct admission to courses such as BSc, BCA, BCom, MSc, etc. For some courses, candidates must also appear for the PI round.

After the completion of all the selection rounds, the university releases the list of shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theIndus University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in BTech at Indus University?

faqs.question: What is the role of ACPC of Indus University for admission in the BTech course?

hostel.description: Separate hostels for boys and girls and also a separate block for international students in the hostel buildings. spacious, well-furnished rooms with 24x7 power supply, Wi-Fi connection, television, water purifier, water cooler and facilities for indoor and outdoor games, fitness center and gym with the latest equipment, first-aid facility and 120 kwh capacities solar power.

library.description: Indus University spread across 600 Sqm, has a well stocked library with collection of over 26000 volumes of books besides subscriptions for more than 250 National and International Journals. It also possesses Electronic Resources on books, journals, project reports along with CDs and DVDs on specific topics of interest. One can also find reprographic facilities in the library. The library has an Online Publication Access Catalogue (OPAC) and institutional membership with ADINET and DELNET providing online access to a large number of e-books and e-journals.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is good, but if you want to study, you can opt for a better college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are good, well-maintained, and air-conditioned, but there is no Wi-Fi which was promised at the time of joining. Canteen and mess are good. We also have sports facilities, but instruments are missing. I haven't used medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend taking admission in Indus University.
reviews.review_text: They have the best facilities. They have the best hostel in their segment. The hostel provides gym facilities, hygienic food, and playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Ahmedabad with the best placement.
reviews.review_text: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recrea...

reviews.review_heading: For education purposes, this is basically our Indus College.
reviews.review_text: We have a college in the Racharda area, and all people come from home, hostel, and also PG students here. They come to study from outside the city and country. They really love the college, and the hostel is too good. There are two or three sharing rooms in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and very friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure, the canteen, etc. The security is also awesome, and most importantly, there is no ragging at all. All students are very nice and humble. The atmosphere for freshers is very good and trustworthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed with the poor faculty, fake placements, and average facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are nice and well-maintained. There is no Wi-Fi for personal use, and it has only limited access for official work. The library is also decent. Hostel rooms are average. Food in a mess is sometimes tasty and sometimes not. I never saw a medical room in my college, so I do not have an idea about it. Sports facilities are great.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and a balanced campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our computer science department is well-equipped with modern labs. It has high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms and a central library with access to journals and e-resources. Hostel provides decent rooms with basic amenities, 24/7 water and electricity and Wi-Fi. Mess food is average but hygienic with a variety of vegetarian options. Campus also includes medical facilities with a visiting doctor. It also has good good sports infrastructure including cricket, football ground and indoor games like ta...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities with active campus life.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and a good library are available. Hostels are clean with basic amenities. Mess food is average; canteens offer better variety. The medical room is active 24/7, and sports facilities like gym, playground, and courts are available.

reviews.review_heading: From campus to career: Life at Indus University
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at Indus University, especially for the B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering department, is quite robust and student-friendly. The department is equipped with state-of-the-art computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, and smart classrooms with projectors and modern seating arrangements. The hostel facilities at Indus University are satisfactory. The rooms are generally clean and furnished with basic amenities like a study table, chair, cupboard, and fans. The hostel bu...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a balanced campus life with growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers good infrastructure, with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms, with basic amenities like laundry, security, and study areas are provided. The mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life and placement opportunities in core sectors.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available for students Wi-Fi, full AC classrooms, library, etc. Best quality hostel facilities are provided to students, and the best quality of food is available in mess and canteen. They even provide medical facilities, and all types of sports and games are there.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, supportive faculty, and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities at Indus University are satisfactory. It offers clean rooms, Wi-Fi, and 24x7 security. The mess provides hygienic vegetarian food, and the taste is average. The canteen offers snacks and fast food. Medical care is available on campus with doctors and emergency support. Sports like cricket, football, and badminton are encouraged, with regular tournaments and well-maintained grounds for students to stay active and healthy throughout their academic life.

reviews.review_heading: In 2025, the college is justifying with fee totally. It has the best return on investment so far.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good and facilities are also good. There are various labs and good infrastructure for overall practicals. The library is fine not that good and not that bad. Hostel rooms are okay, but the food is very delicious at affordable rates. Apart from this, Indus University has a very good infrastructure for sports. It has a basketball court, football ground, cricket ground, tennis court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Tech. in Cyber Security course at Indus University.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like labs, canteen, and sports are pretty good. There are some negative points like there is not much place to sit around on campus during free lectures or lunch breaks. It is a small campus and the classrooms are also bearable.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and it is good for study.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is very huge. There are many aircraft on campus, one airplane at the campus, an entrance by helicopter, and JET planet behind the main building our parking slots are very huge. We have grounds to play activities like basketball and pickleball ground.

data.description: Mess food is sometimes good sometimes average, I would say learn cooking for one meal beacause maybe what they made for lunch or dinner you don't eat that or don't like that.  They serve food three times a day. The canteen also serves good food.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Indus University

likes.text: Companies like BYJU'S, Assar, Electrotherm, and many companies visited the campus to recruit students and offered them an expensive job.
I appreciate the placement cell of Indus University for putting the efforts to increase the number of placements.

college_info.intro: Amity University Gwalior popular programmes are BTech, BSc and MBA. The university offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The Btech programme offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Biotechnology, Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, CSE, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Amity Gwalior is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specilisations, including International Business, Human Resource Management, Advertising, and others. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of campus life, which is exciting and amazing.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 95% of students get placed. The average package is 7 LPA. Students get placed in companies like Palo Alto, etc. Roles offered are awesome. The internship thing is also good on this campus. We get amazing opportunities. There is a good environment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the campus are awesome. We have a library, labs, an auditorium, etc. Medical facilities are also there. All facilities are good. It has an amazing mess.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are so helpful and very qualified. Semester exams are not so difficult, but are at a good standard level. The course curriculum is good. Exams level is good. NIT-qualified teachers are teaching in our college. The book authors are also, and we are extremely honored there. Faculty members are very supportive, and they give us direction for our lives and also for placements.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in International Business - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am really blessed to be in this college.

review_content.Placements: On average, more than 83% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered is 33 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 6-10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Genpact, Cognizant, IBM, etc. The percentage of students who got internships is 83%.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are top-notch. There is a Wi-Fi facility in all classrooms with a comfortable branch and library. The infrastructure is amazing, and each building has a library. The quality of facilities is available, and labs are well-equipped. Hostel facilities are good. There is good food in the hostel mess. Medical facilities are available. The quality of education is good.

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Gwalior Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with what is happening.

content.Placements: 80 per cent are placed. 24 LPA is the highest package, 2 LPA is the lowest, and the average is 2.5 LPA. MuSigma is the highest recruiting company in the State. 30% of students got an internship at Wipro and TCS. Sales and Software engineer interns are offered.
content.Infrastructure: It's available in the course/department. Wi-Fi, Labs, classrooms and the library are present. I am not a hosteller, so I can't tell much about that, but my friends are, so the food is average for everyday purposes, else the mess, canteen and medical facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great campus with excellent facilities and strict attendance.

content.Placements: 65 to 60 percent of students got placed last year. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA, the average is 6 LPA-10 LPA, and the highest is 35 LPA. Recruiting companies are Palo Alto, Infosys, and Ishan Technologies. 20 to 30 percent of students got internships from my course in TCS and Wipro. Software developer, cloud engineer, and data analyst are roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is quite good. Labs are not that good. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, libraries are big, the quality of food is great, top medical facilities, and big grounds for each sport and game. Sometimes Wi-Fi stops working for 2 or 3 days. Labs are mainly considered as a free period.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of campus life, which is exciting and amazing.

content.Placements: Approximately 95% of students get placed. The average package is 7 LPA. Students get placed in companies like Palo Alto, etc. Roles offered are awesome. The internship thing is also good on this campus. We get amazing opportunities. There is a good environment.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the campus are awesome. We have a library, labs, an auditorium, etc. Medical facilities are also there. All facilities are good. It has an amazing mess.
content.Faculty: Teachers are so helpful and very qualified. Semester exams are not so difficult, but are at a good standard level. The course curriculum is good. Exams level is good. NIT-qualified teachers are teaching in our college. The book authors are also, and we are extremely honored there. Faculty members are very supportive, and they give us direction for our lives and also for placements.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in International Business - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am really blessed to be in this college.

content.Placements: On average, more than 83% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered is 33 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 6-10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Genpact, Cognizant, IBM, etc. The percentage of students who got internships is 83%.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are top-notch. There is a Wi-Fi facility in all classrooms with a comfortable branch and library. The infrastructure is amazing, and each building has a library. The quality of facilities is available, and labs are well-equipped. Hostel facilities are good. There is good food in the hostel mess. Medical facilities are available. The quality of education is good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best university in India with good placements.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our Amity University is 98%. In our course, almost 93% of students got placed. The highest package offered is 52 LPA and the lowest package is 2.4 LPA. Companies like Bioneeds, BiOZEEN, Mankind, and GH visit the college and hire students. Internship opportunities are offered to students at Cipla and most of the students get jobs here.
content.Infrastructure: It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, parking, RO water, a sports room, and a library. We can only enter the library if we have a library ID card. It is easy to get a library ID card as we have to just fill form and attach the fee receipt. Classrooms are so clean. The infrastructure is amazing and I love it. Each department has different blocks with all facilities. Medical facilities are provided. The food in the canteen is very tasty.

admission_overview.title: Amity University Gwalior Admission Overview 2026

Students can apply online for all the courses offered at the university. Amity Gwalior offers more than 20 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. BTech, MBA, BBA are some of the top courses offered by the university. Interested students can read below to know more about the courses and admission process for Amity University Gwalior.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for Amity University Gwalior admission?

faqs.answer: Amity University makes BSc admissions based on scores in the higher secondary examination. Interested students must fill out the application form available on the official website of the university. Once the application process is concluded, the students are further shortlisted based on marks in Class 12 and the university’s respective seat intake for the concerned course. Next, the shortlisted students are required to report to the institute for document verification and fee payment. Successful fee payment completes the admission process.
faqs.question: How can I get admission BSc admission in Amity University Gwalior?

paragraphs: Amity University Gwalior admissionsstarts from January every year. The process begins with submission of online application. It is then followed by selection process and admission confirmation. Students can follow the steps given below to complete theAmity Gwalior admission process:

The mode of application for Amity University Gwalior is online. Interested candidates can submit the application form with relevant details and documents to the admission portal. As per the university's website, the application fee is fully waived off as a humanitarian measure.
The university conducts its entrance exam, AMCAT for shortlisting candidates. The university accepts students based on the following criteria:
After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay theAmity Gwalior feesto confirm their seat in the university.
lists: Merit-based admissions: For courses, such as BA, BDes, BCom, BCA, etc., Class 12 scores are the sole criteria.

Entrance-based admissions: To get admission in courses, such as MBA, BTech, BArch, etc., students need to submit valid state or national-level entrance test scores or appear for the AMCAT. The accepted exams include CAT, MAT, XAT, CUET UG, JEE Main, etc.
Academic Score + Personal Interview: For admission to most of the PG courses, such as MPhil, LLM, MA, etc., students need to appear for PI round/ university-level test.

faqs.question: Are internships a part of B.Com LLB (H) curriculum at Amity University, Gwlaior?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Gwalior acknowledges the importance of hands-on exposure by including various internship periods in the BCom LLB (H) syllabus. nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Amity Gwalior outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In 2025, Amity Gwalior's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.

outlook.description:
Amity Gwalior has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'BBA' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Amity Gwalior's rank is #93, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the Amity Gwalior latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

qs_world.description:
Amity Gwalior has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2026, Amity Gwalior fell 250 ranks to #1101 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been seen that in the 'Southern Asia' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Amity Gwalior fell 84 ranks to #362 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Gwalior Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: All rooms are well lit & well ventilated, with geysers in bathrooms & television in the common rooms. Each student is provided with a separate bed, mattress, pillow, pillow covers and sheets, almirah and study table with chair.All the hostels are Wi-Fi enabled and the student can access the net 24/7 from their rooms. The students are also provided free laundry services.

library.description: Besides a huge Central Library, the University also has five Departmental Libraries for Engineering, Management, Law, Architecture and Psychology. The libraries have a rich stock of books, digital database, on line journals (E – Resource), National / International journals with hard and soft copies, Magazines and National / Regional newspapers in Hindi and English are available for Students / Research Scholars. In addition all libraries have adequate number of computer terminals to access the Internet. The library has over 20,000 online journals. Amity has the membership of MANUPATRA, DELNET, Sodh Ganga, National Digital Library (NDL), All India Reporter, Supreme Court Cases online. All Amity students are members of Amizone-Amity Intranet Zone which allows them easy access to these journals & papers. Amity students also have the rights to access of Ebsco Host ,Taylor & Francis, IEEE, ACM Digital library etc.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Lawn Tennis, Sports Ground

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with what is happening.
reviews.review_text: It's available in the course/department. Wi-Fi, Labs, classrooms and the library are present. I am not a hosteller, so I can't tell much about that, but my friends are, so the food is average for everyday purposes, else the mess, canteen and medical facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus with excellent facilities and strict attendance.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is quite good. Labs are not that good. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, libraries are big, the quality of food is great, top medical facilities, and big grounds for each sport and game. Sometimes Wi-Fi stops working for 2 or 3 days. Labs are mainly considered as a free period.

reviews.review_heading: Review of campus life, which is exciting and amazing.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the campus are awesome. We have a library, labs, an auditorium, etc. Medical facilities are also there. All facilities are good. It has an amazing mess.

reviews.review_heading: I am really blessed to be in this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch. There is a Wi-Fi facility in all classrooms with a comfortable branch and library. The infrastructure is amazing, and each building has a library. The quality of facilities is available, and labs are well-equipped. Hostel facilities are good. There is good food in the hostel mess. Medical facilities are available. The quality of education is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university in India with good placements.
reviews.review_text: It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, parking, RO water, a sports room, and a library. We can only enter the library if we have a library ID card. It is easy to get a library ID card as we have to just fill form and attach the fee receipt. Classrooms are so clean. The infrastructure is amazing and I love it. Each department has different blocks with all facilities. Medical facilities are provided. The food in the canteen is very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in short.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available. Staff and all are so good. Also, wardens are very supportive. Food is really tasty. All sports are available and coaches are also allotted. We have Wi-Fi and classes are very comfortable. Our campus has best environment for learning. Library has all the necessary resources. The campus is also very beautiful and we are allowed to walk freely.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, helpful faculty, and decent placements, but more industry exposure is needed.
reviews.review_text: Amity University Gwalior offered good Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels were clean with decent rooms, the mess food was average, the canteen had a variety, medical help was available, and sports facilities were well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities in our state.
reviews.review_text: The university offers separate hostels for male and female students, with options for single, double, or triple occupancy. Rooms are fully furnished with beds, study tables, wardrobes, and chairs. It is equipped with 24x7 high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure, has Ph.D. qualified teachers', and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Amity University has a very good and attractive infrastructure, which is comfortable for students to survive in various places. They have digital classrooms and a fully air-conditioned campus, which is very comfortable for students. They also have a lift facility.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend this college to all the people who want some good opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Amity University Gwalior has incredible infrastructure on all campuses. The hostel facilities are also good. The food tastes amazing. Labs have all-new equipment. The Wi-Fi speed is amazing it connects all around. On campus, every area is covered with Wi-Fi. The library is also good and all the spots have fast access of Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and the hostel and mess are average.
reviews.review_text: Hostels were good but a bit costly for everyone, I guess. The food was usually average, not that good, not that bad, but it was just sufficient for you to live. Then we came to the infrastructure, which was really good. They provided great surroundings to live in. We have too many activities that keep going around which will help you to find your space anyhow.

reviews.review_heading: Amity is a synonym of success.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi, labs, etc. I love it. Classrooms are structured. The library is very good. Classrooms are AC. We have an ambulance. Doctors are available for contingency. The college has a photo lab, TV lab,  cinema lab, and editing lab. They have cameras and lights.

reviews.review_heading: We have a great campus and life.
reviews.review_text: The college has studio labs, a photos lab, an editing lab, an animation lab, a fact check lab, a library, a Wi-Fi, lab, ICT-enabled classes, an AC campus, and a well-equipped gym. The quality of the mess is good and the hostel cab opted with and without AC. The college provides 24x7 power supply. Doctors are available throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best place to grow and study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good and positive. It has anticipated and sophisticated classrooms, spacious sports facilities, and well-equipped labs. Campuses are frequently large and kept up nicely. Although opinions differ, many emphasize good Wi-Fi and sufficient facilities. The environment is very positive there.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and good campus.
reviews.review_text: On the campus, Wi-Fi is available. The library is available. Classrooms are fully furnished, and labs are good. The hostel infrastructure is good. Medical facilities are good. The mess food is good. Rules in the hostel are just like jail, which is only one negative thing in the hostel. The infrastructure is good.

data.description: Amity University Gwalior has anti ragging cell. The Institute takes action against the students involved in ragging. Ragging is banned in the campus and students have the penalities. The institution has implemented strict anti-ragging measures which including awareness programs, counseling services and a dedicated helpline for students.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Amity University, Gwalior

likes.text: This year also MNCs like Wipro, TCS, Goggle, Microsoft, Cognizant, etc., visited this university and provided wonderful job opportunities to the students.
Faculty members and the course curriculum at Amity grooms the students well to perform nicely during placements.

likes.text: It has Wi-Fi classrooms, labs, and library in each department, a medical room for the students, sports court and indoor games room, etc.
In short words, no college can beat Amity University in terms of providing facilities regarding infrastructure, discipline and modern educational facilities.

college_info.intro:
Alliance University courses are offered at various levels and through its various constituent schools. The University has more than 10 schools and offers programmes at UG, PG, and PhD levels through them. Some of the most popular Alliance University schools are Alliance School of Business, Alliance School of Engineering and Design, Alliance School of Law, Alliance Ascent College, etc.
Alliance University popular programmes are BTech, MBA, and BA LLB. The university offers these programmes in full-time mode and strives to provide comprehensive learning to students. Further, some of the most popular specialisations offered in the Alliance University BTech programme are given below:
Apart from this, the university also offers a 2-year MBA programme at the PG level. Alliance University MBA programme includes industry interactions, case study analysis, group presentations, field projects, and company visits to develop the practical skills of the students. Candidates can check the Alliance University Bangalore popular programmes in the table given below:

admission_overview.title: Alliance University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: The university provides UG and PG programs across streans, namely Management, Engineering, Commerce, Law and more. The university offers more than 20 courses. The admission process at Alliance University is a mix of merit-based and entrance exams for various courses such as BTech, MBA etc. Further, factors such as overall profile, academic background, work experience, entrance exam score, versatility, and achievements are also considered for the final selection of the applicant. Alliance University Bangalore admission 2026 is entrance-based for most of the courses. Alliance University accepts national-level entrance exams and conducts AUSAT, Alliance AMAT and ARAT to select candidates for a few courses. The university offers more than 20 courses through various schools at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams like Engineering, Management, Commerce, etc.

eligibility_selection.title: Alliance University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Alliance University Bangalore offers courses in Engineering, Management, Accounting and Commerce, Science etc. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection conditions. Moreover, candidates who are looking for PhD admission need to sit and appear for the Alliance Research Aptitude Test + PI + evaluation of the research synopsis on the proposed dissertation work. Other scholastic and extracurricular records and work experience will be taken into account. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular Alliance University courses:
