paragraphs: The admission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list or counselling, and other steps. Check below the Alliance University admission process:

The mode of application is online for all courses (apply.alliance.edu.in). Candidates must pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to apply for admission. Once the candidate completes the payment, aspirants will receive a notification email acknowledging the payment.

The applicant will have to select a date for their Alliance Selection process (A full-day immersion where students will solve real-life problems and be evaluated by a panel on their overall performance. It is designed to help and appreciate the candidature better and also provide a glimpse of the innovative approach to evaluation, teaching and learning.)

Once the Alliance Selection Process is completed, the Admissions team will evaluate every profile and results will be declared on the same day. Students can either be Selected, Waitlisted or Rejected*.
*Rejected students cannot apply to the same program in the same year.
Step 2.1: Alliance University PhD Admission Process

Candidates must sit and appear for the Alliance Research Aptitude Test for PhD course admissions. The application fee is INR 3,000. Once the candidates qualify for the entrance exam, they further need to sit for a personal interview + evaluation of the research synopsis on proposed dissertation work and other parameters such as scholastic and extracurricular records and work experience are used for admission. The final selection of the candidate will be based on the overall performance in the admission selection process.

All applications are reviewed by the selection committee. Candidates are evaluated based on the candidate’s performance in the national entrance exam or Alliance entrance exam, academic performance through school and college and their involvement in extra-curricular activities and the performance in various aspects on the selection day.

faqs.question: Are Alliance University admission open?
faqs.answer: Alliance University admisison open. The institute accepts admission based on merit. Students can apply directly through the official page. Candidates can apply directly through the official website. Before applying students check the eligibility criteria set by the university for the desired course.

faqs.answer: No, students can get direct admission at Alliance University. The university accepts admission based on merit and entrance exams. The university offers admission to an MBA programme based on the Alliance Management Aptitude Test (AMAT) followed by a personal interview. Students holding a valid score in any National or state-level exams such as CAT/ XAT/ GMAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ NMAT can also get into the Alliance University. faqs.question: How can I get admission in Alliance University Bangalore?
faqs.answer: A pass in bachelor’s degree or equivalent with 50% aggregate (45% in case of SC/ ST candidates) is required to apply for the MBA course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at later stages of admission. Apart from fulfiling the qualifications, candidates also need to pass MAT,  CAT,  Alliance-MAT,  XAT,  NMAT,  CMAT,  KMAT or GMAT for admission to MBA course followed by Oral Extempore Presentation and personal interview. The school also considers the academic performance of the aspirants for providing admission.

faqs.question: Can I get into Alliance University with 60% in class 12?
faqs.answer: Applicants looking for admissions through COMEDK exam need to have at least 50% aggregate marks in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics (45% for SC, ST and OBC candidates of Karnataka) as compulsory subjects and at least 50% marks in aggregate of the 10+2 level examination (45% for SC, ST and OBC candidates of Karnataka) or passed 10+3 Diploma examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC, ST and OBC candidates of Karnataka) and should have passed these subjects individually.

description: Alliance University, Bangalore cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Alliance University, Bangalore Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 26690 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 10317 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Alliance University, Bangalore. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 26690 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 11560.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Alliance University, Bangalore accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B TECH IN ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND MACHINE LEARNING has the lowest cutoff rank of 26742 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Alliance University, Bangalore B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering stood at 61682 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 39198. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was less competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

reviews.review_heading: Great university with vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: It has one of the best infrastructures, well maintained and student centric campus with well organized classrooms, AC, Wi-Fi, library, labsbloomberg terminals, study rooms, cafes, inside the campus, ending machines. Hostels are available for both boys and girls, single, double, triple and all kinds of rooms are available. Seminars, workshops, industrial visits, and events are conducted to keep students engaged and enhance their learning and also have different types of clubs.

reviews.review_heading: It offers a good learning environment and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: Our course has good Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, updated labs, and a big library. Hostel rooms are clean, and the mess food is decent. Sports areas, a gym, and medical help are always available, which makes the campus overall comfortable. There is greenery in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading:
Everything here is well 
.
reviews.review_text: The college provides very good and clean facilities. The hostel has many rooms, which are available in 1, 2, 3, and 4 sharing options. The food quality is not too bad; every day we have a variety of veg and non-veg. Overall, the food is manageable. The food facility in my college is good because we have many options, and once a day we will get non-veg, maybe at lunch or dinner. There will be food fest stuff, overall good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and the campus.
reviews.review_text: College life is very good. Campus is full of greenery and the campus is very beautiful. The hostel facilities are also good. Labs are well-equipped. Rooms are cleaned every week. Mess is also good here, they provide good food 4 times a day.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great college overall.
reviews.review_text: It's a green campus. Obviously, it's very calm and beautiful to be around. You get to see students from all over the world. The food is top-notch. They provide South Indian and North Indian food for the students. Non-veg food is provided almost every day.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, really good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so good, the college is filled with greenery, and there are facilities of CCTV, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities in the hostel includes food and laundry facilities as well. Food quality is so good available in the mess and canteen. There is always a doctor available for medical purposes, and also there are different grounds and coaches available for games and sports, including all the facilities. The college also has a gymnasium, Zumba, and ...

reviews.review_heading: Alliance University, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: College adds proper meals to the food menu of students, especially those studying in the hostels. They take too much care about the physical and mental health of the students. College also adds other physical activities like sports, library hours, and yoga classes to help relieve their stress.

reviews.review_heading: Alliance University B.Tech, is it absolutely worth studying here?
reviews.review_text: Everything is just amazing infrastructure-wise. I would suggest that it doesn't matter to you until you need it. So it is great here to take admission, and campus is so widespread. Infrastructure is good, food is better at college hostel mess, and there are many other food stalls on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Very bad faculty members but good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
Block is not good, 6 floors for every period. They change from one floor to another. I will say that BBA is good. I won't recommend it for B.Tech,
law is good. Some hostels are very bad and now this year they have built new hostels. I recommend better to take PG hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Here at Alliance, faculty members are good really, good infrastructure, and excellent college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Hostels are also beautiful. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The hostel food is good. They also conduct food festivals for a penny a month. They provide 4 times a day. Medical facilities are also good. There are many sports clubs, you can join any club.

reviews.review_heading: College is fun, and you can explore many things, but studies are more important here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good, and the campus is also big. Facilities are good as well. You can access the library till 12 o’clock.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and good upcoming placements.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. Wi-Fi is super on the entire campus. North and South food is available in the canteen. Classrooms have a good infrastructure. We will not see the library in our lives. The infrastructure is peaceful. It has everything for sports and games. It has a big ground to play and enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. The campus life is not that great. We do have events going on here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, and it is not like other colleges. The Mac lab is provided. We can go and work anytime we want. The library is open all the time. The security is really great. Classrooms have good ventilation and help to keep students seated for long hours.

reviews.review_heading: A really good college with great infrastructure and vibes.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, I would say, as it is designed and architected in an amazing way. The college has a peaceful vibration and many plants and trees. You will get Wi-Fi coverage in every nook and corner of the college, except for the bathrooms. Talking of bathrooms, they are available almost every 100 meters and are very clean as well. There are a lot of games to play, football, badminton, cricket, tennis, table tennis, basketball, and much more.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college placements, and the infrastructure is really nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. The mess food is good compared to other mess food. There are various sports facilities available, with different coaches for different sports. There is a clinic inside the campus and an ambulance, which is available 24/7.

paragraphs: Alliance University offers various scholarships to meritorious students to support their education. Various scholarships are provided to students such as Merit-based Scholarships, Category-based Scholarships, Alumni Scholarships, Employee Scholarships, etc. Students who wish to enroll in any course at Alliance University will have to score a good percentage as a part of the selection process. Apart from this, students should also meet other criteria that Alliance University has chosen to avail of the scholarship. Alliance University will provide a concession in fees based on marks scored in the qualifying exams.
Given below are the types of scholarships offered at Alliance University:

These scholarships are offered to support outstanding students who have demonstrated exceptional academic performance, talent, or other achievements. The university offers merit-based scholarships under three categories given below:
Alliance University Scholastic Aptitude Test Freeships
CUET Scholarship for all UG Programmes:

Alliance University offers Programme Specific Merit Scholarships to students seeking admission in various courses such as BA LLB (Hons.), BBA LLB (Hons.), LLB, BTech, BA, BSc, BFA, BVA, BDes, and many more. The college has different eligibility criteria for several entrance exams, including CLAT, LSAT, JEE Main, SAT, UCEED, NIFT, NID DAT, and IPMAT.
Positions in the South Zone or National Youth Festival (University Level)
B.Sc. (Hons.) - Psychology B.Sc. (Hons.) - Film and Television Production
LL. M. & Master in Public Policy

Alliance University provides scholarships to its alumni, their spouses, children, and siblings specifically for tuition fees only, allowing them to focus on achieving their academic and professional goals.
Alliance University offers a scholarship facility for our employees to the doctoral as well as executive programmes offered at Alliance University.
Note: The scholarship is valid during the service of the employees. Children of the employees should go through the selection process and must be selected.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering programmes is around INR 1,23,556 to 4,38,260.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Average college for the average marks.

review_content.Placements: In my college, campus placements are so less. It is about 30-40%. It is also very hard. 30-40% got placed because they tried from the outside courses. They put more effort into getting placed. Before 2022, there were good placements, In 2023 and 2024, there were not good placements. The highest package in our department is 7 LPA. The lowest is 3.4 LPA. TCS is one of the companies which hire the most students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good but not as the expected life like an engineering student wants. The campus gathered all the colleges in a little bit of area. Pharmacy, polytechnic, MBA, and MCA branches are in one building. There is no hostel service for boys. There is only a girls' hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good, with good infrastructure and environment.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students were placed in 2023. 10 LPA was the highest package for 5-6 students in the top company. TCS, Capgemini, Cognizant and many other companies are recruiting. 35% of students got internships from Sankey Solutions. Website development and software development were the top roles offered .
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and there is hostel only for girls Canteen food is average. There should be more varieties and good taste for the canteen food. There is a sports ground for the students for various sports and games. There are also indoor sports like chess, carrom, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college of engineering.

content.Placements: The college provides very good placements. The highest salary package offered is 26 LPA - 20 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA - 9 LPA. The lowest is 3.25 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The worst hostel I have ever seen. While taking admission, it showed a lot of facilities like a water filter, a study table, a lift, etc. Now it's almost 3 months after taking admission; they have not given study tables till now. The lift has not been working for 3 months. They are making false promises. The college is good, very clean. We have good Wi-Fi. Outer is available. The college canteen is well. Food is like home food, great college. Awesome experience to live here. The rector and the staff are very well-mannered. Food quality is great, and they provide daily cleaning in hostel rooms. The place is quite peaceful, mostly during exam periods. Overall, the experience is great to live here. Fully recommend them because they provide complete security to the girls. A very good hostel has several facility shortcomings. The non-functional lift poses a convenience, while the intermittent hot water supply disrupts daily routine. Moreover, the absence of study tables hampers academic productivity. Improved maintenance and essential amenities like functional lifts, consistent hot water, and study areas are essential for enhancing the overall hostel experience.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I had a most enjoyable journey at the college.

content.Placements: 85% of students get placed through the college campus drive. The highest package is 5 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are RevBoosters and Trimech India. Internships are provided to 70 students. From internships, students are selected as full-time employees in the same organisation.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available, but all sports equipment is available. The mess is very clean and hygienic. There are large monitors for digital learning. A MacBook lab is also present for engineering students to work and understand more effectively.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average college for the average marks.

content.Placements: In my college, campus placements are so less. It is about 30-40%. It is also very hard. 30-40% got placed because they tried from the outside courses. They put more effort into getting placed. Before 2022, there were good placements, In 2023 and 2024, there were not good placements. The highest package in our department is 7 LPA. The lowest is 3.4 LPA. TCS is one of the companies which hire the most students.
content.Infrastructure: Good but not as the expected life like an engineering student wants. The campus gathered all the colleges in a little bit of area. Pharmacy, polytechnic, MBA, and MCA branches are in one building. There is no hostel service for boys. There is only a girls' hostel.

content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and there is hostel only for girls Canteen food is average. There should be more varieties and good taste for the canteen food. There is a sports ground for the students for various sports and games. There are also indoor sports like chess, carrom, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Enhance and grow with JSPM.

content.Placements: The course Is Information Technology; in this, the syllabus is provided by the SPPU university. The placement is really better in IT depth than other departments. The average package is 10 Lacs and minimum is 3.5 Lacs. The students need to do internships and other courses.
content.Infrastructure: I am not living at the hostel. The infrastructure is awesome, and Wi-Fi is also available. Classrooms and also labs are available. Also, the ground is so huge for sports. reviews.review_text: Good but not as the expected life like an engineering student wants. The campus gathered all the colleges in a little bit of area. Pharmacy, polytechnic, MBA, and MCA branches are in one building. There is no hostel service for boys. There is only a girls' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, with good infrastructure and environment.
reviews.review_text:
Good infrastructure and there is hostel only for girls
Canteen food is average. There should be more varieties and good taste for the canteen food.
There is a sports ground for the students for various sports and games.
There are also indoor sports like chess, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Enhance and grow with JSPM.
reviews.review_text:
I am not living at the hostel. 
The infrastructure is awesome, and Wi-Fi is also available. Classrooms and also labs are available.
Also, the ground is so huge for sports.
The lab has PCs and Wi-Fi systems that help to perform practical tasks and help to gain practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Best decision is to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is excellent. College labs are equipped with advanced tools Wi-Fi is present in every classroom and library. The library is very big; we have many PCs in the library. You can read books on those or get physical books from the library. The hostel is separate for girls and boys. Our hostel is very strict; no one without an ID or password can enter the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Dandiya night, industrial trip, freshers, farewell, and Western Day are all celebrated on campus. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, lab and libraries. Classrooms have fans, AC and projectors. Every department has a separate club where students work on projects. The hostel has a large walking area, and the ground and mess have separate spaces. 38,000 fees for hostels and 24,000 for mess every year.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, low fees and satisfied with faculty of 2024 batch.
reviews.review_text: College has the finest infrastructure with ICT classrooms and fully Wi-Fi campus. Library is online and offline both with book availability. The canteen is very clean and provides healthy and good food with low rates. There are cafeterias such like Nescafe and various juice centers.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of my BE journey.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus was located in a very vast area. Wi-Fi connection was available throughout the entire campus, including labs, classrooms, library, etc. The canteen at the college was good. There were no hostel facilities available during my course. Labs had working computers.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Our college has 2 buildings. We have a very small ground and a small sports room. All facilities are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is available for girls. The hostel facility is not available for boys. They have to rent a private room. It charges a high fee. Our college is small. They provide many facilities. They provide few sports facilities. The library has limited books.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in the 2022.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good but the administration need to look after student demands while making teams for organizing cultural events. Library services should change according to student needs. Need to update the outdated curriculum .

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college of engineering for the 12th professionals.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure here are not so good because there is a network issue all over the college its so frustrating to students. The classrooms are clean and the library also. The canteen is the most beautiful thing in this college because there is so much for a person.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus infrastructure. Placements are moderate. Good faculty support .
reviews.review_text: Good campus infrastructure. Good canteen is provided on campus but campus students want two canteens because one is not sufficient. Ground is there but not big is size.  Class infrastructure & laboratory environment is good. Wi-Fi is provided in class and computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides quality education.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities. Free Wi-Fi is available in classrooms and labs. Our college has a library for students. Students can borrow books from the library. Our college provides a girls' hostel. The boys' hostel is not available in our college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering

likes.text: Some top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, Xoriant, Wipro, Capgemini, Amazon, etc., visit our college for placements.
Placements are excellent, and the main motto of our college is to provide placements to every student who is capable.

college_info.intro:
Dayalbagh Educational Institute Agra, offers various courses to students at the UG and PG levels. The Institute also offers various Certificate and Diploma programmes to students across several specialisations. DEI Agra flagship courses include BTech and BSc programmes, which are offered to students for a duration of 4 years and 3 years, respectively.
DEI Agra admission is offered to candidates on the basis of merit and entrance, therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 60% in Class 12. In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in previously attempted examinations. Dayal Bagh Agra courses are offered with a tuition fee ranging from INR 5.3K to INR 34.8 K.
For more information, check out the video below:

faqs.answer: Yes, Dayalbagh Educational Institute (DEI) accepts admission into most of its programmes based on the Written Objective Test conducted by DEI. Candidates who haven’t appeared CUET exam can apply through the entrance exam conducted by Dayalbagh Educational Institute.Candidates selected based on their performance in the entrance mentioned above exam can register for the counselling process through Dayalbagh Educational Institute registered portal, followed by document verification and fee payment.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission in DEI without CUET?

faqs.answer: The institute offers BTech in various specialisations. Candidates from the Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics streams securing at least 60% normalized marks or normalized CGPA of 6.00 out of 10 in Mathematics in the intermediate of Class 12 of any recognised board of secondary education would be eligible for admission to the BTech programme. For SC/ST category, a 5% concession is given on Class 12 marks.Admission Procedure: Following scheme of weightage will be given for marks scored at class XII/X level and JEE (Main)Maximum weightage % for High SchoolMaximum weightage % for IntermediateMaximum Weightage % for Admission Test in OnlineSupervised mode Marks of Interview in Online and Cocurricular Activities Certificates5%15%60%20%Candidates should appear in the Joint Entrance Examination (Main)-2013 conducted.

Earlier, 63% of students were placed during Dayalbagh Educational Institute MBA placements 2022 and the median package in 2022 was the same as in 2023, i.e. INR 3.60 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: DEI Agra Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in AI andRobotics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure, but the college life is not too good.

content.Placements: So, since I am in 2nd year, no one is placed, but the batch that passed this year had around 40 students, approximately and 10 have been placed. The highest package that my senior got is around 13 LPA, but he got off-campus placement, so I can't say college is good at placement.
content.Infrastructure: Well, the infrastructure has all the things needed for our course, all the labs, equipment, Wi-Fi, and we have a library in every faculty. The girls' and boys canteen is different, the boys canteen staff are rude, and the food is not enjoyable as well. Teachers are great, and the engineering faculty has IITs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Completely satisfied with placements, good faculty members.

content.Placements: Almost all students get placed with an average package of 6 LPA, and the top recruitment companies are Honda, Tata, JSW Group, etc. The roles offered are GET, and you become an assistant manager in one year, so a decent managerial post is offered by companies, which is a white-collar job.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the course is well-maintained, and the basic necessary infrastructure is provided for the course. The canteen is not very good, having very little food variety, but the books in the library are provided for every semester at a very basic price. In addition, you can issue books from the library using your library card.

Recruiting companies were Schlumberger, Maruti Suzuki, Honda, Eicher, and Volvo. 100% of students got internships in mechanical, automobile, civil, and electrical.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very good. Infrastructure was very good, and the maintenance was proper. The quality and facilities were very good. Hostel food was very good like home. Hostel fee was very cheap. Canteen food was also good. Medical facilities were available, and this was a very good college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Footwear Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This college is amazing for middle-class students because it has the lowest fee in all of India.

content.Placements: Footwear technology from Dayalbagh Educational Institute gave almost 100% placement because in Agra, there are many leather industries and good opportunities to start our own business. Students gave their best for placement and to maintain the college's reputation.
content.Infrastructure: Dayalbagh Educational Institute gives best lab, library, and classroom experience for all students. On college campus, there are four hostels, junior boys' and girls' hostel, and senior boys' and girls' hostel.
content.Faculty: As I know, Faculty of Engineering faculties are such amazing teacher, the best teacher has lots of knowledge. Course curriculum is too relevant to students and prepares them for good industry experience. College exams are difficult because they are conducted as open-book exams therefore, exams are tough. The department of Faculty of Engineering is too kind and moral.

admission_overview.college_name: DEI Agra Admission 2025: Eligibility, Admission Process & Fees

paragraphs: Dayalbagh Educational Institute (DEI), admission 2025is based on candidates' performance in the qualifying exam. DEI offers a wide range of certificate, diploma, UG, PG, and doctoral level courses under various specialisations. Dayalbagh Educational Institute courses admission is based onacademic merit,Written Objective testsconducted byDayalbagh Educational Institute, andInterviews. Besides DEI’s entrance exam, the deemed university also accepts admission through national-level entrance exams such asJEE-Main, CUET, andNATA, among many others.
Check the below infographic to know more about Dayalbagh Educational Institute (DEI), admission process:

Dayalbagh Educational Institute is Deemed to be a University. The DEI application process for 2025 hasclosedand will open for 2025 admission. These are some more highlights regarding Dayalbagh Educational Institute admission:
Certificate, Diploma, UG, PG and Doctoral-level courses
Note:The information mentioned in the above table is sourced from various internet sources, Hence, is indicative.

Dayabagh Educational Institute (DEI) offers a wide array of certificate, diploma, UG, PG and doctoral level courses across various specialisations. DEI inducts students in its various programmes based on academic merit and entrance exams. Check out details such as eligibility and selection criteria for some of the most opted courses by students at Dayalbagh Educational Institute.

Click hereto check out the admission process for other courses offered at DEI.

Dayalbagh Educational Institute fee structure includes tuition, library, development etc. The tuition fees range fromINR 650 to INR 35,000. Candidates must pay the fees to secure their desired seat at DEI. Also, candidates are required to pay an application fee, caution deposit, processing charge, etc.

Coming to the seat intake, BTech and UG Diploma have a lot of fees which are more than 500 seats, and other courses, such as BSc and M.A have less intake. Find below the course-wisetuition fee of DEI, and seat details:
NOTE:The fees available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

Dayalbagh Educational Institute provides scholarship and financial assistance to students belonging to categories including Kashmiri Migrants, Economically Weaker Section (EWS), OBC, SC, ST. No SC/ST/OBC/EWS can claim the reservation unless they clear the national/state-level entrance exam.
NOTE:The seat information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

Candidates must complete the entire admission process of Dayalbagh Educational Institute (DEI) for admission to its offered courses. The admission process includes the application process, selection procedure, merit list, etc. Find below the DEI admission process 2025:

Candidates must visit the DEI official website to fill out the application form before the last date using the submission of Common Application Form which is available on the Institute’s websitehttp://www.dei.ac.in. Candidates can opt for the offline application form as well which will be available at the Institute Counter.

The institute conducts written tests for the eligible candidates. Candidates must make the selection of the Examination Centre from where the candidate will appear for all exams during the tenure of the programme. The DEI written test will last for two hours and based on the course curriculum.

DEI selection procedure includes the candidate's performance in Written Objective tests conducted by Dayalbagh Educational Institute, and Interviews. Besides DEI’s entrance exam, the deemed university also accepts admission through national-level entrance exams such as JEE-Main, CUET, and NATA, among many others.
Once the candidates are selected are called for final admission. Candidates must pay the admission fee and secure their desired course seats at the Institution.
For more information check out the below video:

faqs.question: How do I get admission to DEI Agra?
faqs.answer: Dayalbagh Educational Institute (DEI) accepts admission into its programmes based on academic merit, written objective tests and interviews (in some cases). Aspiring candidates must apply for the written test through DEI official website by paying the application fee of INR 270.Selected candidates can register for the counselling process, and to complete the counselling and admission process, candidates need to report to the admission cell at DEI for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Is BTech available in Dayalbagh Educational Institute?
faqs.answer: Dayalbagh Educational Institute (DEI) offers a four-year full-time BTech programme across five specialisations. Dayalbagh Educational Institute accepts admission into BTech courses through JEE-Main score/ rank.Candidates with a valid JEE-Main rank above the closing rank specified in thecut-off listreleased by the university’s website can register for the counselling process through DEI official website, followed by document verification and fee payment for final seat allotment.

faqs.question: What is the process of direct admission at Dayalbagh Educational Institute for BTech Lateral Entry?
faqs.answer: The BTech Lateral Entry (LE) scheme is one of the lateral pathways that the Institute offers to its meritorious students of various Diploma levels and prescribed BVoc programmes. Candidates should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria to get admission to the BTech Lateral Entry programme. The criteria is that the candidate should have passed Class 12 with 50% aggregate in PCM from a recognised board along with scoring good marks in JEE Main. The candidates have to apply online from the institute

faqs.question: What type of question are asked in Dayalbagh Educational Institute interview (B.Tech)?
faqs.answer:
Hi,

You may be asked about the reasons of your preference of this subject, about your career plans pertaining to this subject and also may be about some technical case studies related to your subject. So prepare accordingly. 

Hope this information helps. Please feel free to revert. 

Wish you luck.

placement_report.college_name: DEI Agra Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Dayalbagh Educational Institute Agra Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to the NIRF report 2024, 94 MBA, 205 BTech and 27 MTech students were placed during DEI placements 2023. The median package offered to MBA students in 2023 was INR 3.60 LPA. The median package for BTech and MTech courses was INR 6 LPA and INR 7.75 LPA . BTech median package increased by nearly 15% as compared with 2022. The MBA placement rate decreased by 11% in 2023.

tables.context: What is the highest package offered at Dayalbagh E
Is there 100% placement in DEI Agra?

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Dayalbagh Educational Institute placements?
faqs.answer: The Dayalbagh Educational Institute the highest package has not been released. However, the median package is available in the NIRF report. The highest median package for 2023 stood at INR 7.75 LPA and was offered to M.Tech students. Tabulated below are the median package trends from Dayalbagh Educational Institute placements 2021 to 2023: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) BTech INR 4.40 LPA INR 5.20 LPA INR 6 LPA MBA INR 3.50 LPA INR 3.60 LPA INR 3.60 LPA MTech INR 5 LPA INR 5 LPA INR 7.75 LPA NOTE: The above salary data is fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: Is there 100% placement in DEI Agra?
faqs.answer: The institute has a decent placement record. During 2023 placements, the highest median package was offered to M.Tech students and the amount stood at INR 7.75 LPA. Furthermore, the highest placement rate was recorded for BTech (75%). Check the complete insights of DEI Agra placements 2023 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (BTech) 272 Students placed (BTech) 205 Median package (BTech) INR 6 LPA Total students (MTech) 45 Students placed (MTech) 27 Median package (MTech) INR 7.75 LPA Total students (MBA) 180 Students placed (MBA) 94 Median package (MBA) INR 3.60 LPA NOTE: The above details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: Are there any options available in DEI Agra with 120k in AYUSH?
faqs.answer: At DEI Agra, candidates can only get a single option which is of Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS). As per DEI Agra cutoff 2024 , the institute had released BHMS course at a cutoff rank of 1321964 for the General AI category candidates. Comparing the acquired cutoff it is possible to get into DEI Agra with 120k rank under General AI category.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure, but the college life is not too good.
reviews.review_text: Well, the infrastructure has all the things needed for our course, all the labs, equipment, Wi-Fi, and we have a library in every faculty. The girls' and boys canteen is different, the boys canteen staff are rude, and the food is not enjoyable as well. Teachers are great, and the engineering faculty has IITs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational InstituteReviewed on 29 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Completely satisfied with placements, good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is well-maintained, and the basic necessary infrastructure is provided for the course. The canteen is not very good, having very little food variety, but the books in the library are provided for every semester at a very basic price. In addition, you can issue books from the library using your library card.

reviews.review_heading: College is the best for middle-class students because it is affordable all over Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: In Dayalbagh Educational Institute, classrooms are amazing with smart boards, and labs are fully equipped, the library is digital, and all kinds of books are available. Hostels are above average and have good facilities for all students, and are most affordable for all students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by DEI Technical CollegeReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Mechanical branch is very good. Dayalbagh provides 100 placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were very good. Infrastructure was very good, and the maintenance was proper. The quality and facilities were very good. Hostel food was very good like home. Hostel fee was very cheap. Canteen food was also good. Medical facilities were available, and this was a very good college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational InstituteReviewed on 4 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is amazing for middle-class students because it has the lowest fee in all of India.
reviews.review_text: Dayalbagh Educational Institute gives best lab, library, and classroom experience for all students. On college campus, there are four hostels, junior boys' and girls' hostel, and senior boys' and girls' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good experience overall, but faculty support during placements and needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are wonderful. All course departments have Wi-Fi, and also provide labs for each department for practical purposes. Classrooms are so airy and clean. Library area is peaceful for study, thousands of books are available for study, and staff is so helpful.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Faculty of Science, Dayalbagh Educational InstituteReviewed on 12 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are great with placements.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, labs, and library that are accessible up to 24 hours. Food quality is good. The ambiance is nice. The best medical staff must say which is available 24/7. The house mistress is so helpful with our issues. On weekends like Saturday and Sunday, we play games like badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is the best, as we do various types of activities in our studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility was available all over the campus. Canteens called Jugaadu Canteen, had a day-wise routine. Our college also organized extracurricular activities. The infrastructure was awesome, and there were two more canteens for boys and the other for girls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Faculty of Science, Dayalbagh Educational InstituteReviewed on 18 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: DEI is a beautiful phase of life.
reviews.review_text: College provides us with many facilities like free Wi-Fi for all students within faculty members. Labs are designed for students with computer science and for others too. A dedicated library is there for students who want some pace to study. Hostels are available with a minimum fee with all facilities like medical, food, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational InstituteReviewed on 26 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are all quite good, and there is nothing we can complain about. The infrastructure available for our course includes a comprehensive library with all kinds of books, well-maintained classrooms, and labs. The quality of the hostel is also good considering the charges, and the food provided in the mess and canteen is satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: This college is outstanding with a great ROI.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is well-mannered and has a learning environment; the food is good, the staff is also excellent, the washrooms are clean, and the strict chief warden is good in behaviour and always sorts out the student's problems. Hostel has a separate playground for hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for those who don’t have much money to spend on studies.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is provided. Labs are good. Classrooms are average. The only problem with the classrooms is timing and location, as these two things are not permanent or fixed. Timing and class locations change pretty much all the time. Overall, it is fine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Faculty of Social Science, Dayalbagh Educational InstituteReviewed on 26 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Really good experience with this fees.
reviews.review_text: Overall, there are good hostel facilities with food, a library, a mess, and a playground. Good quality food is provided by the college authority. Sports facilities are also good. The college organizes sports functions every year for every faculty member, and winning teams and faculty also get goodies, winning prizes, medals, and much more.

Libraries are designed in such a way that they have all the essential resources, including textbooks, reference material, and other things, and classrooms are also equipped with modern technology, and labs are well maintained with the latest tools for the experimenter and project engineer. Hostel and canteen facilities are also provided with hygiene. Medical facilities are also ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Faculty of Social Science, Dayalbagh Educational InstituteReviewed on 29 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: DEI is an amazing university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of DEI is above average. We have our lab classes on Thursdays and Fridays and speed of Wi-Fi is also good. Central library, which is famous at DEI, is open from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Almost all books are available in the library and infrastructure of the classrooms is also good. I am not staying in the hostel. Sports and game facilities are amazing and good quality food is served in the canteen.

The college offers all the all facilities for students, including academic blocks, a library, collaboration spaces, a café, a convenience store, etc. The campus offers a modern infrastructure. Further, it has good infrastructure which includes designed classrooms, 24/7 computer labs, a modern library, a huge auditorium, etc.

highlights.summary: The UCEED 2026 results have been announced for admission to the BDes course. The counselling is scheduled to begin on Apr 21, 2026.

college_info.intro: Chitkara Design School offers courses in UG and PG level, wherein, BDes and MDes are reflected as the popular programmes among the students. The Institute offers these courses in full-time mode for the duration of 2 years to 4 years. Admission to these courses require for candidates to qualify Class 12 and graduation with 50% of minimum aggregate. In addition to this, candidates must qualify UCEED entrance exam. CDS Chandigarh tuition fees ranges from INR 6 Lakh to INR 12 Lakh. For more details, Chitkara Design School popular programmes are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Chitkara Design School, Chitkara University, Chandigarh offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Animation. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Des and BFA. Whereas, at PG level, Chitkara Design School, Chitkara University, Chandigarh offers courses such as M.Des and MFA. Chitkara Design School, Chitkara University, Chandigarh fee structure for all the courses is around INR 6,00,000 to 12,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Animation - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Many opportunities are available for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very good. The security facility is great. It enables us to work late at night in the studios. The latest equipment is available to prepare us for the industry standards.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are supportive and knowledgeable. They have a great grasp of the subject they teach. They also keep giving us tips on how to survive in the industry. The jury system helps students to get an overview of where they stand in the journey. Faculty members and jury members are all industry experts who are well-connected with the industry. They guide us on our creative journey and also advise us on our creative practices. They also help us to get into the best network. Teachers help us with our projects as well. The course is for 4 years.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college for students.

review_content.Placements: All students got placed in this course. Many exchange programs are conducted to showcase our talents along with various events. The compensation package is also excellent. Internships are also offered at this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. All classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college. Laboratories are perfect. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. I am a day scholar, I do not know about hostel facilities. I have heard from friends that the hostel is good. The food served in the mess is excellent. There is a gym facility in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in User Experience - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: An Average Chitkarians life.

content.Placements: 60-70 percent were placed in our course from the previous batch, so from my knowledge, it is 8.5 LPA. Many companies come, like Wipro and many more, so according to me, 70 percent of students get internships, but it is based on student knowledge too, so it may differ. The top roles offered are UX Designer, Senior UX Designer, or UI Designer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our block, which is named Picasso Block, is amazing. It is one of the best blocks on our campus, and the classrooms are also good. The library is different for every course, like designing different and engineering different, but there is a main library too. The mess food is below average, and the canteen is good; it has many options for students to eat, so yes, it's good. Sports and games are also very good on our campus, and there are many clubs as well for participation.

college_info.intro:
IILM University Gurgaon offers a wide variety of courses at the Gurgaon campus. The programmes are offered through its four different schools. The students are not only offered quality education but are also offered different national and international skills and knowledge to perform well in the industry. The flagship programme offered at the university is the MBA programme. i.e. offered through the School of Management.
IILM Gurgaon offers 12 different MBA programmes that include one general MBA and 11 MBAs with different specialisation. Opting for specialisation helps students to choose from vast career opportunities. Students can also pursue a PGDM programme, i.e. also offered at the university. Both PGDM and MBA are equivalent programme and offer similar knowledge and experience to the students. Candidates who want to pursue the programme must have a valid score in CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ GMAT/ NMAT/ ATMA/ CUET-PG.
IILM Gurgaon offers an MBA programme in Data Science in collaboration with IBM. Students can also choose different specialisations such as Entrepreneurship, Financial Technology, Human Resource Management, Marketing and Innovation, Manufacturing Management, Artificial Intelligence, and Management Technology offers further sub-specialisations like AI, Data Science, and Web 3.0. Students can also select a general MBA or PGDM programme. PGDM programme is also offered with a specialisation in Entrepreneurship and Family Business.
For more information about IILM University Gurgaon check out the video below:

The minimum eligibility requirement for admission to IILM University's undergraduate programs is 50% marks in Class 12 (45% for SC/ST/reserved candidates).Applicants will also need to have a strong academic record, good performance in the entrance exam (if applicable), and a positive performance in the interview process.Get good marks in the entrance exam. IILM University accepts various national level entrance exams for admission to its undergraduate programs, such as the CAT, MAT, XAT, NMAT, and CMAT.Perform well in the interview process. The interview is a chance for the admissions committee to get to know you better and assess your fit for the university. You will be asked questions about your academic background, career goals, and why you are interested in studying at IILM University.

faqs.answer: A:    AIMA MAT releases the results phase wise. The exam is held in multiple sessions in February, May, September and December phases. So the results are released for all the sessions of a particular phase on the same day. The MAT February result of all sessions are released in March. The MAT May results are released in June and the MAT September result is released in October and MAT December results are released in January. Candidates who appear for the exam, can download their scorecard for their exam session from the AIMA MAT website. AIMA does not release cut offs for admission through MAT. It has no role in the MAT cut off determination. The participating institutes determine MAT cut offs on their own and as per their selection parameters and criteria.
faqs.question: When are MAT result and cut offs released for all sessions?

review_summary.college_name: IILM University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and value for money.

content.Placements: Students in IILM are groomed well, as their placement criteria is also good. The minimum package is 2.5 LPA and the highest package is 56 LPA. Many top companies visit the college. Internships start from 1st year. B.Tech, BBA, and many courses are available here. It is the best for law students.
content.Infrastructure: College is in the developing stage as more infrastructure buildings are made. It has good classrooms and 2-3 libraries to study. It has 3 cafes. Medical facilities are also good. There is an advantage for girls as girls hostel is on the college campus. Students and campus are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. Faculty members are highly educated with prior experience.

content.Placements: The placement rate is 90% in our college. IILM invites companies like Deloitte, Google, etc. Top companies are on campus. The top roles offered in the course are Financial Planning, HR Recruiter, Marketing Manager, and Business Analyst. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is awesome, and the campus focuses on greenery. The food quality is like that in marriages. The sports played are basketball and cricket in the ground itself. The campus has 3 libraries, huge classrooms with AC, and full-time Wi-Fi connection. The campus has huge security.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of IILM University, Gurgaon.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in the college. Many companies come to the college for hiring. They provide decent packages. The college helps students to find internships in every aspect. The average package is 6 LPA The college is very supportive during placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. The campus contains a library, cafe, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court, etc. The college also consists of computer labs and one lab is full of iMacs only.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Life-changing track having high hope but should have hope would be very low.

content.Placements: They have not shown any interest in giving the placement, as I am in semester 6 and have not been told about what companies are coming, how to prepare for interviews in future life, or about personal assistance for placement. I talked to senior-year students, and they told me that a few companies come for BBA students.
content.Infrastructure: They have many classrooms, but each year many students take admission, and they are not able to manage it. As a result, students have to suffer. In between, we have an extra one to one and a half hour break, and either the classroom is not available or the faculty is busy with some other subject. They provide Wi-Fi, but you can connect with only one device, either a laptop or a phone.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Bad placement percentage, less than 50% students are placed.

content.Placements: The college helps students get jobs in good companies. Some students get high-paying jobs in Deloitte, KPMG, EY, but many get average ones and the average package is 5-6 LPA. The college helps students find jobs, but could do more to connect them with top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of both campus and hostel is so-so. There is no in-campus hostel for boys, they have partnered up with a firm called Yourspace. The food was really bad, so we had to raise a complaint to change the food vendors. After some time, the new vendors deteriorated their food quality as well, and only veg food is available. No sports ground, only a basketball court that too is under maintenance. Medical practitioners on the campus take care of what medicine should be given to students.

admission_overview.description: IILM University, Gurugram admission 2026 is entrance and merit-based. The application process is conducted online. The university offers BTech, BBA, MBA, etc. at the UG and PG levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Law, Management, Engineering, Liberal Arts & Humanities, and more. IILM University Gurugram accepts various national and state-level entrance tests for admission to its courses. The university also conducts its own entrance test. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, and admission criteria for IILM Gurugram.

faqs.answer: AIMA MAT releases the results phase wise. The exam is held in multiple sessions in February, May, September and December phases. So the results are released for all the sessions of a particular phase on the same day. The MAT February result of all sessions are released in March. The MAT May results are released in June and the MAT September result is released in October and MAT December results are released in January. Candidates who appear for the exam, can download their scorecard for their exam session from the AIMA MAT website. AIMA does not release cut offs for admission through MAT. It has no role in the MAT cut off determination. The participating institutes determine MAT cut offs on their own and as per their selection parameters and criteria.
faqs.question: When are MAT result and cut offs released for all sessions?

faqs.answer: IILM University Gurgaon offers several programmes across the streams of Engineering, Business and Management Studies, Humanities and Social Sciences, Law, Design, etc. The tuition fee at IILM costs around INR 2.5 L – INR 17.5 L. This fee is exclusive of other charges such as Examination fee, Application fee, etc. IILM University Gurgaon is moderately expensive.
faqs.question: Why is IILM University Gurgaon expensive?

faqs.answer: Candidates must complete LLB degree or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD) to apply for LLM programme at IILM University Gurgaon. Aspirants must have documents proving their eligibility for verification.
faqs.question: Who can apply for LLM at IILM University Gurgaon?

paragraphs: Candidates are offered admission at IILM based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants can appear for entrance test conducted by the university for some courses. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:

Aspirants can apply online or offline, as they prefer. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for any of the UG, PG, or PhD programmes. Candidates must complete the application form and upload the specified documents.

IILM Gurugram shortlists candidates for courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB, BBA LLB based on entrance exam scores.CUET-UGscore is accepted for admission to BA LLB, BBA LLB, and some other UG courses. The university also accepts CUET-PG for MBA, LLM, MA, etc. IILM conducts an admission test for BTech, LLM and other courses. The university also conducts a personal interview round for admission. Aspirants getting admission based on merit have to directly come for the personal interview round.
Once the selection rounds are over, selected aspirants receive the admission offer letter. Such aspirants need to pay theIILM University Gurgaon feesto confirm their admission.
For more information about IILM Gurugram check out the below video:

courses_data.name: IILM University Gurgaon BTech Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CUET, CBSE 12th, ISC, HBSE 12th
courses_data.description: IILM University Gurgaon offers a four-yearBTech in Computer Science Engineeringprogramme at the PG level. The university offers BTech CSE in multiple specialisations such asArtificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, Cyber Security, Data Science and Big Data Analytics. Recently, the university released two courses, namely, BTech in CSE with Specialisation in Full Stack Web Development (with L&T EduTech) and BTech in CSE with Specialisation in iOS Mobile Application with ML and AR (with SKLZ Tech LLP). The university considers CUET or Class 12 scores for admission to the BTech programme. Download:IILM University Gurgaon CSE Brochure

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BTech at IILM University Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: IILM University Gurgaon considers CUET score for admission to BTech course. Besides, qualifying the entrance exam, candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria. Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as core subjects are eligible for admission. Once the selection is done, shortlisted candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at IILM University Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 with Mathematics and Physics as core subjects to apply for IILM University Gurugram BTech programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, candidates must also qualify CUET or meet the merit requirements for admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at IILM University Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: IILM University Gurgaon offers four-yearBTech in Computer Science Engineeringprogramme spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech CSE in multiple specialisations, namely:Artificial Intelligence and Machine LearningCloud ComputingCyber SecurityData ScienceBig Data Analytics

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at IILM University?
faqs.answer: IILM University Gurgaon offers admission on the basis of merit and entrance scores. The eligibility criteria differs for each course. However, the admission to all courses is on the basis of the merit acquired in the qualifying exam as well as the scores obtained in the course-specific entrance exams. Candidates who wish to apply to IILM University, must fulfil the course-specific eligibility.

courses_data.name: IILM University Gurgaon MBA Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, NMAT, ATMA, XAT, CMAT, CAT, CUET-PG, GMAT
courses_data.description: IILM University offers a two-year full-time MBA course at the PG level. The course is offered in four semesters. The university offers MBA (Single Specialisation), MBA (Dual Specialisation), Hospitality & Tourism Management and Healthcare & Hospital Management. During the course, students have to choose a specialisation. Candidates who have completed graduation are eligible to apply for the MBA programme. Download:IILM University Gurgaon MBA Brochure

faqs.question: What is the eligibility of MBA in IILM University, Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of graduation for admission to MBA. Below is detailed eligibility for IILM University Gurgaon MBA admissions:Candidates need to complete a bachelor's degree in any discipline to apply for MBA courses. Aspirants must pass Class 10, Class 12, graduation with at least 50% aggregate to apply for MBA.Candidates in their final year of bachelor's degree can also apply, provided they can produce the final year degree certificate/ marksheet later.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at IILM University Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: The total fee for MBA ranges betweenINR 12.30 lakh and INR 12.90 lakh. IILM University fees include tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. The security fee is one-time chargeable. Aspirants need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: How to apply for IILM University?
faqs.answer: IILM University Gurgaon conducts the application process in online mode. Candidates can check the step-wise application process given below:Go to the IILM Gurgaon official website.Register by entering basic information.Fill the form with the required personal and academic details.Upload the documents.Pay the application feesSubmit the form.

courses_data.name: IILM University Gurgaon BBA (Hons) Admission 2026
courses_data.description: IILM University Gurgaon offers BBA (Hons) for three to four years at the UG level. The course is spread over eight semesters. Candidates who have completed Class 12 can apply for BBA (Hons) programme. BBA (Hons) at IILM is offered in eight specialisations, namelyArtificial Intelligence,Entrepreneurship,Banking & Finance, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BBA at IILM University?
faqs.answer: IILM University considers the academic background, statement of purpose and performance of the candidates in extracurricular activities for selection for BBA course. Aspirants who have passed CUET can also apply for admission to BBA (Hons) course. Selected candidates are offered seat in the university.

faqs.question: Is BBA available at IILM University?
faqs.answer: Yes, IILM University offers three to four-years BBA (Hons) course at the UG level. The BBA course at IILM is offered in multiple specialisations, namely Artificial Intelligence, Entrepreneurship, Banking & Finance, etc. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for any of the BBA (Hons) specialisations.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for BBA at IILM University Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: The total fee for IILM University Gurgaon BBA isINR 13.60 lakh - INR 15.60 lakh. Candidates can pay the fee annually. The total fee for BBA is a sum of various one-time and annual components. Aspirants once selected need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Is LSAT required for IILM University?
faqs.answer: LSAT stands for Law School Admission Test. LSAT is required for admission to IILM University, for programs like BA LLB, BBA LLB, and LLM. The IILM University Law Program is Ranked 10th according to the NIRF ranking among other private Law Universities. LSAT scores are used by law schools in India as a measure of an applicant’s ability to succeed in law school, and they form an integral part of the admission process at IILM University.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by IILM University?
faqs.answer: IILM University Gurgaon accepts national-level entrance exams such as CLAT, CUET-UG, CUET-PG, etc. for admission to specific programmes. The university also conducts an entrance exam for admission to UG or PG courses. Below is the accepted entrance exam for top courses:Course NameAccepted Entrance ExamBTechCUET/ JEE Main/ IILM EEEBBA (Hons)CUET/ Merit-basedMBACUET-PG/ other entrance examBA LLB (Hons)CLAT/ CUET/ Merit + IILM Admission TestBBA LLB (Hons)CLAT/ CUET/ Merit + IILM Admission TestBDesMerit/ CUET-UGLLMCLAT/ CUET-PG/ Merit + IILM Admission Test

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in IILM University Gurugram?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must first check the eligibility requirements to apply for a course. Once registration is done, aspirants must also fulfil the selection criteria. For courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons), entrance exam is required for admission. CLAT is accepted for BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons) programmes. CUET-PG and other Management entrance exam is accepted for MBA admission.

faqs.question: Does IILM University Gurgaon require CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, IILM University Gurgaon accepts CUET score for admission to some of the UG courses.Common University Entrance Testalso known asCUET UGis a national level entrance exam conducted by NTA. he exam is conducted once a year in over 500 cities in India and abroad. The exam is conducted in a computer-based mode. CUET exam is conducted in multiple phases depending upon on the number of candidates registered for the entrance exam. Below are the courses accepting CUET-UG score:BA LLB (Hons)BBA LLB (Hons)BBA (Hons)BDesBA (Hons), etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in IILM Gurugram?
faqs.answer: IILM University Gurugram offers admission to courses either based on merit or entrance exam score. IILM Gurugram selects candidates for courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB, BBA LLB based on entrance exam scores.CUET-UGscore is accepted for admission to BA LLB, BBA LLB, and some other UG courses. The university also accepts CUET-PG scores for MBA, LLM and MA.For other courses, merit in the last qualifying exam is considered for admission. The university may also conduct personal interview round for admission to a few programmes.

faqs.question: How much salary can one expect after completing BA from IILM University?
faqs.answer: IILM University offers various specialisations under its BA programme. These specialisations include Cultural Studies, Global Affairs, Environmental Studies, Media and Communication, and Gender Studies. These courses enable students to make a career across various fields such as Entertainment, News Reporting, Editorial, Content Writing, Psychology and more. The salary of each student differ depending on the respective job profile and respective individual skillset. Following is a list of different job profiles and pay our offered to students of BA: Academic Psychologist-INR 7.7 LPA Content Writer-INR4.1 LPA-INR 5.3 LPA Journalist-INR 3 LPA-INR 5.5 LPA Teacher-INR 4 LPA- INR 6.5 LPA Clinical Social Worker-INR 5 LPA-INR 6.5 LPA

faqs.question: What are the various job profiles students can opt for after completing BA from IILM University?
faqs.answer: IILM University aims to work toward holistic development of its BA students. The university offers various different specialisations namely Cultural Studies, Global Affairs, Environmental Studies, Media and Communication, and Gender Studies for student to choose from. Career prospects may differ from student to student, depending on their chosen specialisation as well as their individual competency. Depending on the respective subjects, BA Graduates can find several job opportunities in government sector, private sector and PSUs. Following graduation, a candidate can work in the government as a Civil Administrator, IAS, Police Officer, or Civil Servant or in the private sector as a Content Writer, Journalist, Human Resource Manager or in a variety of other professions.
