videos.title: IILM University Gurgaon BBA Hons Review
IILM University Gurgaon BBA Hons Review
IILM University Gurgaon BBA Hons Review

facilities: It is accessible by road and metro, with the Sector 53–54 Rapid Metro station located at walking distance (barely a 1 min walk!).
The Bus Stand is also at a walking distance (again, barely a minute!)
Both cabs and autos can be found easily via uber, ola etc.
There are also usually a number of autos already situated near the college

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and value for money.
reviews.review_text: College is in the developing stage as more infrastructure buildings are made. It has good classrooms and 2-3 libraries to study. It has 3 cafes. Medical facilities are also good. There is an advantage for girls as girls hostel is on the college campus. Students and campus are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good. Faculty members are highly educated with prior experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome, and the campus focuses on greenery. The food quality is like that in marriages. The sports played are basketball and cricket in the ground itself. The campus has 3 libraries, huge classrooms with AC, and full-time Wi-Fi connection. The campus has huge security.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IILM University, Gurgaon.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. The campus contains a library, cafe, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court, etc. The college also consists of computer labs and one lab is full of iMacs only.

reviews.review_heading: Life-changing track having high hope but should have hope would be very low.
reviews.review_text: They have many classrooms, but each year many students take admission, and they are not able to manage it. As a result, students have to suffer. In between, we have an extra one to one and a half hour break, and either the classroom is not available or the faculty is busy with some other subject. They provide Wi-Fi, but you can connect with only one device, either a laptop or a phone.

reviews.review_heading: Bad placement percentage, less than 50% students are placed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of both campus and hostel is so-so. There is no in-campus hostel for boys, they have partnered up with a firm called Yourspace. The food was really bad, so we had to raise a complaint to change the food vendors. After some time, the new vendors deteriorated their food quality as well, and only veg food is available. No sports ground, only a basketball court that too is under maintenance. Medical practitioners on the campus take care of what medicine should be given to students...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the bad faculty.
reviews.review_text: Really bad infrastructure. Hostellers need to pay for their electricity charges and the charges per unit are a whopping 12 rupees per unit AND an additional 10 rupees per day for maintenance. I mean, this is just nonsense. The college campus doesn't even have a ground, to be honest; no sports facilities; the faculty is bad; they target individuals for no apparent reason.

reviews.review_heading: If you're here for placement, then the opportunities are decent—not really high packages.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides us with wifi facilities with good conditions. The classroom and library are quite small but it contain all the types of journal and books and they have two libraries and 3 cafeterias. They have in and out campus hostels for MBA 1st year; they have our campus hostel and they are providing transportation facilities to us. Apart from hostel and campus, they have a good number of clubs on campus. The clubs are conducting activities once a week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IILM University .
reviews.review_text: The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very tasty, and proper hygiene standards are maintained. Good facilities for sports and games are provided by the college. When it comes to security, college is very strict; no one is allowed to enter the campus without permission.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IILM University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Free Wi-Fi and medical facilities are available for students and staff. Their is strictness on the campus; no one is allowed to enter; you have to show your ID card before entering. Hygiene standards are maintained. Food is good in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of IILM MBA .
reviews.review_text: The girl’s hostel is well-equipped with all necessary amenities. The infrastructure of the college and hostel is amazing: fully air-conditioned, very well-ventilated, with free Wi-Fi and free medical facilities in case of emergency. Food in the college canteen is pocket-friendly, and for just 88 rupees, we get a veg thali.

reviews.review_heading: All insights about IILM MBA.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is full of greenery. The college has basketball and volleyball courts for playing and a separate Zumba/aerobics room as well. The infrastructure of the hostel is also good, and there is a separate bathroom in each room; the rooms are triple sharing. The food is tasty and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IILM MBA.
reviews.review_text: The mess and canteen are good, with a variety of food available at a cheap price. Hygiene is maintained all over campus, whether it’s classrooms, the library, or washrooms. Sports facilities are limited; the rest is all good. Yes, free Wi-Fi facility is provided, and the medical facility is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review titles-  IILM MBA INSIGHTS .
reviews.review_text: The college has three cafeterias, and all the cafeterias are beautiful, with each carrying a different vibe. The food is tasty, and a variety of food is available at an affordable price. Classrooms and the library are good and spacious. Free Wi-Fi facility is provided by the college, and the medical facility is also provided by the college in case of emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Place where true learning resides.
reviews.review_text: The college sports ground is small and has only a volleyball and basketball court, but the classrooms are very nice, huge, and air-conditioned. The college library is also good, with a special reading and self-study area. Free Wi-Fi and medical facilities are provided by the college, and each student is required to have medical insurance; otherwise, the college provides it.

reviews.review_heading: IILM MBA teaching reviews.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the university are appreciable and satisfying. Self-studying rooms are attached to the university library, where students can go and study in their free time. There are a total of three cafeterias at the university, with a variety of food available.

data.description: IILM University Gurgaon campus is spread over 7 acres. The campus offers modern yet all-required facilities for the students. It has well-furnished classrooms, labs, a library facility, indoor-outdoor spots facility, a gym, and many more facilities for the overall development of the students. Located near metro it becomes easily connected with public transport which is affordable and safe for the students to commute.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about IILM University

likes.text: Companies like ICICI Bank, Loreal, KPMG, Deloitte visit campus for placements.
The college also puts its best effort into ensuring students get well-paid internships.

The quality of the facilities available in hostels is very good, and the quality of food served in the mess and canteen is also good.

likes.text: Yes, the teachers are very helpful, highly qualified and knowledgeable, and the quality of their teaching is also very good.
The course curriculum is quite relevant and it makes students industry-ready by organizing various student-engaging programs.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at IIIT Bangalore are the Integrated MTech (iMTech) and BTech programmes. For seeking admission to any of the courses offered at IIIT Bangalore, a candidate must apply for all the courses through online mode. Students can choose from the two prominent specialisations of Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) or Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE). IIITB does not conduct any separate entrance examinations for Integrated MTech and postgraduate courses. Candidates seeking admission have to take the national-level exam - JEE Main to qualify for further selection.
ternational Institute of Information Technology, Bangalore tuition fee range from INR 24,296 to 26,32,000 as per the official website.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has strong academics, great placements, and good industry exposure at IIIT Bangalore.

content.Placements: Around 95-98% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is around 65 LPA to 70 LPA. The average package is about 24 LPA to 26 LPA, and the lowest package is around 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Top recruiters included Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Adobe, Nvidia, Flipkart, Goldman Sachs, and Samsung R&D. Around 80-90% of students got internships, mainly in companies like Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Adobe, Nvidia, and Flipkart. Top roles offered are software development engineer (SDE), full-stack/back-end developer, data scientist, machine learning engineer, research engineer, and product engineer.

paragraphs: The application process, appearing in the entrance exam, counselling, and seat allotment, is included in theIIIT Bangalore admission process.  Aspirants should carefully check the eligibility and selection criteria of the desired programme. Below the admission procedure is explained briefly:

Students have to apply on the official website of the accepted entrance exam and the institute's website. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to register for a course. The application portal is open online and eligible students can apply within the specified deadline.

IIIT Bangalore cutoff listis released after the entrance exams for shortlisting the students. Those with valid scores need to apply for the counselling process through the official website of the concerned bodies. Students based on their scores, are allotted the branch/specialisation.
For IIIT Bangalore PhD admission, Students have to take a written test and go through an interview for selection.

Students during their counselling process have to report to the admission cell at IIIT Bangalore for physical reporting along with all the required documents for verification purposes and tuition fee payment for final seat allotment.

The course fee varies from one course to another.IIIT Bangalore feeof each course is inclusive of multiple components such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Moreover, some of these components must be paid semester-wise, while some are chargeable one-time. Below areIIIT Bangalore feesand average package:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

courses_data.description: IIIT Bangalore offers a four-year BTech course spread across four semesters. The institute offers BTech in Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics & Communication and Data Science & Artificial Intelligence. Besides, the institute also offers a five-year integrated BTech + MTech course in CSE and ECE. A first-class pass in Class 12 or equivalent exam with Mathematics can apply for the preferred BTech specialisations.

faqs.question: Is BTech available in IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Yes, IIIT Bangalore offers a four-year BTech course in Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication and Data Science & Artificial Intelligence. Besides, the institute also offers five-year integrated MTech in CSE and ECE. Admission to BTech and Integrated MTech courses is based on JEE Main. The minimum qualification required to apply for these programmes is Class 12.

faqs.question: What is BTech course structure at IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: IIIT Bangalore offers BTech in three specialisations and integrated MTech course in two specialisations. It offers BTech in CSE, ECE, and Data Science and Artificial Intelligence. The integrated courses offered are Computer Science & Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Both the programmes are offered in a full-time mode. The admission procedure is the same for these courses. These are further divided into semester pattern. Aspirants have to complete a project, go through an

faqs.question: How can I join IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass the accepted entrance exam and meet the eligibility requirements to join a course at IIIT Bangalore. The institute accepts JEE Main, GATE, CAT, UCEED, TISSNET, etc. for admission to specific courses. IIIT Bangalore cutoff list is available after the entrance exams for shortlisting the students. Those with valid scores are ired to apply for the counselling process. Selected candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Does IIIT Bangalore has management quota seats for its B.Tech courses?
faqs.answer: The institute does not offer any reservation under management quota. BTech and MTech courses have a combined total of 60 seats. Mentioned seat count is according to the official website. It may change and hence, is indicative.

courses_data.description: IIIT Bangalore MTech course of two years is divided into semester patterns. In the first semester, students have to choose courses worth at least 16 credits. Students further have to choose four electives in the second and third semesters. The institute offers MTech inComputer ScienceandElectronics & Communication Engineering.IIIT Bangalore MTech admissionis done based on applicants'GATE scores.

faqs.question: Is it worth doing M.Tech from IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: MTech is one of the popular courses of IIIT Bangalore. The institute has been ranked at 74 under the 'Engineering' category in 2024 NIRF rankings for its Engineering courses. Talking about placements, the institute offered a highest package ofINR 65 LPAto MTech CSE andINR 39.3 LPAto MTech ECE students. The average package offered to CSE and ECE students wasINR 21.8 LPAandINR 29.2 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: How much is the IIIT Bangalore MTech fee?
faqs.answer: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore MTech fee ranges betweenINR 3.3 lakh and INR 26.3 lakhfor the integrated MTech programmes. The fee mentioned here is the total tuition fee. Apart from the mentioned tuition fee, candidates are also required to pay a one-time refundable Library Deposit fee ofINR 4,000. The mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What GATE score is required for IIIT Bangalore M.Tech admission?
faqs.answer: IIIT Bangalore considers GATE score for admission to MTech programme. In 2023, admission were offered in MTech ECE to candidates with GATE score up to 430. Whereas the closing cutoff for CSE was 480. GATE cutoff score depends upon the applications received and is not fixed. Candidates with score equal or above the GATE cutoff are offered admission in the MTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: IIIT Bangalore cutoffis based on JEE Main scores for courses including Integrated M.Tech CSE and Integrated M.Tech ECE. IIIT Bangalore JEE Main cutoff 2023 forIntegrated M.Tech. in Computer Science and EngineeringandIntegrated M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineeringwas concluded after Round 5 of the Seat Allotment Result. courses_data.name: IIIT Bangalore MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIIT Bangalore offers a two-year MSc programme in Digital Society. Admission to the course is entrance-based. The institute accepts CAT, CEED, CUCET or TISSNET for admission to MSc programme. Aspirants who have qualified any of the accepted exam are exempted from appearing for the written test conducted by the institute. Aspirants should check the eligibility criteria before applying for the course admission. Check below for more details about the course. Download:IIIT Bangalore MSc Brochure

faqs.question: What is the application fee for IIIT Bangalore MSc admission?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to MSc at IIIT Bangalore are required to register first on the Pravesh Portal of IIITB (pravesh.iiitb.net). To apply online, candidates need to pay a non-refundable fee ofINR 1,000as an application fee. The fee payment can be done via credit card/debit card/net banking. Application form is submitted successfully only after the successful application fee payment.

faqs.question: Is there direct admission at IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore does not offer direct admission. Candidates are offered seat in the institute based on their score in the entrance-exam. IIIT Bangalore accepts JEE Main for BTech and GATE for MTech programmes. The institute conducts a test for admission to MSc and PhD courses. Besides, IIIT Bangalore also accepts CAT, CEED, CUCET, TISSNET, etc. for admission to specific courses.

The institute accepts CAT, CEED, CUCET or TISSNET for admission to MSc programme. Aspirants who have qualified any of the accepted exam are exempted from appearing for the written test conducted by the institute. Aspirants should check the eligibility criteria before applying for the course admission. Check below for more details about the course. Download:IIIT Bangalore MSc Brochure

faqs.question: What is the application fee for IIIT Bangalore MSc admission?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to MSc at IIIT Bangalore are required to register first on the Pravesh Portal of IIITB (pravesh.iiitb.net). To apply online, candidates need to pay a non-refundable fee ofINR 1,000as an application fee. The fee payment can be done via credit card/debit card/net banking. Application form is submitted successfully only after the successful application fee payment.

faqs.question: Is there direct admission at IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore does not offer direct admission. Candidates are offered seat in the institute based on their score in the entrance-exam. IIIT Bangalore accepts JEE Main for BTech and GATE for MTech programmes. The institute conducts a test for admission to MSc and PhD courses. Besides, IIIT Bangalore also accepts CAT, CEED, CUCET, TISSNET, etc. for admission to specific courses.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIIT Bangalore through JEE?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. JEE Main is necessary if the aspirant is applying for BTech programme. For all other courses, candidates do not require JEE Main score. Mere qualifying JEE Main does not guarantee admission in the BTech programme of IIIT Bangalore. Candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility requirement specific to BTech course for admission.

faqs.question: How hard is it to get into IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Admissions at IIIT Bangalore are entrance-based. The institute selects students based on scores in national-level examinations such asJEE Main,CAT,MAT,GATE,XAT,CMAT, etc. Candidates need to qualify JEE Main exam to get admission to Engineering courses. Cracking JEE Main is surely not an easy task and requires complete dedication towards the study. But one thing that can make theJEE Main preparationeasy is to study in a planned manner with a strategy.JEE's Main question paperis divided into three sections: Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. All three sections are equally important, and therefore, aspirants should ensure that they cover the syllabus for all three sections.

faqs.question: Where will the college place its students who are doing Integrated MTech programme from IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: After doing Integrated M.Tech programme from IIIT Bangalore, students are usually placed in Core sector followed by Technology, IT and other allied sectors. The top recruiters during IIIT Bangalore placements 2025 included companies such as Amazon, Bosch, Oracle and Samsung.The overall highest package recorded during iMTech placements 2025 was INR 145 LPA.

faqs.question: What is last year cutoff of IIIT Bangalore through the JEE Main?

placement_data.title: IIIT Bangalore Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The overall highest package recorded during International Institute of Information Technology placement 2025 was INR 145 LPA . A total of 656 offers were made in 2025. Out of the total offers, 306 offers were full-time and 350 were internship offers .

According to the official report, 14 students were placed with package above INR 60 LPA during IIIT Bangalore placement 2025. 54 students were placed with package between 40 LPA and 60 LPA . Most number of students, i.e. 86 students were placed with salary package between 20 LPA and 30 LPA.

tables.context: How many students received package above INR 30 LP

faqs.question: How many students received package above INR 30 LPA during IIIT Bangalore placements?
faqs.answer: The package-wise number of students placed during IIIT Bangalore placements 2025 is mentioned below: Salary Range Students Placed 2025 Above 60 LPA 14 40 LPA to 60 LPA 54 30 LPA to 40 LPA 49 20 LPA to 30 LPA 86 10 LPA to 20 LPA 82

faqs.question: Where will the college place its students who are doing Integrated MTech programme from IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: After doing Integrated M.Tech programme from IIIT Bangalore, students are usually placed in Core sector followed by Technology, IT and other allied sectors. The top recruiters during IIIT Bangalore placements 2025 included companies such as Amazon, Bosch, Oracle and Samsung. The overall highest package recorded during iMTech placements 2025 was INR 145 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the placement opportunities for Integrated M.Tech CSE at IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Integrated MTech CSE students get good placement at IIIT Bangalore. During the placement drive, the highest and average package received was 145 LPA and 36.75 LPA. The median package recorded was 33 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the placement opportunities for Integrated M.Tech ECE at IIIT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: According to the official report, IIIT Bangalore placements have been good for iMTech ECE course in recent past. The highest and average package recorded in 2025 was 89.12 LPA and 38 LPA. The median package was 39.71 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: It has strong academics, great placements, and good industry exposure at IIIT Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities for our department are very good. The campus has 24/7 high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs with updated systems, and smart classrooms with projectors. A well-stocked library is available with textbooks, research papers, and online resources. Hostel facilities are decent and comfortable, with clean rooms, Wi-Fi, laundry, and basic amenities. The mess food is average but hygienic. The canteen has limited but affordable options. Medical facilities are avai...

reviews.review_heading: A wonderful college to turn my dreams into reality.
reviews.review_text: The total campus is 9 acres of land with modern equipment and rooms made of good infrastructure. Coming to classrooms, they are comfortable for every batch of students. Library is well stocked with all kinds of books. Mess food is completely hygienic and consists of a variety of food items. Medical facilities are available 24X7. For sports, there is sufficient ground to play.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college if you focus on placement and academics.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is provided, and all sports facilities are available. Considering the 9-acre campus, there is no swimming pool or separate football and cricket ground. The ground is small. Academic-related facilities, like labs and others, are also provided. Hostel facilities are also decent.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Bangalore is a premier institute for its engineering and IT programs.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are the best here. We have labs for almost everything related to electronics. Library has books of every sort, from fiction to reference books. Hostel is very good. We are provided with 3 sharing rooms with ample space to keep a table, bed, and cupboard.

reviews.review_heading: Just few things about my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good here. The classrooms are also very good and comfortable. The hostel rooms are of single occupation for girls and single to triple occupation for boys. The quality of the mess food is reasonable. And there is good encouragement for different kinds of sports here .

reviews.review_heading: A good college if the student focuses on knowledge and education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are better than other colleges. Each floor and each room are well-equipped with Wi-Fi. Labs are well-managed and up-to-date with technology. Classrooms are better than usual classrooms, equipped with ACs and proper digital smartboards. The library is quite impressive as it holds a large number of books to choose from. The facilities in the hostel are very good. Proper maintenance and cleaning are done on a regular basis. The food in the mess are better than othe...

reviews.review_heading: Great college with nice faculty and placements. Except for the campus, which is really small.
reviews.review_text: There is great Wi-Fi service provided by the college. Even the mess food is good. The lab is fully functional and kept up-to-date. The hostels are really kept clean and tidy. They have staff to look after cleanliness. The food is also good for nutrition and is a balanced diet. The classrooms are well maintained. The labs also allow you to learn about real-world problems.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a gym, a basketball court, a tennis court, a badminton court, a football ground, a volleyball court, etc. The hostel facilities are good and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Very good exposure to explore more opportunities. Excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available at almost every place in the Institute with excellent speed. Classrooms and Labs are very good with the latest technologies like projectors etc. The library is well built and has a wide collection of relevant and the latest books. The hostels, mess food, and canteen are all very good. Doctors frequently come to campus for medical facilities, every student has health insurance for emergency cases. Almost every sport facility is provided in the campus, Just the football ground c...

reviews.review_heading: I feel blessed to be part of one of the best colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is well furnished, we have single rooms from 3rd year till 5th year in case of integrated M.Tech and case of M.Tech, we get a single room from the very first day. Fooding is also awesome in terms of hygiene, we have meals four times a day each day that contains milk and curd all the time. We have 24x7 Wi-Fi available with a speed of more than 200 Mbps. Our library contains a plethora of books from all fields, the library is fully air-conditioned and it is open for students till 1 AM.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the placement facilities and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent, with all the equipment available. The mess serves 4 meals a day. The food is better than what one expects from a mess. The menu is changed every 2 weeks. From this year onwards, non-veg has also been introduced to mess. Medical facilities could be better as the doctor is not available 24*7. In sports, we have volleyball, basketball, cricket, football, badminton, table tennis, foosball, etc., are available. Sports equipment is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: IIITB was the institute of my dreams.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs and classrooms on our campus. It has an electronics lab-CEEMS, HideS, robotics club, BITES etc. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We have a huge library (big enough for all the students on campus) with a very good collection of books on all kinds of educational topics. Hostel facilities are quite good. Even if we get any problems with the facilities, the administration sorts them out quickly (this is one of the things I like so much about the college). Food quality is quite...

reviews.review_heading: IIT Bangalore has a great infrastructure and amazing learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college is situated in Electronic City Phase 2 and has a beautiful campus with greenery around. The classrooms are really up to the standard of any top-notch college in India and abroad. We have access to the vast library, and we get access to it even after completing the course for about 6-8 months. The hostel is decent, but as I am a resident of that location, I have not opted for it. Many of my friends stay in the hostel and are recommended for students who come from different places.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college to learn and innovate with excellent faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides large air-conditioned classrooms to accommodate 150 students and recorded lectures. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the library is supported by Infosys, MINRO, i.e., Machine Intelligence and Robotics Centre to support startups. There are innovation labs like Goru labs. Computer labs are equipped with ubuntu installed in machines. In the hostel, single rooms are available for masters students. They provide hot water facility in the morning and evening and 24 hours water faci...

reviews.review_heading: Amazing Life at IIITB, One of the BEST college in INDIA !
reviews.review_text: The campus has 4 main buildings which comprise of Admin block, Men's Hostel, Women's Hostel and Innovation Centre. There is 24*7 access to Wi-Fi available throughout the campus. All the labs in IIITB are designed and built as per the highest global standards. IIITB has smart classrooms with smart boards, high-speed data networks and LCD projectors. There is a huge library with an immense number of books, journals and newspapers. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls with individual shari...

Aspirants applying for a UG or PG course at IIIT Bangalore have to pay an application fee to register for a course. The application fee is INR 1,000 for each programme. Candidates can pay the non-refundable application fee via any of the online payment modes after filling out the form. Fee once paid is not refunded in any case.

As per the admission policy, the institute doesn't follow any seat reservation policy while allocating the MMS seats. However, the MMS seats are allocated based on candidates' achieved scores in CMAT/ CAT/ MH-CET/ MAT/ ATMA/ XAT/ GMAT. No discrimination is made on the basis of the state from which the graduation certificate is obtained. There are no reservations for linguistic minorities either.

reviews_list.review_title: Live, make college life memorable.

review_content.Placements: Campus placements for SIP and executive placements are offered by the college itself, and if you want to opt for off-campus, you have to notify the college. The highest package is 12 lacs. TCS, DHL, Adobe, Colgate, Capgemini, Anand Rathi, Jio Creative Lab, Outlook Group, and Infosys are the highest recruiters. Internships are given in bulk. All students got at least 2 internships, some later got a full-time job. I got placed in Infosys.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am from the Corona batch, didn't enjoy college life, but have an idea about facilities. College provides Wi-Fi all day, Computer Labs are well-designed, having all software. The library is good. It has all books, novels, journals, but 15 days is the validity of a book. The college provides rented flats as a hostel. There are AC and non-AC, single, shared rooms available. Food facilities are not available; we need to avail ourselves of a private mess. The sports ground has cricket, football, and basketball courts. We have an indoor sports court.

review_content.Placements: As per my knowledge, our school's average package for our batch is 12 lacs per year, with the highest package reaching 25.5 lacs. The top companies that participated in the drives included Adani Wilmar, Amazon, Accenture Technology, Cognizant, Tech Solutions, Deloitte and many more. Our institute offers mandatory summer internships (8–10 weeks) at companies like HP, Jio, and Indian Oil for digital marketing and analysis projects.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lack of an outdoor sports field on campus is not ideal. The college is located in Matunga, which has high living costs. The college has 800 students, but there is too much crowding on campus. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, canteen and campus. The library is both digital and traditional. The hostel facility is not good. There are so many problems in the hostel. The most important thing is that food quality is not very good.

individual_reviews.title: MBA people with lack of extracurricular activity.

content.Placements: Good placements with industry average package, ROI is good, able to grab higher package with right skillset as there’s a lot of opportunities provided to students. Top roles offered were in marketing & sales from FMCG and banks. Lucky ones who have hands-on coding can blend at Analytics role.

Hostels are well maintained but food isn’t included, electricity is free with washing machines. Only 2-occupant rooms were available.

The application process for all programmes at Welingkar Mumbai is held online. Candidates can complete the Welingkar Mumbai application form 2025 on the official website. The registration fee for all programmes varies.

After the entrance exam, Weligkar Mumbai will shortlist candidates who manage to score the appropriate ranks in the entrance exams Shortlisted candidates are required to appear for the group and personal interviews as per the respective course.
The institute releases the merit list based on the score acheived by the applicant.
Candidates who are shortlisted based on merit lists have to submit the required admission fee for the respective courses. After that, they need to verify their documents.

courses_data.name: Welingkar Mumbai MBA Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Welingkar Mumbai offers a two-year, full-time PGDM and MBA courses in 27 different specialisations. Candidates who have completed their UG degree with 50% and a valid score in the CAT, MAT, ATMA and other national level entrance exams can apply online on the official website. Final-year students of UG degrees are also eligible to apply. Such candidates, if selected, will be admitted provisionally, on the condition that they meet all requirements.

faqs.question: Does Welingkar Mumbai offer MBA programme?
faqs.answer: At the postgraduate level, Welingkar Institute of Management Mumbai offers a two-year PGDM programme across General and seven other specialisations. This two-year full-time course is the flagship course of WeSchool. This PGDM programme is equivalent to the MBA course. However, the students get a Diploma after completion and not the MBA degree.

faqs.question: When can I apply for MBA course at Welingkar Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Welingkar Mumbai opens its admission portal for the MBA course twice. Firstly in the mid of Novemeber, and secondly in late February. Therefore, candidates with relevant scores in entrance exam ( CAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ XAT/ MAT) can get admission to the course during any one phase. Moreover, the institute also releases the deadline when it opens its application portal. Thus, candidates must visit the official website to track the admission dates and deadlines.

faqs.question: Is 80 a good percentile in CAT for the Welingkar Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Welingkar Mumbai cutoff 2024has been released across MBA specialisations. As per Welinkar Mumbai cutoff 2024, the CAT cutoff for the General AII India category students stood at85, which is similar to that of CMAT. Similarly, for XAT, the cutoff percentile was70. So, considering the MBA cutoffs, getting80percentile is not a good score. However, we can say it as satisfactory percentile to secure a sea at Welinkar Mumbai.

faqs.question: Can you provide an overview of the Executive PGDM programme offered by Welingkar Institute of Management?

faqs.question: How can I get into MBA at Welingkar Mumbai?

placement_data.title: Welingkar Mumbai Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Welingkar Mumbai has released the placement details for the PGDM programms of batch 2025. The overall highest and average domestic package offered during Welingkar Mumbai placements 2025 was INR 40 LPA and INR 11.68 LPA . The highest international package secured by students was INR 28.87 LPA and average int'l package was INR 19.05 LPA . The top recruiters of Welingkar Institute of Management in 2025 include Adani Group, Airtel, Amazon, Deloitte, Morgan Stanley, etc.
Earlier, the highest domestic package secured by batch 2024 was INR 40 LPA, while the average salary stood at at INR 12.88 LPA.

What's the MAH CET cut off for PGDM at Welingkar Mumbai?
description: Welingkar Mumbai cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA course. The cutoff was released in the form of percentiles for all rounds and categories for the students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. This page contains Welingkar Mumbai MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs for various rounds and categories. More exam-related updates are below:

Admission to various PG courses at Welingkar Mumbai is based on MAHCET (CAT, XAT, and CMAT). The institute offers PGDM courses based on valid MAHCET ranks. For admission to the PGDM course, candidates must have a valid score in MAHCET. Welinkar Mumbai accepts exams along with the courses as follows:

The Welingkar Mumbai MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MMS admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 99.9. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 99.93 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Welingkar Mumbai was 99.9. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 99.96 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 99.93.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MAH CET) is a state level management entrance test for admission to MBA/MMS courses. The MAH MBA CET 2025 cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students can view other important dates for MAH MBA CET 2026 in the table below:

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

facilities: Classrooms: Fully air-conditioned with LCD and OHP presentations audio systems, internet access, and video conferencing
The data centre of 325 sq ft has a mail server, RAS server, etc
Maker’s lab: A co-innovation platform that is designed to address challenges of the emerging world
Corporate library: The corporate library is equipped to address the learning, teaching, scholarship, and research activities
Agri Lab: The Agri lab offers farming activities like seed treatment, crop cultivation techniques, sowing, and harvesting
Brainstorm room: This is the place where ideation and group conversations take place
Hostels: There are girls' and boys' hostels available within a two-km radius of the college

data: INR 8,60,000 per annum- INR 9,20,000 per annum

reviews.review_heading: MBA people with lack of extracurricular activity.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-equipped with air conditioners, fireproof, digital screens with all wall speakers. Library has enough books for daily lectures. Hostels are well maintained but food isn’t included, electricity is free with washing machines. Only 2-occupant rooms were available.

reviews.review_heading: Welingkar Mumbai: m&e review 2024 good course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice. It has Wi-Fi, well-built classrooms with smart boards, an amphitheater, an auditorium, a canteen, and much more. The college has hostels, not within campus, but in nearby areas like Dadar, Wadala, and Matunga. It doesn't provide food, only stay.

reviews.review_heading: Live, make college life memorable.
reviews.review_text: I am from the Corona batch, didn't enjoy college life, but have an idea about facilities. College provides Wi-Fi all day, Computer Labs are well-designed, having all software. The library is good. It has all books, novels, journals, but 15 days is the validity of a book. The college provides rented flats as a hostel. There are AC and non-AC, single, shared rooms available. Food facilities are not available; we need to avail ourselves of a private mess. The sports ground has cricket, football, an...

reviews.review_heading: Review of PGDM at We School.
reviews.review_text: The lack of an outdoor sports field on campus is not ideal. The college is located in Matunga, which has high living costs. The college has 800 students, but there is too much crowding on campus. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, canteen and campus. The library is both digital and traditional. The hostel facility is not good. There are so many problems in the hostel. The most important thing is that food quality is not very good.

reviews.review_heading: The worst institute, unworthy.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was the worst; there were no facilities, and there was dirt all around. The institute is overall the worst in everything. There is no place for sports activities, and there is no exposure to any activities. The batchmates were the worst, with behavior issues and no knowledge of how to socialize.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and management of the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-developed infrastructure. The college campus is secured with CCTV cameras. The facilities provided by the college are really good. The labs at the college are properly working. The college library has all kinds of books. The hostel at the college is also good. Food in the hostel mess and canteen is good to eat. Overall, I am satisfied with the college facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A bit of a rollercoaster ride but overall a good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good and it will make you feel as if you are in a 5 star hotel, be it the classrooms, leisure rooms, dorm rooms, gaming room. The canteen and the library are well maintained. Toilets are always  clean and the classrooms have well conditioned AC with big monitors and projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Good experience with the teaching methods, attended lectures online and gained ample knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities were good and the classrooms had ample space with ventilation. The library had books which helped in gaining that extra part and the books and all the study material provided was up to date. I was a distance learning student so I don't have any idea about the food quality.

reviews.review_heading: I'd say that the placement packages are below average in our college.
reviews.review_text: The institute adapted to technology during covid well. The entire library was digitalised. We had a vast collection of newspapers, articles, and research papers available. Newspapers from almost 55 different countries were available for students to read. A lot of course-specific clubs, magazines, and associations were present in the college. We had centralised air-conditioned classrooms, a projector, and all the other basic facilities which were needed. Sports and extracurricular did not happen ...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with facilities but not hostels.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are places around campus to hang around anytime along with a canteen in college. There is a huge library and e-library with several books, journals, and magazines. College gives access to various terminals like Bloomberg and others too. Welingkar has 4 hostel facilities,  2 for boys and 2 for girls. They are at a distance of 2 km to 5 km from the campus in the Matunga area. There is no mess facility inside the hostel but there is a basic canteen f...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Welingkar Institute of Management.
reviews.review_text: The lectures are not held in the main building of Welingkar Institute but in the adjacent college of Ruia and Podar which is the partner college. The classrooms are not clean, and the benches are small and uncomfortable. We were not allowed to go to the main building of Welingkars.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Welingkar Institute of Management.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was available on the premises, and the speed of Wi-Fi was fine. Laboratories, classrooms, and library were regularly cleaned and maintained. The quality of food was fine, and they prepare different food on different days, and special food on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: Welingkar is worth getting into, and the ROI is great.
reviews.review_text: We have access to Bloomberg terminal and other research resources online. The faculty are very experienced and knowledgeable. All the facilities like hostel, canteen, medical and sports are available. There's even a gymkhana for students. There is a lack of co-curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great place to learn and develop yourself.
reviews.review_text: Since the classes are online now, the hostel facilities are not available so far. The same is applicable for classrooms. However, the virtual teaching facilities are superior to other colleges in the city. The college provides access to its digital library and Bloomberg portal which is one of its kind.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: There were a lot of facilities which include good quality of books for every topic. The book covers various chapters that were based on industry-oriented topics. There was also high-speed internet and Wi-Fi and good quality food in the canteen, and the food was delicious.

data.description: The faculty at Welingkar is PhD and PG diploma holders having profound experience in various streams.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Prin. L. N. Welingkar Institute of Management Development and Research, Mumbai

The placements in the college were pretty good.The companies across the different sectors visited the campus, offering a wide range of profiles with good packages.

The university offers UG, PG, and diploma programmes. These courses are offered in the fields of Engineering, Pharmacy and healthcare, Humanities, Management, Science, Arts, etc. Further, the university also offers PhD courses in Pharmacy, Law, Management, Psychology, etc. The admission process for Gurugram University commences online. Students have to go through the HSTES counselling for seat allotment to most of the courses. The university accepts vali scores in exams, such as JEE Mains, CUET, and more. Interested students can go through the following sections to learn about the admission process and eligibility for Gurugram University.

paragraphs: Gurgugram University admission processstarts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can then apply online and go through the selection process and admission confirmation. The university accepts students through entrance/ merit + counselling basis. Eligible students can follow the steps below to complete the admission atGurgugram University:

Interested students can go to theGurugram University Samarth portaland fill the application form with all the required details. A non-refundable amount of INR 1000 for the General Category and INR 250 for the Scheduled Caste is to be paid when finally submitting the form.

After submitting the application form candidates will be summoned for the department-wise entrance exams. The applicants are scrutinised based on their performance in the entrance exam/ past academic performance. The university shortlists students based on either academic merit or entrance performance. Seats are offered through the HSTES counselling.
Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay theGurugram University admission feesto complete the admission process.

TheGurugram University fee structureincludes components, such as tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, exam fees, and more. Students have to pay some of these components only once at the time of admission. The rest are to be paid either annually or semester-wise as per the guidelines. courses_data.description: The university offers two Management programmes: MBA and Integrated MBA. The university offers the programmes for a duration of two and five years respectively. Students can pursue the course in multiple specialisations, such as Business Analytics and Hospitality Management. Admission to the programmes is done based on CUET PG scores or the Common Entrance Test conducted by the university followed by an interview. The minimum eligibility required is to pass graduation from a recognised university. Students can refer to the following highlights to know more about theGurugram University MBA course:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the MBA programme at Gurugram University?
faqs.answer: Gurugram University offers a full-time two-year MBA programme and a five-year integrated MBA programme. Admission to the MBA programme at Gurugram University is done basis merit and marks obtained in the qualifying exam. The eligibility details of the MBA programme offered by Gurugram University are presented below:CourseEligibility CriteriaMBABachelor’s degree with 50% (47.5% for reserved category) aggregateIntegrated MBAClass 12 pass with 50% (47.5% for reserved category) aggregate

faqs.question: How can I get admission to UG/PG courses at Gurugram University? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer: Admission to Gurugram University ismerit-basedfor most UG and PG programs. Candidates can visit the official website to fill out the application form and check the eligibility criteria. The Gurugram University eligibility criteria for the UG courses is completion of Class 12 with 45% aggregate marks from a recognised board. For a few PG courses such as MBA and MSc, CUET score is required with a valid score.

courses_data.name: Gurugram University BPharma Admission 2026
courses_data.description: At the undergraduate level, Gurugram University offers BPharmacy under the Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences. Students can also enrol in a three-year programme through lateral entry. The minimum eligibility required is to pass Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50% (47.5% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Divyang candidates of Haryana) in Physics/ Chemistry & Mathematics/ Biology. The minimum age of the candidate at the time of application must be 17 years on or before Dec 31 of the year of admission to the programme. Students can check out the highlights below to learn about theGurugram University BPharma course

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BPharma course at Gurugram University?
faqs.answer: Gurugram University offers BPharma at the undergraduate level in full-time mode. Students can also pursue a three year BPharma course through lateral entry. Aspirants must fulfil the admission criteria to be eligible for the programme. Students will be selected through HSTES. Interested students can check out the following table to know about theGurugram University BPharm eligibility:CourseEligibilityBPharma (4 years)Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board with a minimum aggregate of 50%

faqs.question: What is the cost of BPharma at Gurugram University?
faqs.answer: The fee for BPharma at Gurugram University isINR 2.7 lakh. Other than the tuition fee, students have to pay other one-time charges like University Development Fee, Field Work/ Lab, etc. However, this fee available is sourced from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. In order to check out the latest and exact fee break-up students are advised to visit the official website or reach out to the admission office for details.

faqs.question: Does Gurugram University offer lateral admissions for BPharma?
faqs.answer: Yes, Gurugram University does offer lateral admissions for BPharma to students. It is a three-year programme offered at the undergraduate level through the Department of Pharmacy of the university. Admission to the programme is done throughLateral Entry Entrance Test(LEET) andHSTES. Students fulfiling the eligibility criteria of the programme can visit the official website of the university to know further.

placement_data.title: Gurugram University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Placement cell Gurugram University tries to develop student's careers. They give students imp skills, guidance, & connections to successfully navigate the ever-changing professional environment. Their mission focuses on closing the divide btw education & industry, making certain that every student graduates as a self-assured, industry-prepared professional. During the 2025 Gurugram University placement drive over 1500 paid internships were provided to students.

description: Gurugram University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Gurugram University can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Gurugram University cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 253896 and 424648 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 253896, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 201557.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 253896.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

During the last round, Gurugram University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 253896 and 424648 for students in the General AI quota. According to this cutoff list, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering proved to be the toughest to get a seat for, with the cutoff rank being 253896 in 2025, while in 2024, the same specialisation had the cutoff rank of 186093.

Gurugram University Round 4 seat allotment has been released for Home State quota. For the admission to UG and PG courses, the Gurugram University cutoff 2024 Round 4 seat allotment ranges between 66.75 and 53.6 for the General AI category candidates. Among all the courses, the course which has saw stiff competition as compared to others is M.A. in Public Administration (Public Policy and Governance) with a Round 4 cutoff of 66.75. highlights.description: Gurugram University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #12 in the Law (Government) category by the Outlook-ICARE 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Gurugram University rankings:

outlook.description:
Gurugram University has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Law (Government)' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Gurugram University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Law (Government)' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Gurugram University's rank is #12, the same as last year's rank in the 'Law (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dronacharya College of EngineeringReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college focuses on academics but does not focus on activities like events and sports.
reviews.review_text: In my college, a hostel is available but temporarily, and it is not in use for some reason. My college provides Wi-Fi facility for all students with a smart board in all classrooms. My college has a library with lots of books. There are 2 canteens. Labs are provided with all equipment. For medical facilities, 1 medical room is available. There is a large campus for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Gurugram University review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility, modern classrooms, and a library were also available. The quality of the hostel was also good. Mess and canteen food was also good in taste. Sports and games complex was available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the Gurugram University is very good. There are two campuses. One campus is located in Sector 51, Gurugram, and the other campus is located in Sector 87, Gurugram. The labs are very well maintained. And the library is well stocked.

reviews.review_heading: The college is above average but not very good.
reviews.review_text: The college has great infrastructure, it is under construction right now. The college has 2 campuses, one in Sector 51, Gurugram and the other in Sector 87, Manesar. There is no hostel right now, but in the next few years, they will provide a hostel and many facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The university is above average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is just wow in the next 4-5 years because there are two campuses. The old campus is in Sector 51 Gurugram, and the new campus is in Sector 87. The BPT course is in the new campus. The new campus is under construction, and the hostel is also under construction.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, and there are two campuses of Gurugram University, one campus is in Sector 51, Gurugram and the second campus is in Sector 87, Manesar. The new campus is under construction. The physiotherapy department is in the new campus. The library is well-maintained. Labs are very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 19 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Budget-friendly with good teachers and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: For being a government college, here the infrastructure is good and provided courses are nice. There are so many courses available so you don't have to feel sorry for what you want to learn. In our college, we have canteen and library. We have Wi-Fi support in every corner of the college so it is a good thing. The library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in Gurugram University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Gurugram University is above average. There is a separate building for the department of physiotherapy, which is under construction. Once the construction is complete, the department will shift to that building. The library is excellent and well-stocked.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in this.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is under construction. The new buildings are very excellent. There are two campuses here in Gurugram. The old campus is located in Sector 51 in Gurugram. The new campuses are located in Sector 87 in Gurugram (near Kankrola village).

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is under construction, but I can say that once the construction is complete, its is the best university offering Bachelor of physiotherapy in Haryana. The building is extremely good with full AC. The labs are very good. All things are good, and the old is also good.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admissions, and you can study well to achieve your success.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Gurugram University Sector 87 is under construction. There are no proper classes, and hostel facilities are not available. There is no proper facility for the students to live in the PG. There is no library. Campus is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it, but there are some good choices.
reviews.review_text: Gurugram University has two campuses. One campus is new, which is located in Sector 51, Gurugram, and the new campus is in Sector 87, which is under construction. Some of the courses are in the new campus, and some are in the old campus. Once a new campus is complete, all courses will come to the new campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 3 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty, extracurricular activities, and good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: There is a great facility in our college. Wi-Fi is also available for students in our college, and a great variety of foods are available in our canteen. The quality of food is also average, but after all, college is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am happy because of good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are available, and the infrastructure of my department is good, but not well-maintained. Wi-Fi is available in labs. Classrooms are spacious, but some are also dark and small. The quality of water is good in some water machines. Canteen food is acceptable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The most useless government college.
reviews.review_text: There is infrastructure in the college, but there is no Wi-Fi, the condition of the classrooms is not good, and many essential items in the labs are missing. The library is also very small and does not have relevant books, and the librarian is also not available in the library to issue books.

paragraphs: The fee for MBA in Gurugram University is around INR 66,00- INR 1.8 lakh. Other than the tuition fee, students have to pay other one-time charges like University Development, lab fee, field work, etc. . However, this fee is sourced from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. In order to check out the latest and exact fee break-up students are advised to visit the official website or reach out to the admission office for details.

Yes, there are scholarships for the Scheduled Caste Category students at Gurugram University. The university offers Post Matric Scholarship Scheme of GOI for welfare of candidates belonging to the Scheduled Caste Category. As per letter No.3/44-2012 Sch. (2) dated 18.06.2013 of the Director General Higher Education, Haryana, Panchkula, students, whose parents/guardian income is upto INR 2.50 Lacs per annum, are eligible for the scholarship.

The scholarshisp offers students include enrollment/registration, tuition, games, union, library, magazine, Medical Examination and such other fees compulsorily payable by the student to the institution or University/Board. Refundable deposit like caution money, security deposit are, however, excluded. For students admitted under this scheme, the application form has to be submitted by the students to the concerned Chairperson/Director of the Department/ Institute.

Gurugram University extends a range of scholarships that include fee waivers and concessions for meritorious and needy students. Scholarships at Gurugram University are on the university page and can be downloaded and printed as an application form which lists the types of scholarships and their requirements.

The BCom fee at Gurugram University ranges from INR 1.44 Lacs to INR 1.8 Lakh. The BCom fee includes one-time charges like University Development, lab fees, fieldwork, etc. Final admission to the BTech cousre is confirmed once the admission fee is paid within the stipulated period. To check out the latest and exact fee break-up students are advised to visit the official website or reach out to the admission office for details. *This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

college_info.intro:
Bennett University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech programme for the duration of four-years. The university offers BTech programme in CSE, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics & Computer Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Biotech, Artificial Intelligence, and others. Bennett University Noida BTech students can even go for non-technical jobs such as Marketing Managers, Customer Service Representatives, Sales Representatives, and Product Managers.
Noida Bennett University MBA course students can choose from various specialisations such as Human Resources, Marketing, Business Analytics, Media, Mogistics & Supply Chain, Healthcare, and others. MBA students are taught to create an entrepreneurial mindset. The students can develop analytical thinking and innovation, critical thinking and analysis, and various other skills. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Bennett University and their respective eligibility and Bennett University fees:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Students willing to get admission must take part in the Bennett University admission process before the last date of application. Students must know their Bennett University eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. At the UG level, the Bennett Noida offers four and five-year BTech, BBA, BCA, BSc, BDes, BA, and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the Greater Noida Bennett University provides MBA, MCA, MTech, MA, MDes, LLM, and various other courses to students. The university also provides certificate and PhD courses to students. Check out some of the popular , along with eligibility, selection, and in the following table:

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for PhD course is INR 1.8 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection for PhD course will be based on Bennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT) followed by a personal interview round. BRAT is conducted by Bennett University and schedule for the same will be updated on the official website. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for each course is INR 1,500. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode.

At PG level, courses such as MBA and MCA are offered. The university also provides certificate and PhD programmes to students. Students who want to get admission to any course should apply online on the official website.
faqs.question: What are the courses offered at Bennett University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Bennett University accepts entrance exam scores for admission to PhD course. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, GATE, SLET for PhD admission. Besides, Bennett University conducts BRAT for admission to PhD course. BRAT is Bennett Research Aptitude Test is a one or two-hour entrance exam for admission to various PhD specialisations. The syllabus for entrance exam varies with PhD specialisation.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, supportive facilities and decent placement opportunities at Bennett University.

review_content.Placements: Bennett University has shown steady improvement in placements over recent years. Approximately 70 to 80 percent of students from my course are successfully placed. The package offered went up to 1.2 to 1.5 crore per annum international offers while the average package ranged between 6 to 8LPA and the lowest package is 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: A modern well developed infrastructure that supports both academic and residential life. The classrooms are spacious, air conditioned and equipped with smart boards and projectors. High speed internet labs are well equipped with updated systems and software relevant etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA LL.B. (Hons) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with this college as it is completely up to my expectations from the times groups.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% of students were placed in our course. The highest package was around 35 LPA, while the lowest was around 7-8 LPA, with an average package of around 13-14 LPA. The top recruiting companies are SAM, CAM, Tech Mahindra, etc. Top roles offered are associates.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has 24/7 access to Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, classrooms, library, and hostel. In the hostel, we’ll be provided with 3 beds and a table for triple sharing, along with 3 almirahs. The complete campus is air-conditioned, the mess and canteen food is decent, and we have 24/7 medical facilities with AIIMS qualified doctors and various varieties of games.

Bennett University is ranked as a sixth Best School of Management, Top Private B-School under the University Programme category by IRF Ranking (North Zone). So overall Bennett University is a good university that offers BTech in Computer Science and various other courses to students.

review_summary.college_name: Bennett University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It has the best campus life, food, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 500 companies came for placements. Big giants like Amazon, Google, Infosys, etc., hire students. For B.Tech, the highest package offered is 1.35 crores per annum. Many startups are also launched from our college every year. The college also provides funds for that. So overall, if we have the will, we can do it.
content.Infrastructure: It has the best facilities I could have ever imagined. It has centralised AC all over the campus and in the hostel also. Wi-Fi is also available here. Lounges are there which have different kinds of games. 2 gyms are also available here. Food is good. For medical facilities, we have a tie-up with Max Hospital.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Bennet university CSE records.

content.Placements: Good placements are available here at Bennett University. The highest package is 1.37cr, the average package is 11 LPA and the lowest package is 4 to 6 LPA. Top company visiting here are Microsoft, Amazon and KPMG. More than 90 percent of students got internship chance and the companies were IBM, Cisco, Goldman Sachs, AWS and many more. Top roles were Software Engineer, Machine Learning, Data Analyst, Backend intern and Cloud intern. 50 to 70 percent of students are placed in our course in the year 2025.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus has very good internet speed in academic blocks, hostels, as well as in library. Classrooms here have AC, a smart board as well as projectors. Labs are also there in my college with many of them have computer in them and used for project sessions. Hostels are very clean and have single, double, and triple bed options available. Rooms have good Wi-Fi speed, 24/7 security as well as good housekeeping. Food has both veg as well as non veg options with a wide variety. Doctors are available here during working hours. Ground and gym are also for any type of activity.

admission_overview.title: Bennett University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Bennett University admissions generally take place on the basis of the merit & entrance examinations. The university accepts national-level entrance examinations like JEE Main, SAT India, etc., for admission to specific programmes. The university conducts Bennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT) & also BUMAT for PhD & MBA admission, respectively. Candidates can apply for the available course choice online on the official site of the university. Bennett University offers 30+ programmes at UG, PG, PhD, diploma & certificate levels across multiple streams like Eng, Management, Science, Arts, etc.

paragraphs: Bennett University admissionsare based both on the merit & entrance examinations. The university accepts national-level entrance examinations likeJEE Main,SAT India, etc., for admission to specific programmes. The university conductsBennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT)&BUMATfor PhD & MBA admission, respectively. Candidates can go for application to various course of their choice in online mode on the official website of the institute.Bennett Universityoffers 30+ courses at the UG, PG, PhD, diploma & certificate levels in multiple streams like Eng, Management, Science, Arts, etc.

Bennett University admission course admissionis subject to clearance of the priest eligibility criteria. Candidates need to complete Class 12 for UG courses & graduation for PG programmes. The applications for all the programmes are online. Check below popularBennett University coursesalong with their eligibility & selection criteria:

Bennett University's admission processincludes multiple steps such as registration, selection & admission confirmation. The criteria for selection vary course-wise. However, other steps are quite similar for all the programmes. Below are step-wise details forBennett University admissionsafter submitting the application form:

Bennett University selects candidates primarily based on the national-level entrance exam. SAT India is accepted for most of the UG courses. Entrance exams such as JEE Main, CMAT, CLAT, etc. are accepted for specific courses. The university also conductsBUMAT&BRATfor admission to MBA & PhD programmes.

Besides, the university also considers the merit of the candidates in the qualifying examination for admission. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round for some of the courses.

Once the candidates are selected, they need to bring the specified documents for verification. Aspirants also need to pay a programme fee to confirm their seat in the university. In case the candidate gets selected & is unable to pay the fee within the requisite time, his or her admission stands cancelled.
Check out more on Bennett University in the below videos:

courses_data.name: Bennett University BTech Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:SAT India, JEE Main, CBSE 12th, ISC, UP 12th, NEET
courses_data.description: BTech is a four-year programme spread across eight semesters. Bennett University offers BTech insix specialisationsthrough the School of Computer Science Engineering & Technology and School of Engineering & Applied Sciences. The six major specialisations are further offered in various minor specialisations. Besides, Bennett University also offersintegrated BTech + MTech course in Biotechnologyfor five years divided into 10 semesters. The university offers admission to BTech course based on national-level entrance exam score such as JEE Main and SAT India. NEET is also accepted for BTech Biotechnology and Integrated programme. faqs.answer: TheBennett University BTech CSE feesisINR 15.7 lakh.This amount is from official sources and is subject to change. Selected students have to pay the course fee to confirm their seats. In case, an aspirant is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, admission will stand cancelled.

faqs.question: How is the BTech CSE course at Bennett University?
faqs.answer: Computer Science Engineering is one of the popular BTech specialisations offered by Bennett. BTech CSE is further divided into minor specialisations, including Artificial Intelligence, Cloud Computing, BlockChain, Cyber Security, Data Science, Gaming, Robotic Process Automation, DevOps, Full Stack, Drones, etc.Two internships of 8 and 16 weeks are a part of the BTech CSE syllabus. faqs.question: What is the CAT Cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: Bennett University CAT Cutoff 2025 has not been released yet. However, according to the CAT Cutoff 2024, the overall cutoff was 24 for students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI candidates, the CAT overall cutoff was also the same at 24. For more information about CAT Cutoff 2025 and previous years, students can clickhere.

courses_data.name: Bennett University BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: BBA is athree-year coursespread across six semesters. Bennett University offersBBAineight specialisationsat the UG level. BBA (Hons) degree can be earned by completing additional 20 credit courses. Candidates need to complete Class 12 with at least 60% aggregate (best of three subjects) withEnglishas compulsory subject or with a minimum score of 24 in IB Board to apply for BBA programme. Students need to choose the specialisation of their choice in the start of the fourth semester. BBA curriculum involvessummer internships, industry visits, community projects, Discovery walks, and various opportunities to gain experience through value-added courses and general electives offered by other schools.
