courses_data.name: Bennett University PhD Admission 2026
courses_data.description: PhD is offered for a minimum of three-year at the doctoral level. Bennett University offers PhD in 10 specialisations through various schools. Aspirants with bachelor's degree with honours and a rigorous research report in the major or relevant area of study and 75% marks of 8.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale in the relevant programme can apply for any of the PhD specialisations. The eligibility requirement of master's degree varies specialisation-wise. Download:Bennett University PhD Admission Details

faqs.question: Who is eligible for PhD at Bennett University?
faqs.answer: Bennett University eligibility criteriavaries specialisation-wise for PhD course. However, the common eligibility among all is that aspirants with bachelor's degree with honours and a rigorous research report in the major or relevant area of study and 75% marks of 8.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale in the relevant programme can apply for any of the PhD specialisations. Below is PhD specialisation-wise eligibility criteria:PhD SpecialisationEligibilityCSEMTech/ MCA/ ME/ MSc/ MS in any discipline with a

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for Bennett University PhD?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bennett University accepts entrance exam scores for admission to PhD course. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such asUGC-NET, CSIR-NET, GATE, SLETfor PhD admission. Besides, Bennett University conducts BRAT for admission to PhD course.BRAT isBennett Research Aptitude Testis a one or two-hour entrance exam for admission to various PhD specialisations. The syllabus for entrance exam varies with PhD specialisation.

faqs.question: How to apply for PhD course at Bennett University?
faqs.answer: Visit the official website of Bennett University and click on apply now. Register and fill the form. Pay the application of Rs 1500 to complete the PhD application process. Some of the documents required include PG marksheet and scanned photograph.

faqs.question: How can I get PhD admission at Bennett University?
faqs.answer: Admission to PhD course is based on Bennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT) conducted by the university. Besides, the university also accepts national-level entrance exams likeUGC NET,CSIR,GATE, ICAR, SLET for admission to PhD courses. Once the entrance exam is conducted, candidates are called for presentation of preliminary research proposal and an interview round.The university declares the result ofBRATon the official website of the university. Selected candidates have to pay the programme fee

faqs.question: Can I get into Bennett University without CAT?
faqs.answer: Bennett University offers a large diversity of courses to students in Management field. Bennett University admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as MAT,  NMAT,  XAT,  CAT,  CMAT,  CUET,  BUMAT, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: Is admission open in Bennett University MBA?
faqs.answer: Bennett University admission is open for MBA and other courses. Students should visit the official website to know more and apply online. MBA course students can choose from various specialisations depending upon thir choice.

placement_report.college_name: Bennett University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Bennett University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Bennett University placement 2025 concluded with good outcomes. The highest and average salary offered to BTech batch 2025 was INR 137 LPA and INR 11.10 LPA . The highest and average package offered to MBA students was INR 33 LPA and INR 7.41 LPA . For BBA, the top and average salary stood at INR 23.5 LPA and 5.16 LPA . More than 450 recruiters visited the Campus for BTech placements, 143 for MBA, 85 for BBA and 44 for MCA placements. The top recruiters of Bennett University in 2025 included Microsoft, Google, Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, S&P Global, PwC, TCS, Berger Paints, Cvent, KPMG, etc .

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario at Bennett University?
faqs.answer: Bennett University offers decent placements annually for courses like BTech, MBA, BBA, BCA, etc. As per the latest report, the highest and average salary offered to BTech batch 2025 was INR 137 LPA and INR 11.10 LPA. The highest and average package offered to MBA students was INR 33 LPA and INR 7.41 LPA. For BBA, the top and average salary stood at INR 23.5 LPA and 5.16 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the placement of CSE in Bennett University?
faqs.answer: Bennett University offers BTech in various specialisations, such as CSE, ECE, Biotech, etc. The university has released the overall placement data for BTech courses. As per the latest report, the the highest and average package offered to the BTech batch 2025 stood at INR 137 LPA and INR 11.10 LPA, respectively. Over 450 recruiters visited the university for BTech placements in 2025. According to the latest reviews provided by the BTech CSE students of Bennett University on Shiksha.com, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, TCS, Infosys, etc. are the major companies that visit the campus for placements.

The course-wise Bennett University average package offered in 2025 is presented below: Course Placement Statistics (2025) BTech INR 7.99 LPA MBA INR 7.41 LPA MCA INR 5.7 LPA BAJMC INR 3.91 LPA BBA INR 5.16 LPA BCA INR 5.26 LPA Law INR 6.7 LPA

faqs.question: What is the average package offered to MBA students at Bennett University?

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Bennett University?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report, more than 450 recruiters visited the Campus for BTech placements, 143 for MBA, 85 for BBA and 44 for MCA placements. Some of the top recruiters of Bennett University in 2025 include Google, Microsoft, Amazon, S&P Global, PwC, TCS, Berger Paints, Aditya Birla, Cvent, etc. These recruiters placed students in various sectors with new-age job profiles.

faqs.question: What is Bennett University PhD fees?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for PhD course is INR 1.8 lakh . Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection for PhD course will be based on Bennett Research Aptitude Test (BRAT) followed by a personal interview round. BRAT is conducted by Bennett University and schedule for the same will be updated on the official website. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for each course is INR 1,500. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode.

hostel.description:
The hostel has a capacity of accommodating 6000 students at a time. Bennett University, Noida Facilities include separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. Rooms are designed with spacious rooms and are fully air-conditioned. The Hostel has provided with cable connection and high-speed internet facility.
Reading rooms and additional sports facilities like table-tennis rooms, chess, and carom rooms will also be available.
The overall charge of student’s discipline and hostel administration will be in the safe hands of the Chief Warden.

library.description:
Bennett University has two libraries - Central Library and Law Library
The Library is fully automated using KOHA with 3M electromagnetic/RFID enabled security gates, smart card, self-check-in and checkout, RFID dropbox, etc. It also provides the facility for the students to not only search books through the M-OPAC, but they can also renew books, reserve books, create virtual shelve for their reading and suggest book purchase for the library.
Law Library:
The college has a world-class law library with subjects covering various fields of study ranging from law, management to social sciences. The library currently is creating a database of wide-ranging national and international journals and e-resources like JSTORE, WESTLAW, KUWERONLINE, etc.
 It has an automated check-out system, and the students can access the databases externally from outside the campus during vacations and travel. The lending and returning of books are fully automated. Students can now transform their reading into a truly immersive experience with the newly launched Reading Room, with state-of-art furniture and a conducive environment that will foster student’s learning.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis Court, Snooker and Pool, Kabaddi Court

reviews.review_heading: It has the best campus life, food, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has the best facilities I could have ever imagined. It has centralised AC all over the campus and in the hostel also. Wi-Fi is also available here. Lounges are there which have different kinds of games. 2 gyms are also available here. Food is good. For medical facilities, we have a tie-up with Max Hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Bennet university CSE records.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus has very good internet speed in academic blocks, hostels, as well as in library. Classrooms here have AC, a smart board as well as projectors. Labs are also there in my college with many of them have computer in them and used for project sessions. Hostels are very clean and have single, double, and triple bed options available. Rooms have good Wi-Fi speed, 24/7 security as well as good housekeeping. Food has both veg as well as non veg options with a wide variety. Doctors are a...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive facilities and decent placement opportunities at Bennett University.
reviews.review_text: A modern well developed infrastructure that supports both academic and residential life. The classrooms are spacious, air conditioned and equipped with smart boards and projectors. High speed internet labs are well equipped with updated systems and software relevant etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this college as it is completely up to my expectations from the times groups.
reviews.review_text: The college has 24/7 access to Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, classrooms, library, and hostel. In the hostel, we’ll be provided with 3 beds and a table for triple sharing, along with 3 almirahs. The complete campus is air-conditioned, the mess and canteen food is decent, and we have 24/7 medical facilities with AIIMS qualified doctors and various varieties of games.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett University: Best for technical learning.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in the college typically include classrooms equipped with modern teaching aids and labs with advanced equipment for practical. The library has an extensive collection of books and digital resources. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel includes accommodation, food, medical facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett University review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my course/department are decent. The classrooms have AC, we have 3 libraries, and Wi-Fi is good. The quality of the food at the mess is not great, the food doesn't taste great, but we have Domino's, Subway, Snapeats, and a lot of other options to eat from.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett University unfiltered review by a CSE undergraduate.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for B.Tech computer science is very good. Every classroom, lab, mess, hostels, and all are air-conditioned. The classrooms are neat and clean. Classrooms have projectors, and whole campus is Wi-Fi operated also. There are many sports, so students can play any sport of their choice.

reviews.review_heading: Best university with good placement.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like an IMAC labs, a full centralized AC indoor basketball court, indoor gym, and there are about 200 labs in the college. There are two libraries, one dedicated to law students. There is Wi-Fi facility in the whole campus, and the classrooms are also modern.

reviews.review_heading: Totally worth the money if students work hard.
reviews.review_text: The labs are really well-organized and aligned in such a way that a student can learn in the most efficient manner. The hostels are pretty clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bennett University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and washrooms all over the campus are very clean. There are no such cases of ragging on the campus. Authorities are very strict in the case of ragging. The food quality is very good, and we are offered a wide range of dishes every week. The whole campus has good Wi-Fi range.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett University CSE - My unfiltered review.
reviews.review_text: Bennett University has one of the best campuses (68 acres). The campus is a bit far from main city. But all the basic amenities are inside the campus only. Hostels are clean and rooms are of decent size. All the necessary labs are available with appropriate equipments.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement with supportive faculty and modern infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Bennett University offers excellent infrastructure with smart classrooms, a fully Wi-Fi enabled campus, modern computer labs, and a huge library with digital resources. Hotels are clean and provide laundry, Wi-Fi, and common rooms. Food in the mess is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: University is not bad as you get exposure and will meet lots of great people too.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and hostels are also medium. But mess food is not really good at all. Labs and lecture halls are also nice. Hostel rooms are triple sharing, and they might be a bit small for three people. The food outlets are also not bad really.

reviews.review_heading: Bennett is good for hardworking students and supports them in startups and everything.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are all Ph.D. holders and are experienced. The infrastructure is very modern, and technology is used in everything. Everything is present at Bennett, such as super-Wi-Fi, labs for each subject, a very big library with 20k+ books. The quality of facilities in the hostel is very good because the rooms are clean and the hostel is safe. Medical and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: We have the hostel facility, and I would rate it 5 out of 5. There are 2 members in each room. We have a common bathroom, and rooms will be cleaned twice a day. If we have any issues, we can email them, and then they will solve the problem.

data.description: Bennett University faculty are well experienced and are research scholars themselves. In the past, they have taught in various top universities and colleges. One of the faculty has completed his education from Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia National Law University, Lucknow. The university also invites faculty for several guest lectures and various national and international conferences and also arranges seminars and workshops for students and teachers.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Bennett University

likes.text: Many renowned companies like Microsoft, Wipro, Cognizant, HP, Hitachi Consultancies, Samsung Display, Byju's, etc., visit the campus to recruit students.
As the first batch of law we got a chance to do internship with NALSAR, NLSIU Bangalore, NLU DELHI, TISC, TIMES OF INDIA, and many more.

paragraphs: Bennett University awards several scholarships to various meritorious undergraduate and postgraduate students. The Eligibility for various scholarships is determined based on the scores of the candidate in the last qualifying exam or the course-specific entrance examinations. Below mentioned are some of the scholarships offered at Bennett University:

Merit-Based Scholarship: The university offers scholarships based on the programme. The scholarship is based on various courses. Aspiring candidates must have to qualify the eligibility criteria set by the university. The below-mentioned are course-based scholarship ranges:
Sibling Scholarships: The scholarship of 10% is applicable for the duration of overlap of the programs of siblings and applicable to wards of the same parents and not cousins.
Single Girl Child Scholarship: The scholarship of 10% is applicable for the complete duration of the program on tuition fees.
Alumni Scholarship: The scholarship 10% tuition fee scholarship is available for Bennett University alumni who enrol in a postgraduate program at the university.

Sports Scholarship: The university offers up to 50% scholarship on first-year tuition fees is available for candidates with state, national, or international-level sports participation or achievements. Scholarships are subject to document verification at the time of registration.

Ward of Defence: The scholarship is offered for wards of serving and retired personnel from the Indian Armed Forces (Army, Navy, Air Force) and Paramilitary forces (CISF, BSF, CRPF, ITBP, NSG, and SSB) are eligible for a 5% scholarship on tuition fees. This scholarship is applicable for the entire duration of the program.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. According to the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Annamalai University, Chidambaram, ranks within the rank band of #101-150 under the category 'University'.

Annamalai University admissions 2026-26 are open for Certificate, Diploma, UG and PG courses. Interested candidates can visit the official university's website to apply for their desired course. A few additional updates are given below:

table.details: A+ Grade by NAAC, NBA, ICAR
-101-150 by NIRF 2025 under the University category

college_info.intro:
Annamalai University Cuddalore popular programmes are MBA and BTech/ B.E. BTech students can look for career opportunities such as Web Designer, Software Developer, Testing Engineer, System Engineer, and others. B.E./BTech is offered in 12 specialiations. The B.E. in Chemical Engineering department aims to provide research-based education to students. The labs are adequately equipped with modern pieces of equipment.
Annamalai University Chidambaram's MBA faculty has received various awards in recognition of their contributions to the knowledge. The MBA department has produced around 290 PhDs and 190 MPhils. 1,131 research papers have been published in international and national journals. In addition to this, the department has signed MoUs with four Indian and various foreign institutes and organisations. Overall, Annamalai University in Chennai is ranked among the best universities for its flagship programmes. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Annamalai University Chidambaram and their respective eligibility and Annamalai University Annamalai Nagar fee structure:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Candidates willing to get admission to the different courses must take part in the Annamalai University Chidambaram admission process and apply online on the official website of Annamalai University. At the UG level, Annamalai University Chidambaram offers BTech, BA, BSc, and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university has MBA, MCA, etc. programmes to students. The university also provides certification, PhD, and several other courses to students.

faqs.answer: A:    The total course fee for the BSc at Annamalai University ranges around INR 10,300 - INR 4.5 lakh. Candidates willing to seek admission to any of the BSc courses are shortlisted on the basis of their marks in Science subjects in previous qualifying degree/ exam. Shortlisted candidates are further called for a counselling-cum-seat allotment round. Annamalai University offers a BSc (Hons) programme across three specialisations. The programme comprises four years of academic curriculum divided in a semester pattern. The annual fee for BSc (Hons) Agriculture/ Horticulture is around INR 56,030 while for B.Sc. (Hons) Agriculture: Self-Supporting, it is around INR 1.21 LPA. This fee keeps on changing. Hence visit the official website for complete information.
faqs.question: What is the fee structure of Annamalai University for the B.Sc. Programme?

faqs.answer: A:    At the postgraduate level, Annamalai University Chennai offers two to five-year MSc courses to the students. The fee for MSc ranges between INR 14,190 and INR 1.9 lakh. This amount is taken from official sources and can change.
faqs.question: What is the fees for M.Sc Interior Design course in Annamalai University ?

faqs.answer: A:    The university does not conduct any in-house entrance test for MBA in Annamalai University. However, the aspirants are selected based on merit in TANCET followed by a counselling round. Candidates seeking admission need to take the entrance test and apply by completing the TANCET application process. There is no other provision for admission to an MBA. Hence, aspirants must take the exam and secure a valid score.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MBA in Annamalai University?

faqs.answer: A:    To get a seat at Annamalai University for MBBS course, candidates must score upto 11005 in the Round 1 Seat allotment of NEET UG Counselling. The MCC conducted NEET UG Counselling upto Round 3, where, candidates who scored upto 14384 in R2 and upto 17596 in R3 for the General category All India Quota were eligible. Annamalai University accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the MBBS course. Candidates who have appeared for the NEET exam are eligible for the final admissions. To know more about Annamalai University cutoff, stay tune to this page.

reviews_list.review_title: Decent academy support with a good campus, but needs more practical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Around 60%-70% of students from the B.E. Civil course got placed. The highest package offered is around 6 LPA, the lowest is around 2 LPA, and the average is about 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters include NGOs, media houses, and educational firms. Around 50% of students got internships in companies like Tech for India, Times Group, and local startups. Common roles include content writers, research assistants, and HR trainees.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study material. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average, while the canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage student recreation. Overall, the infrastructure is decent and supports both academics and student life well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Place for placement VSB Engineering College.

content.Placements: Each student gets 2-4 offers from various companies, and the placement is 100 percent. There are many companies that take students from our college, and last time the company Capgemini took over more than 700 students from VSB Engineering College located in Karur.
content.Infrastructure: There is a good infrastructure in hostels. They provide routers for students to use free Wi-Fi. In the hostel, they provide a bed with bedsheets for each student and cupboards with blocks, and the routine is different from other colleges. There are strict rules for the hostel that everyone should follow.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Annamalai University review.

content.Placements: The placement was good, but not with very big companies. You can't get a good job with a decent package. I'm just studying in third year, so I don't know much about placements. But our college has good placements. The faculty members provide hands-on practice instead of just theories a lot, so it helps you upgrade your skills and get placed easily.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure in college, old but in good condition. Nice architecture and a good environment for study. Hostel quality is poor, not so hygienic and clean. If you want to join the hostel, think twice before joining. Most of the students get skin problems because of the bad water and unhygienic environment in the hostel.

admission_overview.title: Annamalai University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Annamalai University Admission 2026 will open soon. Annamalai University offers UG, PG, PG diploma, diploma, certificate, and PhD programmes covering the domains of Science, Engineering, Healthcare, Management etc . It also provides courses through distance learning, which are approved by the Distance Education Council (DEC). In addition to the regular programmes, value-added courses in all the departments of Annamalai University are conducted every day after the class timings. In addition, Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) conducted through the SWAYAM portal of the UGC are also offered at Annamalai University free of cost. Admissions are mostly merit based with admission to some select courses being entrance based. The instituet accepts MAH CET, TANCET, NEET PG, NEET UG etc for entrance based admissions. Read the article to know more about Annamalai University Admission 2026.

paragraphs: Annamalai University admission 2026 includes the submission of an application form, appearance for the entrance test, the release of the merit list, the counselling process and fee payment. students can follow the -wise Annamalai University admission process as given below:

The university accepts applications via online mode. Eligible students can visit the university's official website (www.annamalaiuniversity.ac.in) to apply. Further, the aspirants shall ensure that they apply within the due date.

If a student fills out the initial application process, they now have to appear for the course-specific entrance test. For undergraduate engineering, i.e., BTech course, students should turn out for the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA).
Based on the entrance test scores, the University will release the merit list of eligible students for the next round of the admission process.

In this , students whose names appeared in the merit list released by the University are then required to appear for the counselling process. After the counselling round, Annamalai University released a final list of selected students for final admission. Selected students are then required to pay theAnnamalai University admission feeto confirm their admission.

Annamalai University fee is cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. Find below the fees for the various courses offered by Annamalai University:
Note:The above-mentioned fee is taken from an official source/sanctioning body. Hence, it may vary.
The university is associated with several colleges. There are over 10 colleges affiliated to the university.

courses_data.name: Annamalai University MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Annamalai University offers a two-year MBA course at the PG level. The course is offered in both full-time and distance learning modes. MBA admission at Annamalai University is based on a valid TANCET score, followed by a counselling process. The Faculty of Arts at Annamalai conducts a two-year MBA course divided into four semesters. Also, the university offers an MBA Programme in dual-specialisation mode, allowing candidates to choose two specialisations of their preference.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission for MBA in Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: With less than 50% in graduation it is difficult to get admission in Annamalai University for MBA course. The minimum marks required for the same is 50%. You can contact the admission office for more details.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MBA in Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: The university does not conduct any in-house entrance test for MBA in Annamalai University. However, the aspirants are selected based on merit in TANCET followed by a counselling round. Candidates seeking admission need to take the entrance test and apply by completing the TANCET application process. There is no other provision for admission to an MBA. Hence, aspirants must take the exam and secure a valid score.

faqs.question: Can I do MBA in Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the Annamalai University MBA course admission need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria. The applications are accepted by only the candidates fulfilling the eligibility criteria. To be eligible for MBA admission, students must have passed a graduation degree (10+2+3 pattern) in any stream with a minimum of 50% aggregate (SC/ST candidates need to qualify for the graduation degree with pass marks only). Further, candidates must also hold the relevant documents

faqs.question: What is the application fee for MBA at Annamalai University DDE?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission in MBA programme at Annamalai University DDE have to pay an application fee. Aspirants can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. The application fee for MBA is INR 295 including GST. Candidates are advised to keep the fee receipt with them for any future reference.

The minimum eligibility is to pass graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university. faqs.question: I have scored less than 60% in graduation. Can I get admission for M.Tech at Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: Most of the universities and institutes accept candidates for its M.Tech programme based on fulfilment of a specified set of eligibility criteria. Similarily, forAnnamalai University M.Tech admissions, the minimum marks required in graduation is 50%. Hence, a candidate scoring less than 60% is eligible to apply for admission at the institute if they have scored more than 50%. However, as admissions are entrance-based, students must secure a valid score in the accepted entrance exams. Alternative

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for M.Tech admission at Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: Applicants should have a graduation degree in relevant subjects with 50% at least aggregates to secure an admission in the M.Tech programme at Annamalai University.The degree should be acquired in a certified university.The applicants should also present themselves in the CEETA or TANCET entrance examination.Counselling and final selection are made only on qualified people.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for M.Tech admission at Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: The CEETA/TANCET is accepted by Annamalai University to grant admission in MTech.They are Tamil Nadu state level entrance examinations carried out in postgraduate engineering admissions.A student should obtain passing scores in either one of these examinations.There is counselling in seat allotment that follows the entrance score.

faqs.question: How many courses are offered at Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University offers nearly 445 courses at UG, PG, doctoral, Diploma and certificate levels. These courses are offered across the streams of Engineering, Science, Arts, Commerce, Management, Fine Arts, Architecture & Planning, Aviation, etc. The courses are full-time, part-time, distance, and online. Moreover, the university and its affiliated colleges offer the courses. Some of the Annamalai University-affiliated colleges are AIHM Institute of Tourism and Hotel Management, Aleesha Institute of Fashion Designing, Allied College of Hospitality, Culinary Arts and Management, Annamalai University DDE, Aquariuss Animations Pvt Ltd, etc.Click Herefor eligibility, fee, and selection details about offered courses.

faqs.question: How can students join Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: The UG degree admission process entails the basic eligibility criteria of maintaining a minimum aggregate of 40% to 50% in Class 12. For PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation and secure a valid score in suggested entrance exams, depending on the course opted for. The University considers valid scores of entrance exams such as NEET UG/ PG, CEETA, TANCET, TNEA and others.

placement_data.title: Annamalai University Placements Overview 2025
paragraphs: Annamalai University placement report 2025 is not released. According to the latest data released, a total of 94 companies visited the campus and 1791 students were placed during Annamalai University placements 2024 .

A total of 59 companies visited the campus and 440 students were placed from the Engineering department during the placement drive 2024. 8 companies visited and 380 students were placed from the Agriculture department in 2024.
The Faculty-wise companies visited and students placed in 2024 are mentioned below:

tables.context: How many students were placed during Annamalai Uni

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during Annamalai University placements?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University highest package data is not released. However, as per NIRF report 2025, BTech and MTech median package recorded in 2024 was 2.5 LPA and 4.26 LPA. MBA median package in 2024 was 2.45 LPA.

faqs.question: Does Annamalai University offer placements?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University offers good placements to its students. 94 companies visited the campus and 1791 students were placed in 2024. During the placement drive 2023, 106 companies visited and 1558 students were placed.

faqs.question: How many companies visit the campus during Annamalai University placements?
faqs.answer: A total of 94 companies visited the campus during Annamalai University placements 2024. In 2023, 106 companies visited the campus.

faqs.question: Does Annamalai University have a placement cell?
faqs.answer: The institute has a dedicated placement cell. The official report for 2023 placements is not out yet. However, the NIRF report has disclosed the 2023 placement statistics. Check out the table for more: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (PG-2 year Agriculture) 202 Students placed (PG-2 year Agriculture) 125 Median package (PG-2 year Agriculture) INR 4.22 LPA Total students (UG-4 year Agriculture) 1,180 Students placed (UG-4 year Agriculture) 811 Median package (UG-4 year Agriculture) INR 3.19 LPA Total students (MTech) 20 Students placed (MTech) 18 Median package (MTech) INR 4.28 LPA NOTE: The above details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How are the Annamalai University ME placements?
faqs.answer: As per Annamalai University's NIRF report 2024, the university was able to place 18 M.Tech students during the placement drive held in 2023. Moreover, the report states that the median package for MTech courses stood at INR 4.28 LPA . Other than this, Cognizant, IBM, TCS, Wipro, HCL, EY, and WNS are some of the top recruiters who have actively participated in the past AU placements.

description: Annamalai University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Annamalai University Chidambaram NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 19490 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Annamalai University Chidambaram MBBS cutoff 2025 was 19490 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 20243 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Annamalai University Chidambaram accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

The previous year Annamalai University NEET PG cut off 2022 has been concluded with the release of Round 5 Seat Allotment results. Based cutoff 2022 for NEET PGcutoff , MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy can be considered as the most competitive branch. The R1 and the last round closing rank for MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy was 1038 for the General category All India students. On analysing cutoff 2022 with that of 2021, there has been an increasing trend in cutoff for the M
Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated previous year's NEET PG Counselling Rounds for the General All India category students:

Annamalai University Chidambaram MBA/PGDM cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, along with the previous 2-years cutoff data, i.e., 2024, and 2023. In 2025 the last round rank for MBA/PGDM stood at 3212 among the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI quota, the cutoff rank for the same course was 5503.

Students can view the Annamalai University Chidambaram BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at Annamalai University Chidambaram was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 39965.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Annamalai University Chidambaram. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #42 rank in the Pharmacy category, #34 under State Public University, and #38 under Agriculture and Allied Sectors. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Annamalai University Chidambaram rankings.

rankings.highlight: 36th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Annamalai University Chidambaram outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Annamalai University Chidambaram's rankings in 'University' category have shown stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Annamalai University Chidambaram's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Engineering' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 50 ranks to #201 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The 'Pharmacy' category rankings of the institute have shown a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 15 ranks to #42 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is noticeable that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 3 ranks to #34 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Annamalai University Chidambaram has received strong ranks by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Medical (Government)' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook-ICARE 2025.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

qs_world.description:
As per the overall score, Annamalai University Chidambaram has been placed at a good position by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2026, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 50 ranks to #571 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 8 ranks to #156 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

sports.description: Annamalai University offers sports facilities to promote the holistic development of students. The institute offers a wide variety of sports including:

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 3 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Place for placement VSB Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure in hostels. They provide routers for students to use free Wi-Fi. In the hostel, they provide a bed with bedsheets for each student and cupboards with blocks, and the routine is different from other colleges. There are strict rules for the hostel that everyone should follow.

reviews.review_heading: Annamalai University review.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure in college, old but in good condition. Nice architecture and a good environment for study. Hostel quality is poor, not so hygienic and clean. If you want to join the hostel, think twice before joining. Most of the students get skin problems because of the bad water and unhygienic environment in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent academy support with a good campus, but needs more practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study material. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average, while the canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage student recreation. Overall, the infrastructure...

reviews.review_heading: Annamalai University for Ph.D. and M.Ed course admission.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, but there are limited facilities available because it does not provide many courses, so there are fewer facilities. In this college, hostel facilities are available, but an extra charge is taken to use the facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 10 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Well qualified faculty members and encouraging.
reviews.review_text: Our college has provided facilities and infrastructure. Everyone can use the internet. It has a huge central library. Classrooms are good, clean, and hygienic. The labs are good. Hostel facilities for both girls and boys are good, and the food served is good. The canteen is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 5 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: VSB Engineering College has good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: VSB Engineering College's infrastructure and facilities are excellent. This college has more departments. All classrooms are more comfortable for all students. Multiple computer laboratories are available in this college. This college provides good hostel facilities. The hostel food quality is very good. Multiple sports grounds are also there in this college. Emergency medical facilities are available here. There is a well-stocked library in this college.

reviews.review_heading: This college has very good infrastructure and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: This college has very well-equipped workshops, a library, and labs, but the hostel is not recommended because of the hostel's food and room facilities. The campus is liberal for studies and extracurricular activities. There is a well-organized central library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 1 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has a peaceful and friendly environment with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good hostel with faculty members on each floor and separate janitors on each floor, which makes it clean. They are very good without any disappointments. They make sure to meet every aspect of students and make sure students are comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Rollercoaster course and life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Department of Pharmacy is good, with all labs for the subjects that are taught there. When it comes to the hostel, the fee is only 50,000 for a year. Food at the mess is okay, and the university has its own hospital and a big pavilion for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 9 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A place for placement, good infrastructure, green campus.
reviews.review_text: Yes, the Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very neat and spacious. Hostel facilities are also good, and the mess has tasty food and good water facilities. The canteen is also neat and has good food facilities. Sports and games are also happening nicely, with many competitions taking place at both state and national levels.

reviews.review_heading: M.Sc. Statistics at Annamalai University.
reviews.review_text: Non-vegetarian food is served three times a week. The college provides good medical facilities and regular health checkups for students and faculty members. This initiative demonstrates the college management's concern for students' physical health.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 10 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Teachers are friendly and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. The labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The classrooms look very beautiful with AC. The library is good, and many books are available. We have a tennis court at our college. The college provides good hostel facilities. The canteen food is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 9 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: VSB Engineering College is the place for placement.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms have smart boards with 75-inch displays. In my college surroundings, both the hostel and classrooms have high-speed internet Wi-Fi. Different dishes are available in the canteen every day. The hostel food has different varieties based on the days, with non-veg provided twice a week.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 30 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: In our department, every classroom is neat and has a smart mirror and high-speed Wi-Fi. The department helps to learn without any distractions. Our college consists of a library where there are more than 70,000 books. It has high-speed Wi-Fi. Its speed is 10 Kbs.

reviews.review_heading: Good university with a strong reputation. One can gain knowledge and secure placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in both hostel and college are excellent. Infrastructure is very neat, and free Wi-Fi is provided to all. Projectors are available in every classroom. There are two main libraries in our college. Food in the mess is tasty. Medical support is available 24 hours. Recreational activities are also available.

data.description: Annamalai University Annamalai Nagar faculty is good and experienced. Annamalai University Chidambaram also arranges seminars, guest lectures and workshops, and various trainings for students. Annamalai University Chidambaram faculty go through multiple trainings before actually teaching the students.

Good placements are available for information technology and computer science engineering students.
